name: Power the Polls
subject: Our gratitude for you
body:
| Our elections run smoothly because of individuals who step forward when it matters most. _You’re receiving this email because you have expressed interest in the past about applying to be a poll worker in your community. Power the Polls is here to help connect people to their local elections offices. If you no longer wish to receive emails from Power the Polls,[_you can safely unsubscribe here_](https://act.powerthepolls.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=8846.934366.GL6k-D&t=1&akid=8846%2E934366%2EGL6k-D)._
# [](https://act.powerthepolls.org/go/42?t=2&akid=8846%2E934366%2EGL6k-D)
Peter,** We are so grateful for this community of people, from every corner of the country, who are dedicated to helping their neighbors vote. **Our elections run smoothly because of individuals who step forward when it matters most.** Whether you’ve served as a poll worker before or are planning to in the future, your contribution strengthens the democratic process for everyone. Thank you for your dedication and service. Wishing you and your loved ones a wonderful holiday season. —The Power the Polls Team
---
* * *
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). You received this message because you are subscribed to Power the Polls' mailing list. [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://act.powerthepolls.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?ak_proof=1&akid=8846.934366.GL6k-D&t=3&akid=8846%2E934366%2EGL6k-D) If you have any questions, please contact us at [info@powerthepolls.org](mailto:info@powerthepolls.org) and a member of our team will be in touch.

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Some social media companies won’t let us tell you this
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2gDs3sSqyQPAkmesQ1aHmg~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2gDs3sSqyQPAkmesQ1aHmg~~/AARclAA~~~) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2gDs3sSqyQPAkmesQ1aHmg~~/AARclAA~~~)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

Team -- Even though the presidential results weren't what we worked so hard for, the truth is clear: **Kamala Harris broke barriers, ran a historic presidential campaign, and inspired Democrats across America.**

She proved the importance of fighting for what we believe in, and from her first day as vice president to the last day of her campaign, she demonstrated what it means to be a champion for all Americans. **We're organizing a card to thank her for her public service -- and we want YOU to sign!**

We need 250,000 signatures by the midnight deadline before we can send it, so **please, sign on right away:**

[**Thank Kamala Harris for her _historic_ campaign >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/20761?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241126-SignTheCard-KamalaHarrisThankYouCard-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241126-SignTheCard-KamalaHarrisThankYouCard-Pros-sl1&akid=19019%2E9716520%2E6fRzkv)

name: Swalwell HQ
subject: the season of giving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
and a time for action |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97722984/514366493/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2VlZTkwNC01NGFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ROPP3JFXjRESwUKfH8G1ucL4xM4Omhgucd0y7ODye8s=&emci=e4a5842b-3eab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=f3eee904-54ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=7878003)
Hi friend, As Thanksgiving week begins, I can’t help but reflect on the incredible power of our community and the shared determination that unites us. This past year, we’ve seen some hard-fought progress across the country, but we’re facing a stark reality: Trump is preparing for a return to the White House. Now, friend, is the time for us to rally like never before. The road ahead will be tough, but our strength lies in what we do together.
This season of giving reminds us that real change begins in our homes and radiates outward, to our neighborhoods, our communities, and beyond.

Together, we can amplify the work of organizations fighting tirelessly for justice, equality, and a livable future. These groups are leading the charge, and they need us by their side:
* **[Planned Parenthood](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97722985/514366494/1499386161?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2VlZTkwNC01NGFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ROPP3JFXjRESwUKfH8G1ucL4xM4Omhgucd0y7ODye8s=&emci=e4a5842b-3eab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=f3eee904-54ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=7878003)** , providing vital healthcare services and standing firm to protect reproductive freedom.
* **[Equality California](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97722986/514366495/2133499350?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2VlZTkwNC01NGFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ROPP3JFXjRESwUKfH8G1ucL4xM4Omhgucd0y7ODye8s=&emci=e4a5842b-3eab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=f3eee904-54ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=7878003)** , championing equality and justice for LGBTQ+ individuals.
* **[The Trevor Project](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97722987/514366496/-77138652?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2VlZTkwNC01NGFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ROPP3JFXjRESwUKfH8G1ucL4xM4Omhgucd0y7ODye8s=&emci=e4a5842b-3eab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=f3eee904-54ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=7878003)** , offering life-saving crisis intervention and support for LGBTQ+ youth.
* **[Women's Emergency Network](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97722988/514366497/1739971433?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2VlZTkwNC01NGFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ROPP3JFXjRESwUKfH8G1ucL4xM4Omhgucd0y7ODye8s=)** , aiding women in critical need of reproductive care.
* **[350.org](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97722989/514366498/1407899819?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2VlZTkwNC01NGFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ROPP3JFXjRESwUKfH8G1ucL4xM4Omhgucd0y7ODye8s=&emci=e4a5842b-3eab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=f3eee904-54ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=7878003)** , tackling the climate crisis and empowering a global grassroots movement to save our planet.

This is our moment to come together and show the world that we won’t back down. Thank you for standing with us, for fighting for our communities, and for believing in the power of people united for a common cause. Let’s dig deep and keep pushing forward.

— Swalwell HQ
|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97722990/514366499/1800133675?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2VlZTkwNC01NGFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ROPP3JFXjRESwUKfH8G1ucL4xM4Omhgucd0y7ODye8s=&emci=e4a5842b-3eab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=f3eee904-54ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=7878003)

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Thankful for our supporters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/67635/images/IDP%20logo.jpg]
Peter, as we head into the long Thanksgiving holiday weekend, we want to reach out and simply thank you for being with us in this fight for better government and a better state.

We know this is not an easy fight, and we are in it for the long haul. All of you are the backbone of our party and together we will continue pushing for commonsense investments in childcare, healthcare, public education, and quality of life.

We hope you have a restful time with family and loved ones during the long holiday. Thanks for your continued support. Safe travels to wherever you are headed this week.

Best,
INDems

P.S. Please consider making a donation to our rebuilding efforts to build a stronger party for now and the future. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/indems]

clean_body: [] Peter, as we head into the long Thanksgiving holiday weekend, we want to reach out and simply thank you for being with us in this fight for better government and a better state. We know this is not an easy fight, and we are in it for the long haul. All of you are the backbone of our party and together we will continue pushing for commonsense investments in childcare, healthcare, public education, and quality of life. We hope you have a restful time with family and loved ones during the long holiday. Thanks for your continued support. Safe travels to wherever you are headed this week. Best, INDems P.S. Please consider making a donation to our rebuilding efforts to build a stronger party for now and the future. name: Adam Schiff
subject: My thoughts on Trump’s Cabinet picks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8200%2E5257348%2EXX0bBQ)
Derek — I went on _MSNBC_ last week to discuss Donald Trump’s Cabinet selections, and I want to share what I said:
Before the election, some people hoped that Trump would act differently in a second term — focused on building a legacy or unburdened by the need to run for another term. And I don’t think it’s too early to conclude his second term will be different; it is likely to be worse. The nature of his nominees demonstrates that he has changed — _just not for the better._
Trump’s picks are _far more extreme_ than anyone he nominated the first time around.
Matt Gaetz. Pam Bondi. Pete Hegseth. Tulsi Gabbard. Robert F. Kennedy Jr. And not just his nominees, but who he is surrounding himself with, including Elon Musk.
While I am awaiting my Senate committee assignments, I know the confirmation process for these nominees will be interesting and unlike any we have seen before, including questions about sexual assault, fondness for foreign despots like Bashar al-Assad, and failure to accept science and facts.
Donald Trump seems to be daring the Senate to stand up to him. He’s trying to show off his dominance and disrupt the whole government enterprise. **I’m encouraged that for his most extreme and unqualified nominee, Matt Gaetz, there was pushback from some of my GOP colleagues.**
But Trump’s choices for the top legal positions are a sign that he views the Justice Department not as a department representing the American people and their public interest, but as a department representing himself, to protect him from criminal and civil liability. To be his shield _and_ his sword to go after his enemies.
A lot of hard work awaits us, Derek. But just as before, I will continue to be relentless in my efforts to make the economy work for everyone and to protect our democracy — no matter who is in the White House.
More soon,
Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2024_abs_em.7WX_lH&refcode=AU_ABS_CL_GEN_NOA_AC90_20241126_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8200%2E5257348%2EXX0bBQ)

We’ve sold thousands - and I mean thousands - of these hats since you voted to make me the 47th President. People are saying, “Sir, this hat might even be better than your legendary red MAGA hat.” That’s so incredible to hear. So here’s the plan: if you think I should wear my Victory Hat on Inauguration Day, grab one for yourself, and we could match on the big day! you please order yours before the end of the day so we can get it to you in time? Sincerely, Donald J. Trump President - Elect of the United States | | | | | Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC Inc. are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. I went on Mornings with Maria this Sunday with a simple message to the radical-left Mayors and Governors plotting to disobey President Trump’s deportation plans:
_**YOU WILL FAIL.**_
This is his STRONGEST supporter in the House, Byron Donalds.
The cold hard truth is that 57% of the American people voted to END the open border policies of Biden/Kamala whether Dems like it or not.
We’re SICK of them turning a blind eye to illegals murdering our citizens, Cartels SEIZING apartments, and fentanyl poisoning an entire generation of our youth.
So if these Democrats think they can disobey the White House in the name of their open-borders agenda, only know that it will lead to MAJOR political losses for them and the American People.
They can throw a Trump-Deranged Tantrum day & night, _**[NOTHING will change what happened on November 5th](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9vnd/?__vbtrk=MjYxODE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYxODE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_ , but I fear if we brush this off things are only going to get worse.
With less than 2 months until the Inauguration - we HAVE to remain on the offensive at all costs.
I’m only able to keep up the fight with support from folks like you, so please, _**[will you consider chipping in today to help me END their sabotage before it’s too late?](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9vnd/?__vbtrk=MjYxODE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYxODE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_ _**[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9vne/?__vbtrk=MjYxODE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYxODE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**__**[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9vne/?__vbtrk=MjYxODE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYxODE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_

name: Derek Tran
subject: An email I’ve been waiting to send:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Tran for Congress P
body:
It’s official. Thanks to the hard work and dedication of this team, we have officially won this election. It’s an honor of a lifetime to be your Congressman-elect for California’s 45th District.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97724494/514399634/835768282?refcode=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2ExMTg1MTktNWRhYy1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Dx2YyNdY9ZT0AfCT0Pqo2Dg_75pyUamtm_GTzInFWnM=&emci=13efc502-8e9b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=ca118519-5dac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=27336212) It’s official, team. **It’s the honor of a lifetime to be reaching out to you as the Congressman-elect for California’s 45th District.** Thanks to the hard work and dedication of this grassroots team, we just won one of the most competitive races in the country and pulled off the upset of a lifetime. I truly can’t thank you enough – your support is how we got here. _Everything we have built over the past year has paid off. Southern California families will finally have a leader who is ready to fight for the issues we care about most – from preserving affordable healthcare, to codifying reproductive freedom, to keeping our communities safe, to defending democracy, and so much more._ **And team, it’s not lost on me that, because of our hard work, we just made history.** **I’m humbled to represent the Vietnamese community as the first Vietnamese Congressman to represent Little Saigon in Washington, DC.** This is not an honor I take lightly, and I will do everything I can to fight for the values that are important to all of us. I will always represent all of my constituents in CA-45 with honor and integrity. Thank you for standing with me through it all. Now, the real fight begins. Let’s get to work, Derek
---
| | Paid for by Derek Tran for Congress P.O. Box 395, 10441 Stanford Ave, Garden Grove, CA 92842
www.derektranforcongress.com

Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army.

name: Justice Democrats
subject: The ICC officially issued arrest warrants for Israeli leaders
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Last week in a historic move, the International Criminal Court (ICC)
formerly accused the Israeli government of war crimes and issued arrest
warrants against Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and former
Defense Minister Yoav Gallant.

Respecting this independent court’s decision, other world leaders like
Canada’s Prime Minister Justin Trudeau and France’s President Emmanuel
Macron said they would honor these warrants and arrest these leaders if
they set foot in their countries.

Meanwhile, not only are U.S. officials disparaging the court’s decision,
but President Biden himself reportedly called Macron on behalf of
Netanyahu and said he has “a right to be angry” about France enforcing the
ICC’s warrant.

Justice Democrats Rep. Cori Bush is right: if we believe in the rule of
law, then we should start acting like it and hold Israel accountable for
its war crimes.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/petition-20241126-ICC/?source=em20241126-36187&akid=36187%2E1203867%2EM9YsLn ]Tweet from Cori Bush: The ICC’s arrest warrants for Netanyahu & Gallant
are long past due and reaffirm the illegality of Israeli genocide and
occupation. This is an important step toward accountability. The U.S. must
honor this decision, impose an arms embargo & stop enabling these
atrocities.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/petition-20241126-ICC/?source=em20241126-36187&akid=36187%2E1203867%2EM9YsLn ]If you agree, add your name to our petition demanding the Biden
administration honor the ICC’s decision and issue an arms embargo now →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/petition-20241126-ICC/?source=em20241126-36187&akid=36187%2E1203867%2EM9YsLn ]Add Your Name

As long as the United States continues to arm Israel with weapons and
bombs while it commits crimes against humanity, our country is complicit
in breaking international law and perpetuating genocide. It’s time for
Biden to act.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241126-36187-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36187_1203867_M9YsLn&akid=36187%2E1203867%2EM9YsLn

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36187%2E1203867%2EM9YsLn

name: Eleni Kounalakis
subject: Fruitful fields and healthful skies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eleni Kounalakis for Governor 2026
body:
Eleni Kounalakis for Governor Logo [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62802/images/ekg-logomark-min.png]

Peter,

In 1863, as the Civil War raged on, President Abraham Lincoln declared Thanksgiving a national holiday. His Proclamation started with these words: “The year that is drawing toward its close has been filled with the blessings of fruitful fields and healthful skies.” In the midst of great division and destruction, President Lincoln established the day when we ask, “What are you grateful for?”

As a first generation American growing up in California, my family was relatively new to the traditions of this country. But the lesson of Thanksgiving that I remember most clearly is this: Americans survive when we help one another. We flourish when we learn from each other. Our future is assured when we put aside our differences and see that our destiny relies on our unity.

This Thanksgiving I am grateful for all of you, and to everyone who stands behind the principle that every American - regardless of race, age, class, gender or immigration history - has a place in our beautiful country, and deserves the same shot at achieving the American dream that my father did.

Thank you, Peter for standing by me again and again. And if I am elected governor, I will always strive to bring out the best of us as Californians - our values of openness, acceptance, creativity, optimism and unity.

Happy Thanksgiving.

Eleni Kounalakis

CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eleni-em-nov24]

Paid for by Eleni Kounalakis for Governor 2026
2443 Fillmore Street #300
San Francisco, CA 94115

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Texas offers Trump administration more land and support for mass deportations,** " Texas Tribune's **Berenice Garcia** -- "Texas officials**** sent a clear message during twin events in the Rio Grande Valley on Tuesday that they would be a willing partner to the incoming Trump administration and its immigration crackdown.

First, Texas Land Commissioner **Dawn Buckingham** announced the state will continue to offer up more land to them for mass deportation facilities, stating that her office is identifying property to be ready for when the new administration takes office in January.

Then during a pre-Thanksgiving visit to service members involved in Operation Lone Star, the state's own border security initiative, Texas Gov.**Greg Abbott** signaled strong cooperation between the state and federal government now that President-elect **Donald Trump** is returning to the White House.

"There's help on the way," Abbott said to members of the Texas National Guard and the Texas Department of Public Safety.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/38bfdb61-24b1-41e7-b5ba-036f77d1ad28?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"The cavalry is here, quite literally with us here today," Abbott said before introducing **Tom Homan** , whom Trump picked to lead his immigration enforcement efforts. Homan pledged support from the federal government to the Texas servicemen and women.

"Hopefully, we get enough help to you where some of you, men and women, go home with your families," Homan said, adding that the administration would run an interior enforcement operation involving mass deportations.

Buckingham started the day at the 1,402-acre Starr County ranch [she offered to Trump last week](https://substack.com/redirect/33f37cf8-4b38-4142-b7cf-9f581b48e7a5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to build a deportation facility and where the state is currently constructing a border wall.

"We have 13 million acres around the state, and if there's something that meets the federal government's needs, we want them to be able to utilize that," Buckingham told the Tribune.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/38bfdb61-24b1-41e7-b5ba-036f77d1ad28?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The new project is called "Jocelyn's Initiative" after **Jocelyn Nungaray** , a 12-year-old girl from Houston who police say was killed by two Venezuelan men who were in the country illegally. Jocelyn's mother and grandmother, **Alexis** and **Jackie** , joined Buckingham to announce the initiative during a news conference.

"Our goal is to ensure that no other parent has to, unfortunately, experience what Alexis has experienced," Buckingham said." [Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/cdb3b57e-36d2-4657-9641-e8971664f375?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "Texas offers Trump administration more land and support for mass deportations, " Texas Tribune's Berenice Garcia -- "Texas officials** sent a clear message during twin events in the Rio Grande Valley on Tuesday that they would be a willing partner to the incoming Trump administration and its immigration crackdown. First, Texas Land Commissioner Dawn Buckingham announced the state will continue to offer up more land to them for mass deportation facilities, stating that her office is identifying property to be ready for when the new administration takes office in January. Then during a pre-Thanksgiving visit to service members involved in Operation Lone Star, the state's own border security initiative, Texas Gov.Greg Abbott signaled strong cooperation between the state and federal government now that President-elect Donald Trump is returning to the White House. "There's help on the way," Abbott said to members of the Texas National Guard and the Texas Department of Public Safety. "The cavalry is here, quite literally with us here today," Abbott said before introducing Tom Homan , whom Trump picked to lead his immigration enforcement efforts. Homan pledged support from the federal government to the Texas servicemen and women. "Hopefully, we get enough help to you where some of you, men and women, go home with your families," Homan said, adding that the administration would run an interior enforcement operation involving mass deportations. Buckingham started the day at the 1,402-acre Starr County ranch to build a deportation facility and where the state is currently constructing a border wall. "We have 13 million acres around the state, and if there's something that meets the federal government's needs, we want them to be able to utilize that," Buckingham told the Tribune. The new project is called "Jocelyn's Initiative" after Jocelyn Nungaray , a 12-year-old girl from Houston who police say was killed by two Venezuelan men who were in the country illegally. Jocelyn's mother and grandmother, Alexis and Jackie , joined Buckingham to announce the initiative during a news conference. "Our goal is to ensure that no other parent has to, unfortunately, experience what Alexis has experienced," Buckingham said." "**Texas offers Trump administration more land and support for mass deportations,** " Texas Tribune's **Berenice Garcia** -- "Texas officials**** sent a clear message during twin events in the Rio Grande Valley on Tuesday that they would be a willing partner to the incoming Trump administration and its immigration crackdown.

First, Texas Land Commissioner **Dawn Buckingham** announced the state will continue to offer up more land to them for mass deportation facilities, stating that her office is identifying property to be ready for when the new administration takes office in January.

Then during a pre-Thanksgiving visit to service members involved in Operation Lone Star, the state's own border security initiative, Texas Gov.**Greg Abbott** signaled strong cooperation between the state and federal government now that President-elect **Donald Trump** is returning to the White House.

"There's help on the way," Abbott said to members of the Texas National Guard and the Texas Department of Public Safety.

"The cavalry is here, quite literally with us here today," Abbott said before introducing **Tom Homan** , whom Trump picked to lead his immigration enforcement efforts. Homan pledged support from the federal government to the Texas servicemen and women.

"Hopefully, we get enough help to you where some of you, men and women, go home with your families," Homan said, adding that the administration would run an interior enforcement operation involving mass deportations.

Buckingham started the day at the 1,402-acre Starr County ranch [she offered to Trump last week](https://substack.com/redirect/8bc1040d-34b2-4335-91c8-d6bbcd498eb8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to build a deportation facility and where the state is currently constructing a border wall.

"We have 13 million acres around the state, and if there's something that meets the federal government's needs, we want them to be able to utilize that," Buckingham told the Tribune.

The new project is called "Jocelyn's Initiative" after **Jocelyn Nungaray** , a 12-year-old girl from Houston who police say was killed by two Venezuelan men who were in the country illegally. Jocelyn's mother and grandmother, **Alexis** and **Jackie** , joined Buckingham to announce the initiative during a news conference.

"Our goal is to ensure that no other parent has to, unfortunately, experience what Alexis has experienced," Buckingham said." [Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/cdbd617c-b09d-4918-9d67-12a420b728f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

With a decline in the number of credible news organizations, the Must Read Texas morning email is indispensable for anyone that wants to continue to be informed." - Former U.S. Senator Phil Gramm (R-TX) AUSTIN NEWSLETTER LAUNCHED Are you one of the 100,000+ subscribers to , a newsletter that delivers EVERYTHING you NEED TO KNOW about Austin? | | ---|---|--- Subscriptions are $5/mo, $50/yr or $199/lifetime here: . » Read this morning's (free) edition . > SUBSCRIBE HERE: . ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "Texas offers Trump administration more land and support for mass deportations, " Texas Tribune's Berenice Garcia -- "Texas officials** sent a clear message during twin events in the Rio Grande Valley on Tuesday that they would be a willing partner to the incoming Trump administration and its immigration crackdown. First, Texas Land Commissioner Dawn Buckingham announced the state will continue to offer up more land to them for mass deportation facilities, stating that her office is identifying property to be ready for when the new administration takes office in January. Then during a pre-Thanksgiving visit to service members involved in Operation Lone Star, the state's own border security initiative, Texas Gov.Greg Abbott signaled strong cooperation between the state and federal government now that President-elect Donald Trump is returning to the White House. "There's help on the way," Abbott said to members of the Texas National Guard and the Texas Department of Public Safety. "The cavalry is here, quite literally with us here today," Abbott said before introducing Tom Homan , whom Trump picked to lead his immigration enforcement efforts. Homan pledged support from the federal government to the Texas servicemen and women. "Hopefully, we get enough help to you where some of you, men and women, go home with your families," Homan said, adding that the administration would run an interior enforcement operation involving mass deportations. Buckingham started the day at the 1,402-acre Starr County ranch to build a deportation facility and where the state is currently constructing a border wall. "We have 13 million acres around the state, and if there's something that meets the federal government's needs, we want them to be able to utilize that," Buckingham told the Tribune. The new project is called "Jocelyn's Initiative" after Jocelyn Nungaray , a 12-year-old girl from Houston who police say was killed by two Venezuelan men who were in the country illegally. Jocelyn's mother and grandmother, Alexis and Jackie , joined Buckingham to announce the initiative during a news conference. "Our goal is to ensure that no other parent has to, unfortunately, experience what Alexis has experienced," Buckingham said." FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Free subscribers will only receive the top story in their morning email. Free subscribers will need to become paid subscribers to receive full story summaries. name: OKGOP
subject: Your Invitation to the OKGOP Christmas Party
body:
Seating is limited...

| [ ](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=urG6o0YzHACIJY0G92IOaIOiUFGhm1XQHaiZ59fvCoY&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_okgop_christmas_party_2024&n=1)
---
Peter -- 🎄 **OKGOP Christmas Party at Capitol View Event Center** 🎄 Join us for a joyous celebration at the **Capitol View Event Center**! We'll be honoring the Birth of our Savior, Jesus Christ, and the election of our 47th President, Donald J. Trump. Enjoy Christmas music, light hors d'oeuvres, and the company of your fellow OKGOP members. This in-person event is the perfect way to kick off the holiday season and spread some Christmas cheer. Get your tickets, mark your calendars, and get ready to party! We hope you can join us on
### Monday, December 9th at 6:00 - 8:00 p.m.
The Capitol View Event Center
5201 N. Lincoln Blvd., Oklahoma City, OK 73105
### **Get your $5 ticket at the link below!**
| [](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=OuHnzqubmow6O_1L76Q3vyK-NAiwVhK5-2_GmhdpAbSuQMgW7uEg4iSzgjw_WlPzAk1JRTkb7vvlCxteU3-mEA&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_okgop_christmas_party_2024&n=2 "Get your $5 Christmas Party Ticket") [Get your $5 Christmas Party Ticket](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=OuHnzqubmow6O_1L76Q3vyK-NAiwVhK5-2_GmhdpAbSuQMgW7uEg4iSzgjw_WlPzAk1JRTkb7vvlCxteU3-mEA&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_okgop_christmas_party_2024&n=2)

For the People,

Nathan Dahm
OKGOP Chairman
[OKGOP.com](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=urG6o0YzHACIJY0G92IOaIOiUFGhm1XQHaiZ59fvCoY&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_okgop_christmas_party_2024&n=3)[](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/?e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_okgop_christmas_party_2024&n=4)

name: Don Huffines
subject: Texans Are Being Poisoned!
body:
From my family to yours, I hope you have a wonderful Thanksgiving and a restful holiday!
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-stkdikl-yuddtktydi-yh/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdikl-yuddtktydi-r/) Patriot,I love Thanksgiving--such a great opportunity to be with our family.There is nothing more important than the traditional family. It is the pillar of society and the foundation of our health, religion, and education. We need to celebrate that this week!From my family to yours, I hope you have a wonderful Thanksgiving week and a restful holiday! I have a short email for y'all today - below is a link to my latest commentary in The Dallas Express on how local governments across Texas are poisoning you in our water supply. **This is the apex of tyranny!** Additionally, in the spirit of Thanksgiving, I will share why I believe we have much to be grateful for about this year's fight for liberty! **It 's Time for Texas to End Forced Fluoridation** [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdikl-yuddtktydi-y/) Forced medicalization is the apex of tyranny. Fluoride is proven to lower the IQ of children and puts pregnant women at risk. Can you believe that our government is spending millions of dollars to poison us?!I encourage all citizens to contact their water provider and find out if fluoride is being added; if so, demand that they stop the indefensible poisoning of Texans![_Click here to r_](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdikl-yuddtktydi-j/) _[ead my latest commentary on fluoride in The Dallas Express](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdikl-yuddtktydi-t/)._ **VIDEO: Economic Pressure Works** [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdikl-yuddtktydi-i/) President Trump has the courage to do what Texas could have and should have done years ago. Why didn't we?The cartel-controlled Mexican govt is making billions of dollars off our wide-open border--they have no financial incentive to secure it.Severe economic pressure will finally secure the border!_[Click here to watch the video and learn more](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdikl-yuddtktydi-h/)_. **Praise God for Our Countless Victories** [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdikl-yuddtktydi-k/) Texas is getting **more** **RED! **Mary Catherine and I celebrated Donald J. Trump's historic landslide victory in Palm Beach, Florida. It's time for the Republican Party to unite once and for all behind President Trump and our conservative agenda.Our greatest days are coming, and the winds of liberty are blowing! Since December 2023, brother Phil and I have spent over half a million dollars supporting LIBERTY-LOVING conservative patriots who want to **Make the Texas House Conservative Again and Drain the Washington Swamp.** All of the candidates we supported are true patriots and courageous leaders fighting for our Texas GOP Platform and Legislative Priorities.These legislators will lead the charge to **ELIMINATE** school property taxes, **STOP** the invasion, **EMPOWER** parents, **END** Democrat committee chairmanships, **BAN** taxpayer-funded lobbying, and **DEMAND** honest/transparent budgets. Look at all of these wins! **Because of YOUR hard work****,** it truly will be a new day in America and in the 89th Texas Legislature.**Praise God!** Learn more at**[HuffinesLibertyPAC.com](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdikl-yuddtktydi-u/)**. May God bless you, your family, and the great state of Texas. Our greatest days are coming. See you on the battlefield for liberty!!For Liberty, Prosperity, and Virtue Always, Don Huffines
_Father, papa, businessman, and former TX Senator_ P.S. Follow me on [Facebook](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdikl-yuddtktydi-o/), [Instagram](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdikl-yuddtktydi-b/), and [Twitter](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdikl-yuddtktydi-n/) for updates. Your family and friends can join this email list by [clicking here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdikl-yuddtktydi-p/).Want me to speak at your event? Join your podcast? [Click here to fill out my request form.](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdikl-yuddtktydi-x/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdikl-yuddtktydi-c/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdikl-yuddtktydi-q/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdikl-yuddtktydi-a/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdikl-yuddtktydi-f/) | [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdikl-yuddtktydi-z/) | **[ABOUT](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdikl-yuddtktydi-v/) | [NEWS](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdikl-yuddtktydi-s/) | [EVENTS](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdikl-yuddtktydi-g/) | [SPEAKER/MEDIA REQUEST](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdikl-yuddtktydi-w/) | [DONATE](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdikl-yuddtktydi-yd/)** [Preferences](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.updatemyprofile.com/t-stkdikl-17329976-yuddtktydi-yk) | [Unsubscribe](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-u-stkdikl-yuddtktydi-yu/)

body:

body:

Friend,

Our team wants to send President Trump a special Thanksgiving Day card signed by all the BIGGEST Trump supporters in America, **[so of course, the card wouldn't be complete without YOUR SIGNATURE.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/eeoYZFuodBYQxHQsvRNh3A~~/AAVLBgA~~)**

_**[Sign the Thanksgiving Day card RIGHT NOW, and leave a short note for President Trump.>>](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/eeoYZFuodBYQxHQsvRNh3A~~/AAVLBgA~~)**_

name: Amanda Chase
subject: Meet & Greet Schedule
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
Come meet Amanda
| | | | Greetings!You're Invited to the home of Senator Amanda Chase
---
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Greetings!, I would like to personally to invite you to a Meet and Greet that I'm having at my home in the heart of historic Appomattox.
I'm running for state senate in a Special Election to fill John McGuire's term in the Virginia Senate to represent Amelia, Appomattox, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Western Hanover, the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico and Powhatan counties.
We will fill you in on how to participate and vote in the Republican Mass Meeting to be held Friday, December 13 at the Goochland Sports Complex and give you an opportunity to ask questions.
Afterwards, you can join us for the parade and tree lighting ceremony, which are just steps from my home.
The annual Christmas Parade goes right in front of our house beginning at 4pm and the tree lighting ceremony at Courtland Festival Park is within walking distance.
I hope you will save the date and join us.
---
| |
---
There is no cost to attend this event.
If you are interested in sponsoring this event, please click the sponsorship button below.
Please RSVP within 24 hours of the event so we can get an accurate count for refreshments.
Thank you! For God & Country,
---
|

clean_body: Come meet Amanda | | | | Greetings!You're Invited to the home of Senator Amanda Chase | | | | | Greetings!, I would like to personally to invite you to a Meet and Greet that I'm having at my home in the heart of historic Appomattox. I'm running for state senate in a Special Election to fill John McGuire's term in the Virginia Senate to represent Amelia, Appomattox, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Western Hanover, the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico and Powhatan counties. We will fill you in on how to participate and vote in the Republican Mass Meeting to be held Friday, December 13 at the Goochland Sports Complex and give you an opportunity to ask questions. Afterwards, you can join us for the parade and tree lighting ceremony, which are just steps from my home. The annual Christmas Parade goes right in front of our house beginning at 4pm and the tree lighting ceremony at Courtland Festival Park is within walking distance. I hope you will save the date and join us. | | There is no cost to attend this event. If you are interested in sponsoring this event, please click the sponsorship button below. Please RSVP within 24 hours of the event so we can get an accurate count for refreshments. Thank you! name: Hillsdale College via Real American Reporting
subject: Claim your Hillsdale College Calendar
body:
This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts

This sponsored message from Real American Reporting is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zqph12t9quuvpg35qfahlpm3mojs0fvthj77hlqg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctg6aoj2clh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zshmbsic61ju0l8b0s3487hepmsa1hnf9os1ui0g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctg6aoj2clh2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

**That 's why I hope you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar by October 31.** You can reserve your calendar by clicking on this secure link:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z3kp3ike80mei7k5qdhak6u42k4kl9gdpc3mj6f8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctg6aoj2clh2bs)**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

name: Congresswoman Boebert
subject: The RINOs are plotting

body:
We can’t let them win

| | | |

---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1d78kofg0eenno4m0lb8divjvfopksntl6qqcv0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctg6aoj6c1h2bs)

Friend,
The RINOs are plotting behind the scenes, thinking they can undermine the MAGA agenda.
WELL, NOT ON MY WATCH!
We are going to EXPOSE these insiders who prioritize power over the people's well-being. They align with the Radical Left, ignoring true patriots like us. We cannot let them succeed!

[STOP THE RINOs](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zg07a1371udm616ictdhq1hon9c031kq2156k7tg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctg6aoj6c1h2bs)

It feels like every time we win someone from our own camp RUINS everything, and I will NOT let that happen again.
I am asking proud Patriots like you to have my back. When you take on RINOs you often get burned, and I’ll be at risk once again.
**[I’m counting on your help in this mission to expose the RINOs and make sure we get rid of them once and for all.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlih73pli5v2knujr68rf3gk9t37vb9mfkr3mjp0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctg6aoj6c1h2bs)**
Thanks for your support,Lauren Boebert

name: John Rich
subject: This is an unusual favor, but I have to ask you
body:
Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists?

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zklvb2i7idttof7ghjgtmnuhbpqp0sml5fsubb7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctg6aoj4clh2bs "SkyTree Book Fairs")
Friend,

Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? Parents were rightfully angry at what they saw in schools.

But have you ever wondered, “Who is putting these inappropriate books in schools for kids?”

It’s not Woke teachers (although they don’t help).
It’s not even school boards.
It’s Scholastic Book Fairs.

Now, you are probably like me. You may have fond memories of book fairs by Scholastic in your youth. You may have gotten a hold of books like _Where the Red Fern Grows_ , _Huckleberry Finn_ , and other classics.

Scholastic is now promoting books like _Welcome to St. Hell_ , which promotes trans ideology to kids.
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zh82kruhd745o1h7l0ee757kllsigochibj94b90_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctg6aoj4clh2bs)[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4q7fe32sc5l6otk0i1hophvaq00a8o0l3cdl8e0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctg6aoj4clh2bs)
SkyTree Book Fairs offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic.

Here’s how you can help.

[Please help us promote new book fairs in schools to replace Scholastic. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward SkyTree? I am hoping to raise $50,000. Click here to donate any amount today. >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvh9i32j9hm6kj8grumtsivi6ksb53d0rqo90rng_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctg6aoj4clh2bs)
[Donate $10 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zqc5s9nbj7ulbfibf4b4qv75scjinl27jbtbahro_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctg6aoj4clh2bs)

[Donate $35 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1d4ufpp5dc5as0vmm1ikvqvt6a9ug95i626t4to_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctg6aoj4clh2bs)

[Donate $50 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4fb2cfn3u87u1dhn34a7e805jlt9f1jmqj376tg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctg6aoj4clh2bs)

[Donate $100 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zpf1k5tvkr4oo5bdbmhb1aubf6vmaekfsoa2lalg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctg6aoj4clh2bs)

[Donate $250 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z7lme18po1tsp14rul7luiib62a6tie1tp4c8mso_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctg6aoj4clh2bs)

[Donate $500 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z99ach8lmo80h9faa1jvn422296a9vh3vskljujg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctg6aoj4clh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zq2muh5la5oqi6tuqoro8chfkm0a3jtjs9qgvfmo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctg6aoj4clh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8n5unah21cgbice0eelitgek1654kcafm67fmsg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctg6aoj4clh2bs)
SkyTree Book Fairs are already operating in schools to provide wholesome content for families. They are spreading across the entire country, and I wanted to share some photos of their recent events with you.
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zpep7gtt7j26kcrnn9tk2ce5o3pnh8e2munf9rbg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctg6aoj4clh2bs) [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zp1g14sdd0nki41lkfvuci5dpq2dsrhh1o4gpb90_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctg6aoj4clh2bs)
SkyTree will bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination.

I once said if a teacher is doing their job correctly, you should never know about their politics, details of their personal life, or cultural stances.

It’s the same with our kids’ literature.

[My goal is to raise $50,000 this month to bring SkyTree book fairs to more public schools across the country. It costs roughly $4,500 for SkyTree to host a book fair.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z78sc6kp4psdgsd0vgm0vtfcn2jh7r17vapnpt88_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctg6aoj4clh2bs) [Donate $10 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zgvrl9tlia1mgoug4atmgmqnr72e190c42ccm1lg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctg6aoj4clh2bs)

[Donate $35 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1trvgscp76dgoerltd48e2o86oslfamtve2t38g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctg6aoj4clh2bs)

[Donate $50 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zh935okds6o94th5a0q29sgitq7ch3ulin7j0apo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctg6aoj4clh2bs)

[Donate $100 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zej2g5iv8aepahu6eds80bkhel5hl1r4fji7pmf0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctg6aoj4clh2bs)

[Donate $250 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2za9vsm2umr91hqlr098pt117m1osada19nsleljo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctg6aoj4clh2bs)

[Donate $500 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvcom7bp6fro0656k4s1uiuaea2itd05vt0vlf20_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctg6aoj4clh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zi63j3jm58anjm8km3tkf4qhg4mf7fve9i63nd78_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctg6aoj4clh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zqfii5eptoodj6rdgmuobd5jfdf731lgppc4cqp8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctg6aoj4clh2bs)
Thank you, and God bless,

John Rich

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

**That 's why I hope you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar by October 31.** You can reserve your calendar by clicking on this secure link:

Friend,
The RINOs are plotting behind the scenes, thinking they can undermine the MAGA agenda.
WELL, NOT ON MY WATCH!
We are going to EXPOSE these insiders who prioritize power over the people's well-being. They align with the Radical Left, ignoring true patriots like us. We cannot let them succeed!

[STOP THE RINOs](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zedd8pc6u6cheucevfph880siel0op7rtqr52qf0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctg61o72cdh2bs)

It feels like every time we win someone from our own camp RUINS everything, and I will NOT let that happen again.
I am asking proud Patriots like you to have my back. When you take on RINOs you often get burned, and I’ll be at risk once again.
**[I’m counting on your help in this mission to expose the RINOs and make sure we get rid of them once and for all.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zj6diaor54l9e6llg1uoruattoido4chnjl1bfe0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctg61o72cdh2bs)**

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Claim your Hillsdale College Calendar
body:
This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/X-51NdBLuqFjlxyFvLuRuw~~/AARclAA~)
---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/X-51NdBLuqFjlxyFvLuRuw~~/AARclAA~) Dear Fellow American,

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

**That 's why I hope you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar by October 31.** You can reserve your calendar by clicking on this secure link:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/X-51NdBLuqFjlxyFvLuRuw~~/AARclAA~)**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

**That 's why I hope you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar by October 31.** You can reserve your calendar by clicking on this secure link:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d46b8a24c8a34c44b04fc68ab23c1b39&_e=AB257cyJNC8UQeA0-vAvLnlNGo3gcadlAI9iK9s0tdumZ9LMuE8W35OIYjTivAUiBLwwu9TpOwT6z7sV6Gp7YkHuiThp6oGpr8Q8Hvle7Y8g8Fqy94judLKeFxK6pDG_PEQ1Yv0IbxTWk95xx257e8LvG-OW_kbdtAApksEKeBJDMgGkOkXvqc7QT8T8rhwInZxPk9YuaLZMuH1rfbRWTeUxL5CCOxHtyxukwx2Vuc0kfhFEm3oUxYUSqTkH_0F9AnsqmfwFftkkUNnDLezs92t2lCDKuppXpZOpcSklf5zMt0LMeh6MwHWiWIh_uQRuYClVrV8Hn410hqa3N3xF0b42yXC_ZFLeZvh3zXhoh1d3Mf1cGTxr5qDHiRXonYg1jjIQKwj7ySjQEn_xXNjGOg%3D%3D)**

Bill Gray, '01

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity” on DVD
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsp0OHXWMN

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced
persecution and hardship, and settled theological
disputes…

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osp0OHXWMN

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Dear
Friend,

Learning
about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced
persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes
enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are
especially important today, as Christians face increasing
opposition from the culture.

But,
beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early
Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to
proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the
foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history,
can make understanding the most important historical points
difficult.

To
uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online
course, "Ancient Christianity," now available on DVD.

In this
course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first
four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways
the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you
help support this course so we can make it available to millions
of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your
support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for
any donations of $100 or more.

You can
watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of
"Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63897630:sp0OHXWMN:m:3:2627245898:98D200875BB3814B9A03B12F1470D6D8:r

Thank you
for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story
of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best
regards,

Jeremiah
Regan, Ph.D.
Executive
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale
College

| | Peter,

Happy What Do You Love About America Day! Today is all about recognizing what you love most about America and giving thanks to our great country.

For me, it’s all about the freedom to speak your mind, the God-given right to defend yourself and your family, and the endless opportunities this country provides for anyone willing to work hard. Let’s face it – there’s no place like America.

Often, we forget how much people worldwide are struggling and fail to see how many privileges we are afforded by living in this incredible country. **[**There are so many reasons this country is great, but let us know what your favorite thing about America is with our new survey.**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**

## Homan Visits Border With Abbott
President-elect Donald Trump's "border czar," Tom Homan, [visited the Texas-Mexico border](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GO8yAQBOCngQ4L1iTgguJv3OVvr7QWg20kHCJY2cnbn5z-upFG-kbz85gemHJ6rv9xj47eS5lAghZKCTBTwJQ_k-bBeRkGxaNTpgcjjRo03xwCGKthgLu3epHzMgTbSxMi6hm87nlyF6YUGKV6qW8dLlZbe_M4K6ukDUzLGBKV2tEWKb6xLflTjli7uew8u43o1Vj_j8HIYDzPs5t9e8azXT2D8YoMRiq72MqOT7HWuAr0vhCJryd8qSFWcaSWiMHIqwuvM-Wc2t0wLdcdU_6u0Z_3Dwe_AQAA__94ql2C) with Governor Greg Abbott on Tuesday, promising improved border security and mass deportations in response to what he called a "mass illegal immigration crisis." Earlier this week, Abbott praised Homan as the "right guy" to tackle the challenge, emphasizing that he looks forward to having an ally in the federal government. Abbott has [routinely clashed with President Biden](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1utDAQAJ_GdEb2Yv4KF19Dd1-bEq2xgZWMjczmuHv7KEmdfjQazcdjfiBFStt_PILl15pnUGCk1hL62SPF92wqb53yo66C1X0Dver1aKrddmYEVMtqQuNGrXHwrnNj14LvVGjbUJH9lmkNvdaNMm2N62CGoXW46EGrwQujgifOpeY9cHjhtcZ3foZSL_moot2Zz0s0_wRMAqb7vusbr53SxjmFFx6UflEB05kjLW8BEx0HbQWZchIwNWAAtBIw7fnAJE8snEKRn6dE5zKzxJVDkY58SNLl4kORK207XwKmqlh_3hQjXV0vjNoOpPjTxn_Oelr4CgAA__9GN23B) over Operation Lone Star, the state-sponsored border security initiative he launched shortly after Biden took office. Homan, the acting director of Immigration and Customs Enforcement during Trump’s first term, vowed to "help Abbott finish the job he started,” saying the two were “already planning” how to coordinate their efforts. During Tuesday’s visit, Abbott and Homan [served Thanksgiving meals](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GO6yAURL8GOizuNQ64oHiNu7x2SwvMxUbCIcIoTv5-5fTbTTEzR-fnPt9dyumx_nc72faOZUaJSgAI1HNwKX9mxYP1MozAyYLuUUsNo-Kbpf4GKgYzeoQRBzdgXEZcFkLdkxoiT_Y6A0AN0Es1dC4aZczg3QIGpAlMSQqpldq1jRq93RHzp7yodkvZebZba8-D9f8YTgyn8zy7WN7qQedxFRhOV2Q4fafClxqoirXSKpz3pTXRyi62srsHrzY8z5RzOm6aKbnuLuUvpf2p_bL4GwAA__-8dFsJ) to National Guard troops stationed at Eagle Pass. “ _We’ve had people who were antagonistic to Texas securing the border. Now we have allies. It’s going to be Texas working collaboratively with the Trump administration_ ,” [Abbott said](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL_uozAQhJ_GdBt5jROTwsU1dLn2SmTwgq0zGNmbP9zTn0j_6z5ppG9G8-cxPFxMcVt-u5Usf-Y8KKk0IIIyg3cxHYNuvB2lv2NDFk2rjDR4102w4yyvaHByHZH0up2cd-3NyKm9K69G30R7yhCVQWylvl7c3Omuu45uwg5l54WW5CPncuFATB9X53TkF5XLlNcm2cC8V9H-EqoXqt-OPVc-I6H60yxUj3jySc8KG72rUD2X57rDmIunAtM_V4DzCiGvbgPO8Io1MnzbgEOs8Cb6CxwISlwCw_I8IG4wBVcWEqpvivX7O6YU680ILZfVxfQdyD8-9rLqfwAAAP__qdhuOA).
## Greenville Officer Killed In Line of Duty
Greenville Police Officer Cooper Dawson was [ambushed and fatally shot](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGutCAUhJ8GO4znLLtgQbGN3f7tXxqEo5IgbAB19-1vvP2tppjM5Mv3_zW-jA8-Lv_MRrp-5jRih4IDcJSjMz58R9E4PXWuh4Y0yBvKTkIvmlUL29-lUQ5nKaDHSVk0hD32D-tATNB4fZ0BoAS4deLemlkJpe6TsaCgU46JjpyvKbd1pUofU-bwTQfl1qatCXqt9V3Y7clwYDic59luJV4dw4Ei3wvDIdJ5hc1-I4ZDmmdvKfOylzfZysuaKt9SdObL6aDo48J95EsmiocP4dqYzJ9P2F-H3Zus3fv0IfjykEx0y2Z8-KWpf-o5NP4EAAD___D-aJo) Monday night while pursuing a suspect who fled from a traffic stop, marking the first line-of-duty death for the department in over 100 years. Despite critical injuries, Dawson returned fire and wounded the attacker, who remains hospitalized in critical condition. Dawson died early Tuesday morning at Medical City Plano, where dozens of officers from departments across North Texas [gathered to honor him](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOgzAQRL_GdEb2YgIULq6hy7VXosVew54cjLATkr8_Jf21M5p50vu5TlfkyNvyjTey5RnSBAqM1FpCN3nk-JpM5e2s_KArsrproFOdHky1WsK26XFuCVuHBpSDAWcNMIQwDNhcKrbvM62h07pRpq0x9Kbv2xmd7rXqvTCKPJd01GWlQk_MIb7Sg47apVsV7VrKnkXzJWAUMJ7nWbs5b3Tmdy9g_EwEjO9IwLinyI5kCoEdHTLf806uSN5-7wd5uRxE24NjJJnXlApvi4CxOqzfT46R86UTRi035Pjhl3-FPCz8BQAA__8q9GUy). The Texas Rangers are [leading the investigation](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAQRp8Gd1gwkGAXFLehy223tPgZ4pEwRDYbJ2-_yvZbf5-Ojs7Xbbl5KlTv__2Gtr9yW0CA5lJyMEvyVN6LHpINIs1yQCuNAiOMnPWwWqMQlMpXNc_BqBzDpKcpB40xBwnSD2Q_MCnBSKmEvow-fy6X4KOcpJgS0wIT9baPfcWOL3_k8m5P3MfYtqHYtffHwdQ_Bo6BO89zrCGmfH5mBq7ieTBwpUVfGLj7jlifVAryRysUkcdWM-0bbzlTxJ0fa-ucKi9UkbfM03d_M3DKiKvSwMANu02Pk0qh42qYFvfNU_mV6X_WeVr4CQAA__-6Kmdp) at the request of Greenville Police. The suspect's name has not been released. Dawson joined the Greenville Police Department in 2023 after nearly seven years of service in Garland. He is remembered as "a devoted husband, father, and a loving family man.”
## 5.7 Million Texans Traveling For Thanksgiving
Over 5.7 million Texans are expected to [travel 50 miles or more](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOtSAQBeCnwU7DjChSUPyN3f3bLc0oqJNFMEr03rffuP22JydfTs7Xa3gRB47Lf9q8ze85DShRlQAl6sERh8-gCmdH6QwU3oKuUUsNRhWrNW7UpqmpkaNRXimtJqpViw2O7dgCFWwfDAA1QC1VU9Hcqa5rRpqgA9k5oaR3nNNR5dVn_6ZzDp90-aOa0lYEu-a8n6L-J7AX2N_3XW2fkyLFnCKnpySwj_4-BfYhTRQE9vmgeeZJYE9H5in4J3voMq8Uv8-FL45LmQ-6fCjBmLrVRlb7uheHdfvNIfDZaqHkshGH3yX5z2suiz8BAAD__yaDZoc) before or on Thanksgiving Day, marking an increase of 1.3% from last year and 2.4% over 2019, the last year travel plans were unaffected by the COVID-19 pandemic. According to AAA Texas, some 5.3 million Texans are [expected to drive](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHOozAQhJ8GOiPWONgULq6hy7VXogWvwTpjR_YeSd7-lPR_OaPRp9H3577cMcSQ9t94kuWXz4vspRIAQurFYYjvRbXOrr2boCULepC61zCp9rBGrWr0xt1GDyPpadQIw-qAxslrN0xtsB8YgNQAQ69uHXqjjLmtuIGB3rhG9eQC59LxQUwvrD6-80Wl2_LZRnswP5rhVyPnRs78EojYhUep2fMTC31WjZwTPWsjZ0QUX4YotOXiRPp3rlRE9t86VYHJCTyphO2TKrHgLLjgRVHwEargA9PfuocrpL0t1j2eIcZQR92ofj8xxO8v_lHUZeX_AAAA___j_W4A) for the holiday, while another 315,000 are expected to take a flight, and 129,000 plan to catch a train, bus, or boat. The [average price for gas](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z81qhDAUxfGnSXYjuTfRxEUWheJuuiq0O7nmQwOxignT8e2L3c_2cPjB_-s-3inl9DN_0BpsfcZtRIHqBnBDPXpK-RwV93YSvgceLGiJWmjoFV-sUQAGsJvQiahcbPu-NSQ6j9jJSRue7IUBoAaQQrUNRaOMaSdyYEAYz5QIPtXtaOoSanhSifncHuFo3LbybJda98LkG8OB4TBT2Y_kQmmI6HpcsxxKpRqYfP_85of1-2_KOZVOMyXmlVL-p-rLtofFvwAAAP__jXJPKw) in Texas is $2.63, slightly lower than last year’s average of $2.71 and well below this year’s national average of $3.06. If you’re trying to avoid traffic, Thanksgiving Day is the [best time to travel](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAUhJ8Gd1j8xZCC4jbuctstrWM42CjEREBs5-1XSb_lSKOZT9_PbbpBTHFb_sMDbTtDngQTinJOhZ48xPSeVOftzPyVd2i5lkIzza-qW22YvXRmuEj0gxwEk1fg6IzjRjMTZtVF-xnjXGjOJVOXHoJRxlxmcNxwZjxRDH1sufRtxYYn1JDeecfSu_zokl1be1Yi_xExEjEex9GHfGp41Ra3T4WIccOjEjEWdLl4OheEe9wW2lbY7nWJ-zcU2DHRA_FOAYB-n2jIJ9U0ZPeqXbH-ecSUYh00UWx5QExfhvanlN2K3wAAAP__jU9mYg) to your destination, and Sunday afternoon is one of the worst times to drive home.

On this day in 1837, the at the home of Sumner Bacon, who in 1829 became the first resident Protestant evangelist to maintain a continuous ministry in Texas. Have you ever had raw milk? Do you think it should be sold in grocery stores? Texas Agriculture Commissioner Sid Miller does! Check out , and let us know what you think in today's poll! Today's sponsor is with their Magnesium Breakthrough supplements to help improve your health. Abilene ☁️ 82/50° | Amarillo ☁️ 58/37° | Austin ☁️ 81/56° | Brownsville 🌥️ 86/65° | Corpus Christi 🌥️ 85/61° | DFW ⛅ 80/53° | El Paso ☁️ 77/51° | Houston ☁️ 81/60° | Lubbock ☁️ 77/46° | San Antonio ☁️ 78/57° | Texarkana ☁️ 75/47° | Homan Visits Border With Abbott President-elect Donald Trump's "border czar," Tom Homan, with Governor Greg Abbott on Tuesday, promising improved border security and mass deportations in response to what he called a "mass illegal immigration crisis." Earlier this week, Abbott praised Homan as the "right guy" to tackle the challenge, emphasizing that he looks forward to having an ally in the federal government. Abbott has over Operation Lone Star, the state-sponsored border security initiative he launched shortly after Biden took office. Homan, the acting director of Immigration and Customs Enforcement during Trump’s first term, vowed to "help Abbott finish the job he started,” saying the two were “already planning” how to coordinate their efforts. During Tuesday’s visit, Abbott and Homan to National Guard troops stationed at Eagle Pass. “ We’ve had people who were antagonistic to Texas securing the border. Now we have allies. It’s going to be Texas working collaboratively with the Trump administration ,” . Greenville Officer Killed In Line of Duty Greenville Police Officer Cooper Dawson was Monday night while pursuing a suspect who fled from a traffic stop, marking the first line-of-duty death for the department in over 100 years. Despite critical injuries, Dawson returned fire and wounded the attacker, who remains hospitalized in critical condition. Dawson died early Tuesday morning at Medical City Plano, where dozens of officers from departments across North Texas . The Texas Rangers are at the request of Greenville Police. The suspect's name has not been released. Dawson joined the Greenville Police Department in 2023 after nearly seven years of service in Garland. He is remembered as "a devoted husband, father, and a loving family man.” 5.7 Million Texans Traveling For Thanksgiving Over 5.7 million Texans are expected to before or on Thanksgiving Day, marking an increase of 1.3% from last year and 2.4% over 2019, the last year travel plans were unaffected by the COVID-19 pandemic. According to AAA Texas, some 5.3 million Texans are for the holiday, while another 315,000 are expected to take a flight, and 129,000 plan to catch a train, bus, or boat. The in Texas is $2.63, slightly lower than last year’s average of $2.71 and well below this year’s national average of $3.06. If you’re trying to avoid traffic, Thanksgiving Day is the to your destination, and Sunday afternoon is one of the worst times to drive home. Greg Abbott said hospitals that don’t ask patients about their citizenship status risk losing their federal funding. Abbott was reacting to viral comments by a Texas doctor who said patients don’t have to disclose their status to hospital staff. () ➤ San Antonio: The Raul Jimenez Thanksgiving Dinner at the Henry B. González Convention Center is the largest free Thanksgiving dinner in the country. Nearly 5,000 volunteers are preparing to serve up to 25,000 people tomorrow. () ➤ Houston: A mounted patrol officer’s horse was killed after it got loose and was hit by a truck. () ➤ El Paso: The county is closing its Migrant Support Services Center at the end of December amid uncertainty about funding for continued operations from the incoming Trump administration. () ➤ Bedford: Marcus and Joni Lamb, founders of Christian TV network Daystar, have been accused of covering up an employee’s sexual abuse of their granddaughter. The Lambs’ son Jonathan and his wife left the network, claiming that allegations were dismissed. () ➤ Houston: The Harris County Sports & Convention Corporation approved $35 million to renovate NRG Stadium. The upgrades include a new roof, new video boards, an updated sound system, and replacing the sliding ramp doors. President-elect Donald Trump announced plans [to impose new tariffs](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvwyAQBeBfgzcsOLBJB4Yu3tK1o3WBI74KQ2TTuPn3lbt3e9InPT29z-t8Rc5c7h-4km-pzqDASq0luDki59dsu-gTEZDpyGtnwCmn3dgtPl5UiGYIQ7rcTNAuGLLGJTUgBaTb0LE_27QGp7WBwfajGfFNabJqUIQ2CKsocqtb_1W5tIVSftUnbX2oa5f90tpjF-ZdwCRgOo6jD7e90LGfLmA6o4Cpbd_rQzbcOKVd1iJX-uFQZcCCESWWKMPCBU9KvO1NRnxJLrKmxIEETN3m4-PgnHkfnbDqviLnvxHtv1OeHn4DAAD__14RZYo) on Mexico and Canada upon taking office, aiming to combat illegal immigration and drug trafficking.

# Wednesday, November 27, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1895, [Alfred Nobel](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0jzGPhCAUhH8NdBp4PGUtKK6x22uvNBw8lAuKQbJm79df3PKS7Wa-Yibf132625jiNn_alUwNeQIB2EjZgJ68jek5IfcmEAEpTkZqBVpoqXu-GB1unQhuQBwUDdINZHVAe-u8QNfZnkdzrUkJWkoFHba96u0gJKHoBFl0DAX5WHNpf3Lc6kIhPfODSuvyypNZat0Ppj4YjAzG8zzbLX9T2kv8pTaXmcFoUyjkmxf_V4_mjOmCvBi_XzkevWYo5tXG9Lqo75QfBv4CAAD__9J6WJk) signed his third and final will, which caused controversy because he left much of his fortune to establish the Nobel Prize. In today’s edition, we explore how the USPS plans to deliver an estimated 800 million packages this holiday season. Plus, we share a [method to manage the clutter](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GO6yAQAL8GOlvLgiEUFK9xl9deaRFYG07YRDaJ5b8_5frrRzOar_t097nkbfnvV3JtrhMCqk6IDs0UfS7XpHh0MxGS5OSEkWjACKN5coasvVkdIFgIVkI0cVAoiFCrW5wNz-5jEwKNEBIH1WupvQVBCgYgrwJTQDG3uvffNW8t0Vyu-qa9D3XlxaXWngeT_xiODMfzPPvwejwu31Jd6cMwHEPy9egihfJqjfa8Ld1KLdXY3QAUiGHgu4vPM5eSD22YgmX1ufwW2l_Hb4c_AQAA__8Yg1de) that often comes with the surge in holiday deliveries. Today's sponsor is [Public Rec](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuO2zAURL-G6mTwJTIuWAQw1DltSuGKvLJvwodAUTb09wst3G47ZzA4mL_36Q4UKT_-QELXljJJLnUvRC_tFIDiMekuuAVRourQCauk5VZY0z2dsWa5agzBD0H8kspzczXezAB2kAvwjty5JoS0Qig56ItRBq5coOYDR9CeaY6BWqmXf4Vye-ISj_LCevElddE9W1s3pn4zOTI5rvscyVf0J2Vy9CVG9I1K3pgc5wj-f79UCnD0_pix9qnkAAdT497StJW9emTqlvG9RWwNK5PmJAkD7YmpG2VfMWFuEPszhE_BQ1qBHpmp28evqy6sb4qRNmOZ5o8EFL-l208nvpz8CgAA__9rDXeg). ## Trump Plans Tariffs on Mexico, Canada
President-elect Donald Trump announced plans [to impose new tariffs](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvwyAQBeBfgzcsOLBJB4Yu3tK1o3WBI74KQ2TTuPn3lbt3e9InPT29z-t8Rc5c7h-4km-pzqDASq0luDki59dsu-gTEZDpyGtnwCmn3dgtPl5UiGYIQ7rcTNAuGLLGJTUgBaTb0LE_27QGp7WBwfajGfFNabJqUIQ2CKsocqtb_1W5tIVSftUnbX2oa5f90tpjF-ZdwCRgOo6jD7e90LGfLmA6o4Cpbd_rQzbcOKVd1iJX-uFQZcCCESWWKMPCBU9KvO1NRnxJLrKmxIEETN3m4-PgnHkfnbDqviLnvxHtv1OeHn4DAAD__14RZYo) on Mexico and Canada upon taking office, aiming to combat illegal immigration and drug trafficking. Trump proposed [a possible 25% tax](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uxCAQBp_G7jjBsoa4oEhz3aVNaa3xct4I_wiTu9zbR06f8tMnjUbzeRtuJFnW-wctHGraBtCAyhgFfphI8mvAdgqJGdi2HIy34LU33rVzcPw2orEO2SDAmCJGtohMXcLourGVcNKMAW-MhQ4vzjrqtWHUnWbC2KDmSepWLl-brHXmlF_bg8slbkubw1zrfjT2vYFrA1faV34e53WOUiVmbuBay_eyq0pFUjpUpJUmUgv_SNxUnGUl1fVge0psQFsbqe-j66InGFkzJj21JUz7U3KWw_kG9X0hyX8K9b8kjwC_AQAA__9I92HT) on all products entering the U.S. from Canada and Mexico as well as a long-promised 10% tariff on goods from China as part of his first batch of executive orders. Critics [pushed back against new tariffs](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OozAUhZ8GuotsYzBbuEhDtUm7JbrB18Eb_0S2CZO3HzH9VEc6R_p09P27Lld03sXHDQPpatMimJDAOQi1GHT-s8jWaEskqG9Jc9ULxRRXY7vpVeGkRrxzOfLpjquS1vTI1NQj4qCm1umTxrlQnPdikN3Yj_iHcZJsYIRybSQj42rK3f_kYt3I-k96U-7WFFqvt1pfpekvjZgbMR_H0YUSz60RM0XYSyPmkCJ9zsT8pHo2uNcU8EkZyoaZClj0HrBAzXt4Qd0yYaVYQAxQMTtrIUUI9OXWBBgNrBjR4EnKcLnw_fb-O7RZm9fhvHdlVI1kj4DO_9ysv2l7a_EdAAD__wKScEM), citing possible economic harm as shares of automakers General Motors and Stellantis fell Tuesday morning following Trump’s announcement. Overall, [investors seemed comfortable](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z71urDAUBOCnsTuj4-O_vYWL29Bt2pTI4MPirMEIHBBvH5E-3UgjfaP5fHbPkHJaXh9hJl_H0iGgFlIKdF0MKV-d5tGPREiKk5dOoQMnneWTH7W1xpALCEbD2EPsI6J5wAOcQkU8-VuTEp2UCo1urLLhH0jSYICCHpgGiqmWrfkqaakTjfkqB23NUGae_VTrujP1n2HLsD3PsxmWfrhLhu1NM2ylvLNh2O61DG8xh-1NVdQSwyVyOkh8rzFU2pupzplvPq5nyjnt1jENrzmk_LtW_3p_ePwJAAD__0L3WcI) with the prospects of tariffs, as stocks rose Tuesday, with the S&P 500 and Dow Jones Industrial Average reaching new highs.
## Storms to Impact Thanksgiving Travel
Powerful [winter storms are forecast](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOszAQhJ8GOiN7MWwoXPxNuvztlcjBa9g7Y0fYii9vf-JSXzmj0czo-7jNN8uB4_rf7mSKTzNI0EIpATg7y-E169YZTwTUt2QU9oASFY7tZvAiL24aBkS4Kz_a3qv7NF7cAssCOGHL5mxTClCpHgbdjf1oJ6lIy0GS1UujJTku6eg-E8eykQ-v9KSjW9LeBrOV8shN_6-BawPXWmvn03clW7Z35DTfSkSquYFr2Wz8yis_Oa6icix0iFzSsYscUxXnnfYw7lE5BM4jNlquu-XwO1j-AvA08BMAAP__2e9d4g) to disrupt Thanksgiving travel across the U.S., bringing rain and mountain snow to the West and a mix of rain, freezing rain, and snow to the East. A developing [low-pressure system](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFutDAQBOCnMZ1P3rUPQ-Hib-jub1OiBa9hEx8gcDjd20ekz7SfNBrNx6N_kGRZpv_05FDS2qNBpwE0-j6S5HfvqhgSM7KtOIC36I0HX1dz4JYHoDH6ZE0aAEZEMhDHpmkaGEZXSbjaANADWLy7W21rag2wM3fD5EblDEcp6377XGUpM6f8Xk_eb-P6rHKYS9kOZf8p7BR2tC38Oi5S2GU5WWFXZlq-jklOWSY9r1kivXXZ6eSsX0xl5l1_b5EKHwqtuQKt1bUzXsc2tpqGNOjkIUVX08XVHuL2kpzlqL1yZnqS5N895a9_zoA_AQAA__-7tWXE) is expected to cause additional travel challenges on the East Coast, affecting Thanksgiving and Black Friday plans. Rain and snow are predicted to span from the Southeast to northern New Hampshire and Maine. More than 2,000 flights [have already been delayed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGP3CAQhX-N3Y0FA2s2BUWa7S5tyhVnBkOCwYI5W_73kdNfMxrpe_qk935_vD9cyqmsv9xGlkN9o0ANUgKat3cpX289ehuIkNRIVhqFRhhp5jFaXOZACj-N8SHMD1z009NTyk-vwhzkMiZ726REI6XCh55mNbsfQpIWD0FOL4MW5BPXNv2pqXCkkK96UJuWuo3ZRua9D-rngK8BX-d5TpeLtd50wFehsw_4yumgm6bC1KCXekLn2rYOoTZaXOf7AY6u_O1rOlJZ4Wv3jqlDvi_DbQLX4STHke5sI8dUOnAFn3r72hlizcm7C7i5gzJIo4R-igdOkbc8Nuv3M-Wc-mwGLdbNpfy_BX-36mHxXwAAAP__aYd-Iw) due to weather concerns, with nearly 100 flights canceled.
## Walmart Pulls Back on DEI Policies
Walmart announced Monday it’s [scaling back its diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) policies](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFuhDAQBNCvMZ2RvTZYV7hIQ3dpUyJjlmMjg5G9Ad3fR6RPN9KTRqP5eo7PQIn212fY0POSR1BgpdYS3DgHSu_RNrNfEAFNg147A0457fpm9Ytxk-sBHhi1tvbR2ckpZaMzfZgn1zXk7zatwWltoLNtb_rwUBqt6hQGG4VVOBPn0n5n2nnFJb3ziaWNeWuSX5mPKsyHgEHAcF1XG6e641VvFzDc8YaQtlBYzkjyyIkiYZUpMFaWE71kzOXIJTDlXca8VyxnYDpRhsh0UuUqj4K1_hQUMDTFz8dFKVHtnbDqtQVKf4P4v4NOD78BAAD__7Dnans), becoming the largest U.S. corporation to retreat from such programs. The retail giant, which employs 1.6 million workers in the U.S., will end its $100 million racial equity center commitment, pull out of a major LGBTQ+ workplace index, and remove race and gender considerations from supplier contracts. The decision comes as corporate DEI programs face increased scrutiny following the Supreme Court's 2023 ruling that ended affirmative action in college admissions. This ruling has prompted conservative groups to file legal challenges [targeting workplace diversity initiatives](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFyszAQhJ8GOjE6ISO7UPE37vy3KZkDnfAlB_JIsonfPkP61PvN7s73cRtvyMLb8h9X8jWm0WhjFYAybgzI8h5tG3wkMtS35MH1xmkHbmjv3pwveqJ4BkB90TifDWBEDT3q3lGAlv3RBmAcQG9Othv6AS8ayOqTJrRzYzUFril3n4m3eqco7_Si3M1pbcXfa32Upv_XmGtjrvu-dzF9T8_CG5VyMI25Ckcq9S10ECgr5qpyEilqwvlLBWL1SMIzU1ETzWnlbVGClUpVz6Ii51Ud42rJaT-ymmkLbfbhsbMIl8E1Vi8rsvy-qn9ZennzEwAA__9XsmzB). Walmart joins [other major companies](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFu5CAURb_G7rB4DwbsgmIbd7PtlhY2jzEbMBMgY83fR06f7kpHOro6_-7L3YYYjsdfm8g0nxfkKBkAQ704G-J7kb0znghJ9GRAC9Rcg1b9bpSYRjnhBOPo7WqF4k5P8qYlIHA5-j6YywaAGkDgTQ5KKDtxIMlvnKzcOsnJhZbL8D-Ho-3k4zu_qAxbTn00e2vP2ok_Hc4dzud5DtuxbhfscL7UHc4A11YXtzHZ0tjzK8bKVrt9sHwwR4GR97m0ygql_KLKak7E4vponyxR2XZ7uFCJDXtLsS_GPc8QY6hKd5I_kg3x50_7rc_L4HcAAAD___kRZgI), including Ford, Lowe’s, Tractor Supply, and Harley-Davidson, in scaling back DEI efforts in recent months.

Critics , citing possible economic harm as shares of automakers General Motors and Stellantis fell Tuesday morning following Trump’s announcement. Overall, with the prospects of tariffs, as stocks rose Tuesday, with the S&P 500 and Dow Jones Industrial Average reaching new highs. Storms to Impact Thanksgiving Travel Powerful to disrupt Thanksgiving travel across the U.S., bringing rain and mountain snow to the West and a mix of rain, freezing rain, and snow to the East. A developing is expected to cause additional travel challenges on the East Coast, affecting Thanksgiving and Black Friday plans. Rain and snow are predicted to span from the Southeast to northern New Hampshire and Maine. More than 2,000 flights due to weather concerns, with nearly 100 flights canceled. Walmart Pulls Back on DEI Policies Walmart announced Monday it’s , becoming the largest U.S. corporation to retreat from such programs. The retail giant, which employs 1.6 million workers in the U.S., will end its $100 million racial equity center commitment, pull out of a major LGBTQ+ workplace index, and remove race and gender considerations from supplier contracts. The decision comes as corporate DEI programs face increased scrutiny following the Supreme Court's 2023 ruling that ended affirmative action in college admissions. This ruling has prompted conservative groups to file legal challenges . Walmart joins , including Ford, Lowe’s, Tractor Supply, and Harley-Davidson, in scaling back DEI efforts in recent months. | ➤ Israel and Hezbollah agreed Tuesday to a permanent ceasefire, brokered by France and the U.S., set to take effect today at 4 a.m. local time. body:

Dear Peter,

This Thanksgiving, let's all give thanks for living in the freest nation, where our blessings bring prosperity that drives innovation and liberty worldwide; where our Constitution upholds the freedom to express ideas and shape our future; and where our right to vote empowers us to choose leaders and unite for a better tomorrow. The biggest thank you is to everyone who supports our mission through learning, volunteering, and donating. Your participation is the reason we are succeeding. Wishing you a joyful Thanksgiving, filled with loved ones and cherished moments.
