name: History Facts
subject: The strange way Hemingway wrote
body:
Every writer has their own routine, and it’s little surprise that Ernest Hemingway’s was as idiosyncratic as he was. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68c78ayhfyjdr7kbf9p9llmfka4ye2q3zzkahvkg93ua5omsezm5nzw9uzaw9n1ipaiaxdwwpst1cfk3fdcvgdvgk9mvxa9v1d2sux89vavzbhiykqhuc1ypcx7mzf4ela06z9a3ulgma7epw&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snlz6w&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Ernest Hemingway preferred to write standing up.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snlz6w&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Famous Figures](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snlz6w&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snlz6w&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| E very writer has their own routine, and it’s little surprise that Ernest Hemingway’s was as idiosyncratic as he was. The scribe behind _A Farewell to Arms_ and _The Sun Also Rises_ preferred to write in the morning, and did so standing up. This was “a working habit he has had from the beginning,” [according to](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snlz6w&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) _The_ _Paris Review_ , and he might have picked up the habit from his editor, Maxwell Perkins. Though Hemingway preferred pencil, he turned to a tape recorder when he needed to get something down especially quickly, such as dialogue: “When the people are talking, I can hardly write it fast enough or keep up with it,” he [told](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snlz6w&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) _The New Yorker_ in 1950.
---
That was usually the second phase of his process. The first was often a rush marked by “paucity of punctuation, very few capitals, and often the period marked with an x,” as well as a daily word count, which _The_ _Paris Review_ marked as ranging from 450 on a slow day to 1,250 on an especially productive one. (These were usually followed by a full day of fishing, one of the writer’s lifelong pastimes.) That process yielded seven novels, two books of nonfiction, and six short story collections throughout Hemingway’s life, with several other works published posthumously. He won the Pulitzer Prize for fiction for _The Old Man and the Sea_ in 1953 and the Nobel Prize in literature the following year, the latter for “his mastery of the art of narrative, most recently demonstrated in _The Old Man and the Sea_ , and for the influence that he has exerted on contemporary style.”
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snlz6w&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snlz6w&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

| | | Did you know?
---|---|---
## Hemingway survived two plane crashes in two days.
While flying over the Murchison Falls in Uganda in 1954, Hemingway and his then-wife, Mary Welsh Hemingway, [crashed](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snlz6w&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) inside a small plane that left them on the crocodile-infested shore of the Nile. Many newspapers inaccurately reported them dead, but they were fine after camping overnight with some beer and whiskey to help pass the time. The ordeal didn’t end there, though: Their rescue plane’s fuel tank exploded the next day, crashing that aircraft as well. Hemingway suffered a fractured skull and traumatic brain injury, and his lingering injuries prevented him from traveling to Stockholm, Sweden, in order to accept his Nobel Prize. Instead, he penned a speech in which he said that a writer “does his work alone and if he is a good enough writer he must face eternity, or the lack of it, each day.”

clean_body: Every writer has their own routine, and it’s little surprise that Ernest Hemingway’s was as idiosyncratic as he was. | E very writer has their own routine, and it’s little surprise that Ernest Hemingway’s was as idiosyncratic as he was. The scribe behind A Farewell to Arms and The Sun Also Rises preferred to write in the morning, and did so standing up. This was “a working habit he has had from the beginning,” The Paris Review , and he might have picked up the habit from his editor, Maxwell Perkins. Though Hemingway preferred pencil, he turned to a tape recorder when he needed to get something down especially quickly, such as dialogue: “When the people are talking, I can hardly write it fast enough or keep up with it,” he The New Yorker in 1950. That was usually the second phase of his process. The first was often a rush marked by “paucity of punctuation, very few capitals, and often the period marked with an x,” as well as a daily word count, which The Paris Review marked as ranging from 450 on a slow day to 1,250 on an especially productive one. (These were usually followed by a full day of fishing, one of the writer’s lifelong pastimes.) That process yielded seven novels, two books of nonfiction, and six short story collections throughout Hemingway’s life, with several other works published posthumously. He won the Pulitzer Prize for fiction for The Old Man and the Sea in 1953 and the Nobel Prize in literature the following year, the latter for “his mastery of the art of narrative, most recently demonstrated in The Old Man and the Sea , and for the influence that he has exerted on contemporary style.” | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Unfinished works left by Hemingway when he died 4 | | Number of times Hemingway rewrote the last page of A Farewell to Arms 39 | Number of times Hemingway rewrote the last page of A Farewell to Arms 39 | | Polydactyl cats living at the Hemingway Home and Museum ~60 | | Times Hemingway was married 4 | Times Hemingway was married 4 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Hemingway survived two plane crashes in two days. While flying over the Murchison Falls in Uganda in 1954, Hemingway and his then-wife, Mary Welsh Hemingway, inside a small plane that left them on the crocodile-infested shore of the Nile. Many newspapers inaccurately reported them dead, but they were fine after camping overnight with some beer and whiskey to help pass the time. The ordeal didn’t end there, though: Their rescue plane’s fuel tank exploded the next day, crashing that aircraft as well. Hemingway suffered a fractured skull and traumatic brain injury, and his lingering injuries prevented him from traveling to Stockholm, Sweden, in order to accept his Nobel Prize. Instead, he penned a speech in which he said that a writer “does his work alone and if he is a good enough writer he must face eternity, or the lack of it, each day.” Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | Recommended Reading | | | ---|---|--- | | | ---|---|--- | | | ---|--- | ---|--- A daily digest of history's most fascinating happenings. | Want to unsubscribe? | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- Copyright © 2024 History Facts. subject: Thankful for YOU and the Movement You’ve Helped Build
body:

and your checking account.

Imagine all of your money being seized.

_That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me._

I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask
questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH...

As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest
legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State —

name: Conservative Direct on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
I’d like to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom are very similar. | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=55f722a9137c4dd0966f3bf311bfca0f&_t=_KTm6BaVFKp30OpK7IJSYRnath9THPUilqSYwyiXjXvC8BLkR82U4AmIrnCQu1J9kh0jtqfgflbMiCzpuMGRlPKdU-W-llH_LNtZOoMDaDDn_K7sFTkJmjv1M5wg9cO0)_
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=55f722a9137c4dd0966f3bf311bfca0f&_e=Wp_DMXZsZSz00oqHI9Js2ecw5QGgUZKQ2G5AItdqbjL_Vl00HFjxsok_0DpbgSX06z7JoAQTjYFAUgWuANvlz8KQzQ4EWjRcXBmufuLpOTca-qtCBFcgjUJ2rBjN08AagfcANs6vXmZWEyYzAuprPVuj3fKJElQySrEQUPsceQesCdl1J4sr7XuTFUfIR2MqaoEFStuNjacPbmIlTASGB3XeKkECHEVZ3q-_q3bv1Vm_4gBHS-4AkS9De72cXhvthInEL-oApZZJobrFiaW7yA_0ujlkdkUEjGE-HwAPjAtDZxhPRUvvL35w8tQxDs12HbgzpScBI73c_hyztowXAW_lrenUX9_6VzW-w8OjbBoOQ3Ni5HW20dNjij67hd1IOkK5NhhrJf5bH8DmFENclA%3D%3D)
---
| | Good day, fellow American. I'd like to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom are very similar. Both were born in the late 1990s. Both had a very similar upbringing, raised in a two-parent home in a suburban neighborhood. Both went to public elementary and high schools, and both went to college and now have a four-year degree. In most respects, these young women are nearly identical--same background, grew up at the same time, and even had the same tastes in music and books. BUT, there was one significant difference. And that difference is vital to preserving liberty in America. The first young lady learned false narratives about American history in her K-12 education but especially at college. Her teachers and professors cherry-picked "facts" to fit an ideological (and frankly anti-American) agenda. She was taught political correctness and viewed our history through a lens of race, gender, and class. Her teachers gave this young woman a false and dishonest narrative about our nation's history--a narrative that portrays America as essentially and irredeemably unjust. Absent any opposing viewpoints, she believed it and now repeats these misrepresentations daily to anyone who will listen--echoing what she learned in school. And when she's challenged, she dismisses this criticism (and those who hold these viewpoints) as **invalid** , **hateful** , and even **racist**. Maybe you know someone like her. If so, I'm not surprised--I do too. What about the other young lady? Well, she received a complete and unbiased view of our nation's history. At her schools, especially her college, she received an education that covered the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively. She understands the principles and meaning of the Constitution because she has read and understands the writings of Jefferson, Hamilton, and Lincoln, along with many other primary sources. Her studies allowed her to recognize that America is not a place of "oppression" and "injustice" but an **exceptional nation worth defending**. This young lady is an **_informed citizen_**. She will never be one to go along with the crowd on any issue, and she urges others to consider policies and political debates from a constitutional perspective. **I ask you, which of these young women would YOU prefer in a position of leadership? ** You can tell us your preference by completing Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the State of American Education **using this secure link: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/informed-citizen-survey/**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=55f722a9137c4dd0966f3bf311bfca0f&_e=Wp_DMXZsZSz00oqHI9Js2ecw5QGgUZKQ2G5AItdqbjL_Vl00HFjxsok_0DpbgSX06z7JoAQTjYFAUgWuANvlz8KQzQ4EWjRcXBmufuLpOTca-qtCBFcgjUJ2rBjN08AagfcANs6vXmZWEyYzAuprPVuj3fKJElQySrEQUPsceQesCdl1J4sr7XuTFUfIR2MqaoEFStuNjacPbmIlTASGB3XeKkECHEVZ3q-_q3bv1VnjsEnwiqKqDsdKqyfUIbyis_Q2Ol0BCq6vF48DFibamRB1nuHss3OEauNw6_Ksbdk1sZSw2G-4dYih6pi6hzUfq5KIriaL0SWG6f04rnzus78qrwD7fql3mZdgJ96XAG90isoj2gMNMePjx9EEBgHVe27FuoqoJTRrM8S7DMakMA%3D%3D) This survey lets you share your views about the state of our country and how to change course before it's too late. By participating, you will give us a glimpse into the "state of knowledge" in your community that can only come from the local level. The survey is part of our **CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS. ** The goal of this new campaign we're leading is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand: WHAT the Constitution says; HOW it relates to current issues and events; and WHY we must preserve constitutional principles if liberty is to endure. If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people whom our education system failed. These are young people that "educators" either deliberately deceived or who just didn't receive a proper understanding of American history in school. **You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable about the principles of liberty and limited government. ** That's because we're seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to 10,000,000 Americans in the coming year, and this initiative starts with you--YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what's best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the **[National Survey on the State of American Education](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=55f722a9137c4dd0966f3bf311bfca0f&_e=Wp_DMXZsZSz00oqHI9Js2ecw5QGgUZKQ2G5AItdqbjL_Vl00HFjxsok_0DpbgSX06z7JoAQTjYFAUgWuANvlz8KQzQ4EWjRcXBmufuLpOTca-qtCBFcgjUJ2rBjN08AagfcANs6vXmZWEyYzAuprPVuj3fKJElQySrEQUPsceQesCdl1J4sr7XuTFUfIR2MqaoEFStuNjacPbmIlTASGB3XeKkECHEVZ3q-_q3bv1VnuelDkiY98jmZI5HjrvbRGfWHiE1ZDyoHj4BWJY2924UVLYr-qYjU9JfI2NwOKMIgJbJXvwpApZX8zfuFmoGwVV5-1aCZXFUPOnqgPbaobbUwTuRLadzxidNMRDbPN4Ez6LQYMYMpRP8Iitv_w3xBgIssIubCybJlOA_9VMt53qw%3D%3D) **today. Thank you for reading my email, and I hope you have a wonderful day. For our children, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

clean_body: I’d like to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom are very similar. | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | | | Good day, fellow American. I'd like to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom are very similar. Both were born in the late 1990s. Both had a very similar upbringing, raised in a two-parent home in a suburban neighborhood. Both went to public elementary and high schools, and both went to college and now have a four-year degree. In most respects, these young women are nearly identical--same background, grew up at the same time, and even had the same tastes in music and books. BUT, there was one significant difference. And that difference is vital to preserving liberty in America. The first young lady learned false narratives about American history in her K-12 education but especially at college. Her teachers and professors cherry-picked "facts" to fit an ideological (and frankly anti-American) agenda. She was taught political correctness and viewed our history through a lens of race, gender, and class. Her teachers gave this young woman a false and dishonest narrative about our nation's history--a narrative that portrays America as essentially and irredeemably unjust. Absent any opposing viewpoints, she believed it and now repeats these misrepresentations daily to anyone who will listen--echoing what she learned in school. And when she's challenged, she dismisses this criticism (and those who hold these viewpoints) as invalid , hateful , and even racist. Maybe you know someone like her. If so, I'm not surprised--I do too. What about the other young lady? Well, she received a complete and unbiased view of our nation's history. At her schools, especially her college, she received an education that covered the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively. She understands the principles and meaning of the Constitution because she has read and understands the writings of Jefferson, Hamilton, and Lincoln, along with many other primary sources. Her studies allowed her to recognize that America is not a place of "oppression" and "injustice" but an exceptional nation worth defending. This young lady is an informed citizen. She will never be one to go along with the crowd on any issue, and she urges others to consider policies and political debates from a constitutional perspective. I ask you, which of these young women would YOU prefer in a position of leadership? You can tell us your preference by completing Hillsdale College's National Survey on the State of American Education using this secure link: This survey lets you share your views about the state of our country and how to change course before it's too late. By participating, you will give us a glimpse into the "state of knowledge" in your community that can only come from the local level. The survey is part of our CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS. The goal of this new campaign we're leading is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand: WHAT the Constitution says; HOW it relates to current issues and events; and WHY we must preserve constitutional principles if liberty is to endure. If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people whom our education system failed. These are young people that "educators" either deliberately deceived or who just didn't receive a proper understanding of American history in school. You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable about the principles of liberty and limited government. That's because we're seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to 10,000,000 Americans in the coming year, and this initiative starts with you--YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what's best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the today. name: Newt Gingrich
subject: Official Conservative Principles Project
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Please complete the Official NRSC Conservative Principles Project Document today.

Friend,

Please see the **[Official NRSC Conservative Principles Project](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zhjmg04hd9ooa98gse57lcrp4913b666ro9j6om8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj60ob4clh2bs)** compiled in coordination with Mike Alm, who heads the NRSC's digital operations.

We wanted to put together this document to get at the heart of what the supporters who supported, funded, and elected this new Senate majority most want to see from our Republican trifecta Government.

A Republican trifecta in Washington, D.C., doesn't come around often, so we can't waste this critical opportunity to secure lasting victories for our shared values and conservative principles.

**[Please complete our Official NRSC Conservative Principles Project Document today to let us know what you find to be the most critical issues for President Trump and Senate Republicans to solve as soon as possible.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zbhciam4q4mv374a99a0gftq8fuqp1ch9r0ljs20_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj60ob4clh2bs)**

We can't let a handful of radical Democrats ruin our country for future generations. We are focused on maximizing this new majority and need your help to guide Senate Republicans to act on the most pressing issues facing our country.

body:

Friend – President Trump just won the most decisive **landslide victory** this country has seen in **decades**. The people have spoken, and they want action—real action.
That’s why I’m pushing __**[the Official January 6th Pardon Petition](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze6mm52pq5ghi09g0m9le11v4inirs7rev3ntmb0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj60ob4clh2bs)**__ to the frontlines, demanding a full pardon for every patriotic American who stood up on that historic day—prosecuted by a corrupt DOJ hellbent on silencing us, and crushing the people it should be working for under the weight of a filthy, weaponized government.
[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztvaiqat9eclpiav185uo0khg86lnmnhc0a06psg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj60ob4clh2bs)
On January 6th, 2021, thousands of patriotic Americans gathered at the United States Capitol – __a building they own__ – to _**peacefully, and patriotically**_ protest discrepancies in an Election...
Since then, they’ve had their rights and dignities stripped: _**and they deserve better.**_
This isn’t just a petition; it’s a rallying cry. Every true American who believes in freedom, faith, and a country worth fighting for needs to put their name on this.
Friend — Sign NOW and show the deep state we won’t back down. This is our moment to stand together and reclaim what’s ours.
Will you answer the call? _**_[Add your name now](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1p9ijgmpcfrb69t5395vcg883dmd3p7oksqsbs0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj60ob4clh2bs)_**_** _._**

subject: America doesn’t have to be kept in the dark, you know
body:
The media lied about the state of the presidential race all the way up to election day.

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9553l0lmqd4oaioaopu35s3c67smnl0gf394hn0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj60ob4clh2bs)
---
Friend,The media lied about the state of the presidential race all the way up to election day.But they couldn't hide the truth as the avalanche of support for Donald Trump rolled in on November 5. **What if you could get the truth about what 's _really_ happening in America, unfiltered and with a side of humor?** [**You can - especially if you subscribe to ****_Not the Bee_****today as a premium member today.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztnn5r6g2saecu39vvsdpo1e3ice080ppujuv6ko_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj60ob4clh2bs)****

[ Subscribe to _Not The Bee_ Today](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcloi9hekiftrmt1h0d0eub4o87kc7ck0q4o73go_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj60ob4clh2bs)
---
Look, Friend. Trump won. The media lied. And then their credibility died - for good. **But**** _Not the Bee_****knew before November what was really happening. Just take a look at some of our pre-election headlines** :
---
_" Trump listened to our advice and released this brutal attack ad on Kamala Harris for her radicalism."_ _" Poll shows Trump's day at McDonald's was most popular with Gen Z."__" Trump just went to the Steelers game. Look at the crowd's reaction versus how the media reported it."_
---
The lamestream media distorted the state of the race the entire time.They can't be trusted - you and I both know that. _Which is why I hope you 'll subscribe to _Not the Bee _today._ [**We 're up against a massive, lie-filled media machine. **When you join _Not the Bee_ , you'll be informed _and_ entertained.****But you 'll also receive a host of other benefits, including**:

* Ad-free browsing

Dear Friend,
---
Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card, and your checking account.

Imagine all of your money being seized.
---
__That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me.__
---
I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH...
---
As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State — especially since my own law licenses have been __taken away__ from me!

_**That’s a LIE.**_

The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust, I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of course the media and the Democrats will never report that.

name: Riley Gaines
subject: This evil is widespread
body:
I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.

| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjgbprvm4jrc9d84a95pd57uv9okg5c8dtqd2nvo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj64oj2cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znv0c2qpgieo6tnnsd08aama90eqo4o1i03rr8k8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj64oj2cjh2bs)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjs7ua6bp8bnr22go90sbps7g5us0fv4eu0bmjfo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj64oj2cjh2bs)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgghh9bmg5vnculkvstvkp5cmmruavoqcm8bdqso_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj64oj2cjh2bs) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zafifhm424cot12dak8n9vk5hmf44lr2vaoilc70_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj64oj2cjh2bs)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqd3l723pc8v16lbb4ed86s73nk59jokvd1e50po_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj64oj2cjh2bs), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7lc8s2o3cg62opi7h37prs8fjlaim7vkra4ful8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj64oj2cjh2bs)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6qp4qdkb726cvaa36pok86tsp1rv500ien63bbo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj64oj2cjh2bs)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfn1tj2f965bje394oudcgvse1aha0248k9dkr0g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj64oj2cjh2bs)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5fo3r6m9qre4jv6bvmkb8srs8p3e5oq5nani4t0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj64oj2cjh2bs)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines
---
|
---
| | P.S. **[**Please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation and let me know if you can help the Center for American Liberty defeat the radical transgender movement.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6s7uocf6mff9pe4oe3uouketsbpkq5jbtjoljdo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj64oj2cjh2bs)** God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the _Center for American Liberty's_ work, **[when you donate $100 or more, as my personal "Thank You," I'll send you my new book,_Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ for free.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6msr3t3o2am0ln7ljh193oftrltmv9qcq085u10_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj64oj2cjh2bs)** Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance."

clean_body: I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Riley Gaines
subject: This evil is widespread
body:
I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.

| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zrrhddi4dvlffm1caa9ag52knbelbvp10m9dt148_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj62o34c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zd5j486mrolmlljl7kb10ve2rmit24q8etkss0do_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj62o34c9h2bs)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zql758uf5eelpaisgq54hls8fs3obau3eacik6so_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj62o34c9h2bs)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zq4jsm267333j11uu2qj4hmrjo49hbju37qhdrg8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj62o34c9h2bs) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z7eksucjpu2b4tkkal4qh70q79e5eak38iieclf8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj62o34c9h2bs)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zrimq9mt4h45qgbubnapkqmfu11hbjcakvbrldu8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj62o34c9h2bs), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z4gf82cb9lhhmmkc27lbpnoht34i1d0j29e2modg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj62o34c9h2bs)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zedofsu120gsaec771j8sv41h6nb7p0qv8vget3o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj62o34c9h2bs)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zsd27idf03ce8hb5d8m5g2n9smd58b27rc8nmurg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj62o34c9h2bs)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2znha23focb37t3mdfgfj56e10hd7qo1pq70bqrlo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj62o34c9h2bs)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines
---
|
---
| | P.S. **[**Please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation and let me know if you can help the Center for American Liberty defeat the radical transgender movement.**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zn3r679pg42dkpccv258mfkth00fs0vl5thui3m8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj62o34c9h2bs)** God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the _Center for American Liberty's_ work, **[when you donate $100 or more, as my personal "Thank You," I'll send you my new book,_Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ for free.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z9i3am1d6jfcr7l83i9ujnfu25hhmp7pj0v0e9h0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj62o34c9h2bs)** Please hurry. name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
_**A message from our sponsor...**_ Theology 101 [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=00f4e1a0474c4098992f22a8dce9f0b3&_e=uL8Oo04oRxoG-AjKTalZb80ECBuU51wdQbK57w-swJNJ8Be80HQRq5CQ-s-ypJAsXJvdaGFYFrdD21s8c0Hs-FYOHTC9Khez0vh777RRRX39-FMqhdlYhfqmHgLlHEDywDlqyrY9_PemZgwj8eH1897HlFuG2n2lQkh7f1F0eE7zCBpk0GrnTRboAUyxqC9Y-tfP8XANC-kHhfNpXJrw-CIu_76APjugwLHMgYCHBZzKm4qLPbMWYJtYtHHCb_mPr1oZ_1eXgFCTJk6plznE1m_KAjzoaB5rZk3u9aCtNzWCnD3RFg9a2wMpNtuiYRbn1rY0eNCtx42Zg-VQ6PbBXoDb28dMEG4Nl8Io9QDee75LxgBuzN6ZqhFKUHJAuRU3BBceEEidoy-Q7LHIA7oQc-swI1jaa1kliHjNge70qVsAN1yV8BYOxk9uaohSLjFM) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=00f4e1a0474c4098992f22a8dce9f0b3&_e=uL8Oo04oRxoG-AjKTalZb80ECBuU51wdQbK57w-swJNJ8Be80HQRq5CQ-s-ypJAsXJvdaGFYFrdD21s8c0Hs-FYOHTC9Khez0vh777RRRX39-FMqhdlYhfqmHgLlHEDywDlqyrY9_PemZgwj8eH1897HlFuG2n2lQkh7f1F0eE7zCBpk0GrnTRboAUyxqC9Y-tfP8XANC-kHhfNpXJrw-CIu_76APjugwLHMgYCHBZzKm4qLPbMWYJtYtHHCb_mPr1oZ_1eXgFCTJk6plznE1m_KAjzoaB5rZk3u9aCtNzWt4wXfzigMWnRyDrfcqtUq1Df6ZJWYFXNVh_a8AXPaBaJJ_i0sjgRq8sT7JRlX45K8Z3mjmur-hkIDd1gGOftloHjx_XNAQajLXT-VQPldQ_eRTPFSNWYB8WnusCvx14DHJNiOC_r-9aImhN_DUTsV) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=00f4e1a0474c4098992f22a8dce9f0b3&_e=uL8Oo04oRxoG-AjKTalZb80ECBuU51wdQbK57w-swJNJ8Be80HQRq5CQ-s-ypJAsXJvdaGFYFrdD21s8c0Hs-FYOHTC9Khez0vh777RRRX39-FMqhdlYhfqmHgLlHEDywDlqyrY9_PemZgwj8eH1897HlFuG2n2lQkh7f1F0eE7zCBpk0GrnTRboAUyxqC9Y-tfP8XANC-kHhfNpXJrw-CIu_76APjugwLHMgYCHBZzKm4qLPbMWYJtYtHHCb_mPr1oZ_1eXgFCTJk6plznE1m_KAjzoaB5rZk3u9aCtNzVa_nlI8mhBkp_Kj6A_8tJnXoEbZand5c3f6jFnrX9TLxB97-anctXQpjaRkJDCSVVVGC74QcNuKok8wR74uPhcdaeFeJmdktZ5MgTft8Nbi6q5pEm83BNyMYxGj93E6YAFqmyJH57TPTN9Lpy8LnEf). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=00f4e1a0474c4098992f22a8dce9f0b3&_e=uL8Oo04oRxoG-AjKTalZb80ECBuU51wdQbK57w-swJNJ8Be80HQRq5CQ-s-ypJAsXJvdaGFYFrdD21s8c0Hs-FYOHTC9Khez0vh777RRRX39-FMqhdlYhfqmHgLlHEDywDlqyrY9_PemZgwj8eH1897HlFuG2n2lQkh7f1F0eE7zCBpk0GrnTRboAUyxqC9Y-tfP8XANC-kHhfNpXJrw-CIu_76APjugwLHMgYCHBZzKm4qLPbMWYJtYtHHCb_mPr1oZ_1eXgFCTJk6plznE1m_KAjzoaB5rZk3u9aCtNzXASodblCeKQl9G2tyeB1qi_Ldhw4xfMQYS-0d_-lSJypWdK_jcB7BlJx0JwMtBnZm6OkGsygAahVVJDo61qk-d_sD_h4hMOvvp1yHKY1-K61QNrR7QlO9jwQorfw8KngbTX58PM5Ir1i42gTcgZWBH)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College [Unsubscribe](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=00f4e1a0474c4098992f22a8dce9f0b3&_t=xsadkfX3Q2QWyHf5HVAQr-IlBPe1xziCJNO5efbkmOHKFfn5gjduQvifNeKitu5tdRFZHzHp_HVp4PPUEECbZd8pf7im35QL03BPeXlEWGYRt6DnpguvBxhh6RiFiPoS)

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: They’ve seized all my money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice.

But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice.
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdcut2mkce3b9lcknt3d4esfp00s6kav8h7biti8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj62o34c5h2bs)
---
Dear Friend,
---
Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card, and your checking account.
---
Imagine all of your money being seized.
---
__That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me.__
---
I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH...
---
As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State — especially since my own law licenses have been __taken away__ from me!
---
But there’s one thing I want to make clear...
---
...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal Defense Trust.
---
_**That’s a LIE.**_
---
The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust, I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of course the media and the Democrats will never report that.
---
And I’ll say it again loud and clear. If you can’t afford to contribute, please don’t. End of story.
---
But, if you can, please know that your support could be the key to my freedom – and not just _my own_ freedom, but the freedom, justice, and rights of every U.S. citizen.
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund, because even after EVERYTHING the Left has done to me, I will _NEVER_ SURRENDER the fight for freedom and justice. **](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpd9ustq4hjlgbeqem1eje2nnube2bmsidc5qk4g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj62o34c5h2bs)

name: A.G. Holder
subject: In this season of gratitude
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
There’s no team I’d rather be working alongside. The journey may be arduous, but we have no choice but to embark on it.
|
---

Peter,
Before the Thanksgiving holiday, I wanted to take a moment to express my deep gratitude for your support of the All On The Line campaign.
Like you, I am deeply troubled that Donald Trump was reelected as president of the United States.
But that’s not the whole story of this election season and we cannot lose sight of the gains made at the state-level.
Last Wednesday, Justice Allison Riggs won reelection to the North Carolina State Supreme Court. North Carolinians sent a needed message: they are tired of ideologically driven judicial decisions that are inconsistent with the will of the people and want justices who will evaluate the cases before them in a fair manner that protects their rights and the rule of law.
With fair maps finally in place following the _Allen v. Milligan_ Supreme Court __ ruling, voters in Louisiana _and_ Alabama elected Members of Congress in two new districts that will equally reflect Black voters’ political desires, as required by the Voting Rights Act of 1965. I'm proud that our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, supported voters in both of these states in the lawsuits that have now ensured that their voices will be heard.
In Wisconsin, Democrats broke the Republican supermajority in the state senate. In Michigan, two pro-democracy leaders won their races for the state supreme court. Key state legislative seats in battleground states like Georgia and Pennsylvania flipped from red to blue.
These accountable and responsive state-level leaders will help hold the line against extreme MAGA Republicans as we work to restore fairness to our democracy and ensure every American has an equal say in our government.
Don’t get me wrong: There’s a lot of work to do. I remain committed to fighting for our freedoms, our democracy, and a world where justice prevails.
I have no doubt that — if we stand together; if we walk together; if we believe as we always have in the power of our ideals and the forces of our shared community — not only our cause, but our country shall overcome.
We are the stewards of our democracy. And we have it in our power to shape where the journey goes next — as long as we put in the work.
**The journey may be arduous, but we have no choice but to embark on it. And there’s no team I’d rather be working alongside to do so. **
This Thanksgiving, I hope you’ll spend time with your loved ones and catch your breath. You’re an important part of the All On The Line campaign and the fair maps movement, and we need you in this fight for fairness.
Happy Thanksgiving,
Eric H. Holder, Jr.
82nd Attorney General

clean_body: There’s no team I’d rather be working alongside. The journey may be arduous, but we have no choice but to embark on it. | Peter, Before the Thanksgiving holiday, I wanted to take a moment to express my deep gratitude for your support of the All On The Line campaign. Like you, I am deeply troubled that Donald Trump was reelected as president of the United States. But that’s not the whole story of this election season and we cannot lose sight of the gains made at the state-level. Last Wednesday, Justice Allison Riggs won reelection to the North Carolina State Supreme Court. North Carolinians sent a needed message: they are tired of ideologically driven judicial decisions that are inconsistent with the will of the people and want justices who will evaluate the cases before them in a fair manner that protects their rights and the rule of law. With fair maps finally in place following the Allen v. Milligan Supreme Court ruling, voters in Louisiana and Alabama elected Members of Congress in two new districts that will equally reflect Black voters’ political desires, as required by the Voting Rights Act of 1965. I'm proud that our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, supported voters in both of these states in the lawsuits that have now ensured that their voices will be heard. In Wisconsin, Democrats broke the Republican supermajority in the state senate. In Michigan, two pro-democracy leaders won their races for the state supreme court. Key state legislative seats in battleground states like Georgia and Pennsylvania flipped from red to blue. These accountable and responsive state-level leaders will help hold the line against extreme MAGA Republicans as we work to restore fairness to our democracy and ensure every American has an equal say in our government. Don’t get me wrong: There’s a lot of work to do. I remain committed to fighting for our freedoms, our democracy, and a world where justice prevails. I have no doubt that — if we stand together; if we walk together; if we believe as we always have in the power of our ideals and the forces of our shared community — not only our cause, but our country shall overcome. We are the stewards of our democracy. And we have it in our power to shape where the journey goes next — as long as we put in the work. The journey may be arduous, but we have no choice but to embark on it. And there’s no team I’d rather be working alongside to do so. This Thanksgiving, I hope you’ll spend time with your loved ones and catch your breath. You’re an important part of the All On The Line campaign and the fair maps movement, and we need you in this fight for fairness. Happy Thanksgiving, Eric H. Holder, Jr. 82nd Attorney General is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. name: Roger Ream
subject: We need new press
body:
They did everything they could to push their woke progressive values throughout this year.
| [ ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f32211f668cb44a08389e028cbfba243&_e=_a0yOSDd9OomBZDN1aDki8Lhznyv1IjjKDTwwjM682MhClioGI7ubV_gBVZveFbzxQHnj7X_0POscKrl4TgSWQtpCn3dWvz69KPg2-zUUbjsMUk8UnDxlDkYlQfNgbgTyQ1kh72z3LDlP6K2o2YDDLSotV7MHBOleV2i8E-4yAbw4Ig3KGWoyEvMM7RixNtgEuhc-luV4SAbgnzcV4setS7m47XQNvkEZNTRjbfXb1odHSMLdeAjiMXFLEOeiUr-LkFrE0ZSva5_MuYh9pXRShRUdRrNhitHqMx38POuiS8%3D)
---
Peter, They did everything they could to push their woke progressive values throughout this year. When President Biden refused to step aside, the left-wing media dismissed concerns about his mental acuity. They said Biden was as sharp as a tack.

When assassins came for President Trump, they minimized the threats.

And when Kamala Harris flip-flopped on critical issues, the mainstream media covered for her. They let her skip interviews, ignore questions, and do whatever she wanted. Peter, if this great country is going to endure, we NEED an honest press. That’s why The Fund for American Studies (TFAS), is training, educating, and helping young conservative journalists pursue careers in the profession. We help these journalists learn how to make a difference with fellowships, internships, the Student Journalism Association, and so much more. This year showed how essential it is that we get more conservatives into the media. [**Will you help us do that by donating anything you can right now?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f32211f668cb44a08389e028cbfba243&_e=_a0yOSDd9OomBZDN1aDki8Lhznyv1IjjKDTwwjM682MhClioGI7ubV_gBVZveFbzxQHnj7X_0POscKrl4TgSWQtpCn3dWvz69KPg2-zUUbjsMUk8UnDxlDkYlQfNgbgTyQ1kh72z3LDlP6K2o2YDDHvUDuO2vueWZioyyVpD6N7ISea0JSdZX1zdKF1NpnzDLEphgp4PhlFTHydtpfvYzFdmVmTz5snfv2N5fWCTVlV0SnrU92oFiVHP2PjKFiwRrS0AasoNVkQs8z1Y2ArZOxN620WfMx7e7l78wHWZleY%3D) For decades, we’ve helped young journalists succeed. Our fellowships and internships gave our alumni the foot in the door they need. And because of that, they’re now hosting shows and writing for some of the biggest publishers in the business. That means they’re working for The Wall Street Journal, FOX News, Reason, The Federalist, CNN, The Daily Caller, The Washington Post, and so much more.

But, Peter, we need to do more. That’s why we launched the Student Journalism Association last year. We’re empowering brave young student journalists to fight leftist lies and propaganda on their campuses. And we’ll help them kick star their careers, so that there will be more reporters with moral courage in the media across the country.

But, we need your help to do that. We’re supporting dozens of conservative student journalists on 21 college campuses. [Peter](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f32211f668cb44a08389e028cbfba243&_e=_a0yOSDd9OomBZDN1aDkiyLyM7j6V_C-Rkal8yPtyeQJkXB-M21Pr3DsNppL6DnJJHkrLqFh57o8HPL3jNVS1OJQtOWvAw-B4fN4NSbxlDdhXfZITqy0n3xYlMw075MyEUJVcVGxJB7OZ9X2uHRG5y-uJzZMYfVQyMAg2Y8SZo4NrncUDw7E86T326ULB2SIvMwwm6JWi-Cgagz00zX7x2COJN_fACdyS90iVQtT6y8%3D)[, will you help us grow that network, so we can fight for a future where the media isn’t pushing propaganda for the left-wing establishment? Please, donate right now.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f32211f668cb44a08389e028cbfba243&_e=_a0yOSDd9OomBZDN1aDki8Lhznyv1IjjKDTwwjM682MhClioGI7ubV_gBVZveFbzxQHnj7X_0POscKrl4TgSWQtpCn3dWvz69KPg2-zUUbjsMUk8UnDxlDkYlQfNgbgTyQ1kh72z3LDlP6K2o2YDDLJDiUwVGyM2jRcFvRKe7yjxBFWFtNooMyMBE6N7XH_7iCvDJNo7QK64U93-WniN3PIOGW7LKGcmr4Lx_AJAKQheE3ZIviddNsXZNE6r3FzbOEC-Tyf1sRpb0Ugb_Dc3EkdwinP3cGePfr8ki5SSUmA%3D)

Sincerely,
Roger Ream
President The Fund for American Studies

name: Riley Gaines
subject: This evil is widespread
body:
I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.

| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgrmrrsrjd5t9cg24qikh7qqckaud1865dg118f8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj62p70cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh3gtck16empifkvcbh3rtb5dv82l0vgc37hs2d0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj62p70cjh2bs)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z85bnvn1p8hr6b271dmoiogsf5c8hgnraug8bc7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj62p70cjh2bs)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf8toe5gut58nj9d9ac7bv9g6cjkp6trr1ln1cng_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj62p70cjh2bs) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6o4qesh3u1286ug4dt2iki35an73lkc1fajj7b0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj62p70cjh2bs)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcq93i8fikrai54hh4g28o5idlh2d8eqv8srcf28_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj62p70cjh2bs), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5hvp3kl0s5tjbbbikmsshb4gqp3908kbj7m1ib8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj62p70cjh2bs)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgrvka2tfa93q35dge0lbsr7ejc9lf96q1ovc3k0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj62p70cjh2bs)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zimriklhkf2qm91ifp7gsuokmu1avhmaj6ifpqqo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj62p70cjh2bs)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4bvbju2sqas2ired2r0unblbci0s4n1smnl77gg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj62p70cjh2bs)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines
---
|
---
| | P.S. **[**Please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation and let me know if you can help the Center for American Liberty defeat the radical transgender movement.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4r8394mnb5rf5jpb92q686paouhha0mms51stng_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj62p70cjh2bs)** God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the _Center for American Liberty's_ work, **[when you donate $100 or more, as my personal "Thank You," I'll send you my new book,_Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ for free.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5v9hdqpkcrsr9fe0c4lsipu1elcfpgvbii7knvo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj62p70cjh2bs)** Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance."
---
[ **Donate**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zou31tcgi8fm2o5qecjrcct3u6mqrm65ucvk4ukg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj62p70cjh2bs)
