But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 | Trump Train News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

Friends,
While we're hopeful that you're having a blessed Thanksgiving week with family, we'd like to give you a brief update on our $500,000 match campaign.
One of our founding supporters, Mike Rydin, offered to donate $500,000 to the Network if we're able to raise another $500,000 by November 30.
We are almost to our goal.
As of today, we have raised **$405,967.17.**
Before you eat some turkey, and definitely before you loosen your belt and watch football games, would you consider donating to help us reach this goal? Our state freedom caucus members need all the support they can get before they head into the 2025 legislative battle. Can we count on you?
[DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/3bd7e6d1-b50f-4166-9dce-d3d44fbc7f65?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
If you don't want to donate online by clicking the button above, you can send us a check to the following:
* **State Freedom Caucus Network** (not tax deductible)
* **State Freedom Caucus Foundation** (tax deductive)

The mailing address is: 300 Independence Ave, SE, Washington, DC 20003.
We also accept stock gifts and IRA distributions. Please reach out to Dana Parish (dana@statefreedomcaucus.org) or Sara Prinzi (sprinzi@statefreedomcaucus.org) for more information.
**Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
_President
State Freedom Caucus Network_
P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider [a contribution](https://substack.com/redirect/3bd7e6d1-b50f-4166-9dce-d3d44fbc7f65?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.
You're currently a free subscriber to [State Freedom Caucus Network](https://substack.com/redirect/cc2a6a4f-ad64-44ef-97da-9ca0a3395194?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). For the full experience, [upgrade your subscription.](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZmNuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.dQNHAVdjiJwqseyj7QpppM2lRbiJjmU2L12L3lTiaDk?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZmNuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.dQNHAVdjiJwqseyj7QpppM2lRbiJjmU2L12L3lTiaDk?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)

name: Terry Schilling, American Principles Project
subject: Election polling takeaways for you
body:
Time for a Thanksgiving Reset
| | |
---
| | [](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TDMF70eHVfaM2Yxd_b4KT8SlGNj_GWOdlKvtBw3Hu9HdLSv7vIe6AZCSFVHsf_2Gh2fnNFBhSobXSlyqZuseBV7FePTQw3vX948ckzKpNJo-sWI1Ob8-jSLS1BVEwI1611oOouIJ5g4ci_LdwZOnhzzwIsyNcUBgww3wKKKOdkyEqfwpzRu8tUO7nI4ZVX8bNVLoqq1o8Mhd-qzs_MXU5CaOIocy9VpPvp0Dmu6X1-U=&c=ACuJGO_WGTj9Xp3lOgBHI-CiZtpuCT1S2fpu85yI8jiSpYY-FgIxPQ==&ch=f8ri9bJ3Ll92O6aZcAAjd6nxF1nJY9F9GBABaHuet3MqIsTK-5hXcg==)
---
| Friends,
As we approach the holiday season, it's a good time to reflect on what just happened in 2024. After all, Thanksgiving is the perfect encapsulation of what we're fighting for.
These aren't abstract debates we talk about every day--they're the values and principles that shape the lives of American families, it's meat and potatoes type stuff.
I've got some polling to share with you.
It's time to move past the chaos. The American people have had enough of the noise and rejected the extreme ideas that have dominated the conversation for too long.
For years, we've warned that the far left has gone too far. Now, Americans agree--it's time for an abrupt return to a normal, grounded American existence.
Especially in Washington D.C. -- where Congresswoman Nancy Mace is crushing it. Watch this Newsmax clip.
---
| | [](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TDMF70eHVfaM2Yxd_b4KT8SlGNj_GWOdlKvtBw3Hu9HdLSv7vIe6AfxG43RG0Eq4DeX61NwYqZzQJtuXr1HZJ6sx8P_aPdhMD1Uzb1R1zwM98NC2avNb2jjknT6uVFBjny01azSn1FjZtlmx0shkT_Ywj-BJYbRZYzvNL0rupbfIvDTjAOBNYPk_ZskROgGD&c=ACuJGO_WGTj9Xp3lOgBHI-CiZtpuCT1S2fpu85yI8jiSpYY-FgIxPQ==&ch=f8ri9bJ3Ll92O6aZcAAjd6nxF1nJY9F9GBABaHuet3MqIsTK-5hXcg==)
---
| [Watch the Interview](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TDMF70eHVfaM2Yxd_b4KT8SlGNj_GWOdlKvtBw3Hu9HdLSv7vIe6AfxG43RG0Eq4DeX61NwYqZzQJtuXr1HZJ6sx8P_aPdhMD1Uzb1R1zwM98NC2avNb2jjknT6uVFBjny01azSn1FjZtlmx0shkT_Ywj-BJYbRZYzvNL0rupbfIvDTjAOBNYPk_ZskROgGD&c=ACuJGO_WGTj9Xp3lOgBHI-CiZtpuCT1S2fpu85yI8jiSpYY-FgIxPQ==&ch=f8ri9bJ3Ll92O6aZcAAjd6nxF1nJY9F9GBABaHuet3MqIsTK-5hXcg==)
---
Personally, I'm looking forward to the simple joys this week that remind me what really matters: playing football in the street with my kids on a misty afternoon, watching the game, and avoiding the debates about turkey cook times.
The good stuff, not arguments over basic truths like the difference between boys and girls.
These small moments define us--not the divisive messaging designed to dismantle our culture from the inside. And protecting these values is exactly what we're fighting for.
The polling data is clear: Americans are ready to return to the basics and reject the radical liberal agenda. Consider these numbers:
---
| The Culture War resonates: 52% of voters who learned about Kamala Harris's support for sex changes for minors said they were more likely to vote for Trump.
Not backing down matters: The GOP's willingness to address cultural issues, like the Democrats' radical trans agenda, resonated powerfully with voters under Trump.
Protecting women's sports is a winning message: 47% of voters who learned about Harris's support for men competing in women's sports were more likely to back Trump.
Gender ideology is a major vulnerability for Democrats: 45% of voters who heard the message, "Kamala is for they/them, Trump is for you," became more likely to support Trump.
---
| These polling numbers confirm what we've known all along: the left's gender extremism is wildly out of step with the American people. Families are ready to move past the THEY/THEM fad--a hollow trend pushed by radicals--and return to enduring values that prioritize children and parents.
The globalists have spent years trying to dismantle everything we hold dear, pushing radical trends that weaken our communities and sow division. We can't let them win.
As we take a well-deserved break with our families this holiday season, let's remember what we're fighting for. The future isn't about radical trends or divisive agendas. It's about family, faith, and freedom.
If you're considering year-end giving, would you help us prepare for the battles ahead? We've secured a victory in the presidency, but the far-left globalists are gearing up for another fight. They'll stop at nothing to erase the simple, cherished moments we hold dear--like football at halftime and neighborhood walks after Thanksgiving dinner.
[Can you partner with us as we continue to fight, fight, fight against the far-left?](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TDMF70eHVfaM2Yxd_b4KT8SlGNj_GWOdlKvtBw3Hu9HdLSv7vIe6AZCSFVHsf_2Gh2fnNFBhSobXSlyqZuseBV7FePTQw3vX948ckzKpNJo-sWI1Ob8-jSLS1BVEwI1611oOouIJ5g4ci_LdwZOnhzzwIsyNcUBgww3wKKKOdkyEqfwpzRu8tUO7nI4ZVX8bNVLoqq1o8Mhd-qzs_MXU5CaOIocy9VpPvp0Dmu6X1-U=&c=ACuJGO_WGTj9Xp3lOgBHI-CiZtpuCT1S2fpu85yI8jiSpYY-FgIxPQ==&ch=f8ri9bJ3Ll92O6aZcAAjd6nxF1nJY9F9GBABaHuet3MqIsTK-5hXcg==)
---
| | [PARTNER WITH US](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TDMF70eHVfaM2Yxd_b4KT8SlGNj_GWOdlKvtBw3Hu9HdLSv7vIe6AZCSFVHsf_2Gh2fnNFBhSobXSlyqZuseBV7FePTQw3vX948ckzKpNJo-sWI1Ob8-jSLS1BVEwI1611oOouIJ5g4ci_LdwZOnhzzwIsyNcUBgww3wKKKOdkyEqfwpzRu8tUO7nI4ZVX8bNVLoqq1o8Mhd-qzs_MXU5CaOIocy9VpPvp0Dmu6X1-U=&c=ACuJGO_WGTj9Xp3lOgBHI-CiZtpuCT1S2fpu85yI8jiSpYY-FgIxPQ==&ch=f8ri9bJ3Ll92O6aZcAAjd6nxF1nJY9F9GBABaHuet3MqIsTK-5hXcg==)
---
|
Thank you for your continued support.
In Freedom,
---
| |
---
| Terry Schilling President American Principles Project
---
| | [Join APP's Big Family](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TDMF70eHVfaM2Yxd_b4KT8SlGNj_GWOdlKvtBw3Hu9HdLSv7vIe6AZCSFVHsf_2Gh2fnNFBhSobXSlyqZuseBV7FePTQw3vX948ckzKpNJo-sWI1Ob8-jSLS1BVEwI1611oOouIJ5g4ci_LdwZOnhzzwIsyNcUBgww3wKKKOdkyEqfwpzRu8tUO7nI4ZVX8bNVLoqq1o8Mhd-qzs_MXU5CaOIocy9VpPvp0Dmu6X1-U=&c=ACuJGO_WGTj9Xp3lOgBHI-CiZtpuCT1S2fpu85yI8jiSpYY-FgIxPQ==&ch=f8ri9bJ3Ll92O6aZcAAjd6nxF1nJY9F9GBABaHuet3MqIsTK-5hXcg==)
---
| Thank you for standing with us in the fight for America's families. Together, we can make a lasting difference.

clean_body: Time for a Thanksgiving Reset | | | | | == | Friends, As we approach the holiday season, it's a good time to reflect on what just happened in 2024. After all, Thanksgiving is the perfect encapsulation of what we're fighting for. These aren't abstract debates we talk about every day--they're the values and principles that shape the lives of American families, it's meat and potatoes type stuff. I've got some polling to share with you. It's time to move past the chaos. The American people have had enough of the noise and rejected the extreme ideas that have dominated the conversation for too long. For years, we've warned that the far left has gone too far. Now, Americans agree--it's time for an abrupt return to a normal, grounded American existence. Especially in Washington D.C. -- where Congresswoman Nancy Mace is crushing it. Watch this Newsmax clip. | | == | == Personally, I'm looking forward to the simple joys this week that remind me what really matters: playing football in the street with my kids on a misty afternoon, watching the game, and avoiding the debates about turkey cook times. The good stuff, not arguments over basic truths like the difference between boys and girls. These small moments define us--not the divisive messaging designed to dismantle our culture from the inside. And protecting these values is exactly what we're fighting for. The polling data is clear: Americans are ready to return to the basics and reject the radical liberal agenda. Consider these numbers: | The Culture War resonates: 52% of voters who learned about Kamala Harris's support for sex changes for minors said they were more likely to vote for Trump. Not backing down matters: The GOP's willingness to address cultural issues, like the Democrats' radical trans agenda, resonated powerfully with voters under Trump. Protecting women's sports is a winning message: 47% of voters who learned about Harris's support for men competing in women's sports were more likely to back Trump. Gender ideology is a major vulnerability for Democrats: 45% of voters who heard the message, "Kamala is for they/them, Trump is for you," became more likely to support Trump. | These polling numbers confirm what we've known all along: the left's gender extremism is wildly out of step with the American people. Families are ready to move past the THEY/THEM fad--a hollow trend pushed by radicals--and return to enduring values that prioritize children and parents. The globalists have spent years trying to dismantle everything we hold dear, pushing radical trends that weaken our communities and sow division. We can't let them win. As we take a well-deserved break with our families this holiday season, let's remember what we're fighting for. The future isn't about radical trends or divisive agendas. It's about family, faith, and freedom. If you're considering year-end giving, would you help us prepare for the battles ahead? We've secured a victory in the presidency, but the far-left globalists are gearing up for another fight. They'll stop at nothing to erase the simple, cherished moments we hold dear--like football at halftime and neighborhood walks after Thanksgiving dinner. == | | == | Thank you for your continued support. In Freedom, | | | Terry Schilling President American Principles Project | | == | Thank you for standing with us in the fight for America's families. Together, we can make a lasting difference. | == == == == | | | | American Principles Project | 2800 S Shirlington Rd Ste 901 | Arlington, VA 22206-3601 US | | |

name: The Forward Party
subject: Think Infrastructure Isn't Exciting?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Well you're wrong.

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=think_infrastructure_isn_t_exc&n=1)
---
Wednesday, November 27, 2024 | Peter -- Imagine you want to run for office. (Please, actually imagine it - and shoot us an email if you decide you want to!) But you just can’t stand the thought of running as a Republican or Democrat. Or you _can’t_ run in either party, because they’ve already hand-picked their candidate of choice. Or, like most Americans, you have a mix of views from across the political spectrum, and you don’t pass their litmus tests. What do you do now? Well, if you were running as a member of a legacy party, you would reach out to your state or county chair, and they would walk you through it all. If you’re an independent, you’re on your own. Immediately, you’re faced with a huge list of questions and few ways to answer them:
* For which office should I run?
* How do I file?
* Do I need signatures? How many? By when?
* How do I set up a website?
* What do I use to get donations?
* How do I build a volunteer base?
* What legal requirements do I have to follow?
* What software do I use to organize my volunteers?
* How do I figure out what key issues I should run on are?
* Are there debates? How do I get included in them?

This is just a small subset of the questions you might have, and the answer will likely lead you to even more questions! For instance, the two biggest donation processors out there - ActBlue and WinRed - likely won’t work with you, since you’re running as an independent. You’ll also find that there are very few people out there with campaign experience you can hire, as working with an Independent is a surefire way for a campaign professional to get blacklisted by the legacy parties. Moving past that, the legacy parties have aggregated data from hundreds of thousands of campaigns, representing millions of hours of volunteer work making calls, sending texts, and knocking on doors. Candidates running outside of these parties start with, at best, a voter file from the state, and maybe some purchased data from an organization that’ll sell to independents. All of these hurdles make it so **most people don’t even bother throwing their hat in the ring** (let alone knowing the attacks they’re likely to face if they gain traction). Those that do file to run quickly feel overwhelmed, often effectively dropping out of the race. And those that fight through election day rarely end up winning. Even if they do, the infrastructure they built and the data they accumulated doesn’t go anywhere to help the next round of independent candidates. _**This problem is what Forward is working to fix**_. We’re creating training sessions for people interested in running. We’re building systems they can use, and volunteer and donor bases they can appeal to. We’re creating databases to store information about independent voters that persists between election cycles. We’re ensuring there’s a market out there for campaign professionals to make a living working with independent candidates. We’re not freezing people out based on increasingly narrow policy platforms or litmus tests. Rather, we ask our candidates to pledge to live up to our values, largely around protecting our democracy, listening to their constituents, and acting with ethics and compassion. This approach shouldn’t be radical; it should be table stakes for anyone or any party wanting people to vote for them. But, in 2024, it isn’t, so we’re building it. Thank you for joining us. We’re looking forward to taking huge steps forward with you in 2025, **Lindsey Williams Drath, CEO** **Matt Shinners, CSOO** [](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=think_infrastructure_isn_t_exc&n=2)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=think_infrastructure_isn_t_exc&n=3)[https://home.forwardparty.com/](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=think_infrastructure_isn_t_exc&n=4)
[ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HN-VuZ6-MtyTZDOwpLeQohBI2w5n1fstLPCAOB1eS8pn49pgKy1KM2eEYboZkJaE&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=think_infrastructure_isn_t_exc&n=5) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HR9MoATtHgNjF_4kmlo5pN8R4zJ-fGDLgTAMST8PY6mgKwzOK4bTDEpy9KU5BOzg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=think_infrastructure_isn_t_exc&n=6) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=C67zBN9acu3ZSVmLPV47peHvpkNPm4HcBUGM4-0XJTPgmEVLc_dN12xbGWLIkZIR&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=think_infrastructure_isn_t_exc&n=7) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=KO8ZOB0mq2gq63DvFrKfe08uhOv-byHfKpIIFrTtOpPikh4D0waR8pVrn6wFcdzO&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=think_infrastructure_isn_t_exc&n=8) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEuogCR1FcLzdL_LSGKjfikF5BT1dZn3HN2gM4OEGEI0z&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=think_infrastructure_isn_t_exc&n=9) Copyright © 2024 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. name: Roger Ream
subject: A New Era
body:
Correcting the MSM Mistake
They did everything they could to push their woke progressive values throughout this year.
| [ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=81d9fef8dd8644e1ba2d0f425f357ec7&_e=eAkf1KmxI7ER9Lzxh9iM2Ed2sS075R6HTG4zfgHFKG7n6ttZskKSIqvZth-TIN_R1CIqW4p6QiTfwgbW1hJH5Yjzueuqd_4e7DsYFmHYpTTUfp6X1HBAelwIc963tHed5OUB1WdWI_2GTmWEjsqoRii5jrP42Ju-TS7y0AfW2WDWVJJZpZ_pbQ5MSxkf0Se-3xcGbB_l-tGhPmiYs2msD7QcpN7rEXhRGDJDkN__LghgcQl_XKHda1b_WQ4gKMWhu_Zn_e4VkMSgBo0S-lMBUVimlrxcmS1QuxhB8wE8LYw%3D)
---
Fellow American, They did everything they could to push their woke progressive values throughout this year. When President Biden refused to step aside, the left-wing media dismissed concerns about his mental acuity. They said Biden was as sharp as a tack.

When assassins came for President Trump, they minimized the threats.

And when Kamala Harris flip-flopped on critical issues, the mainstream media covered for her. They let her skip interviews, ignore questions, and do whatever she wanted. Fellow American, if this great country is going to endure, we NEED an honest press. That’s why The Fund for American Studies (TFAS), is training, educating, and helping young conservative journalists pursue careers in the profession. We help these journalists learn how to make a difference with fellowships, internships, the Student Journalism Association, and so much more. This year showed how essential it is that we get more conservatives into the media. [**Will you help us do that by donating anything you can right now?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=81d9fef8dd8644e1ba2d0f425f357ec7&_e=eAkf1KmxI7ER9Lzxh9iM2Ed2sS075R6HTG4zfgHFKG7n6ttZskKSIqvZth-TIN_R1CIqW4p6QiTfwgbW1hJH5Yjzueuqd_4e7DsYFmHYpTTUfp6X1HBAelwIc963tHed5OUB1WdWI_2GTmWEjsqoRmbahPASyRpjLBauObsCi1ZlMHuLe9hkzL7HzfaYoABkcLRJVwXsDE7bs17l_l26V-HxWJcnN90CQ4jxozAyd6Fk_Q2ECOZ73g5tHLl3iGXpbaS5RRbugmiCDwpk08xMTFa6IojERZLU7Q6op5z8_kc%3D) For decades, we’ve helped young journalists succeed. Our fellowships and internships gave our alumni the foot in the door they need. And because of that, they’re now hosting shows and writing for some of the biggest publishers in the business. That means they’re working for The Wall Street Journal, FOX News, Reason, The Federalist, CNN, The Daily Caller, The Washington Post, and so much more.

But, Fellow American, we need to do more. That’s why we launched the Student Journalism Association last year. We’re empowering brave young student journalists to fight leftist lies and propaganda on their campuses. And we’ll help them kick star their careers, so that there will be more reporters with moral courage in the media across the country.

But, we need your help to do that. We’re supporting dozens of conservative student journalists on 21 college campuses. [Fellow American](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=81d9fef8dd8644e1ba2d0f425f357ec7&_e=eAkf1KmxI7ER9Lzxh9iM2Jgp6l6Uc1eo4UIfwiI2qbG_hREpFfHG5glXAUTfjkHpg_UOWQgYnvZbQ85N4SR6Rib-c4AaZpoUQl34z_7Z2k_U6xRdwwBpD_P0eRGOei43OAYAjWSvwRJZdfQmzZZnIr8ptGT2gYbGDrMisjecMFlRok_KuwkbKGrHtYyoXVec9uNKoIXhIlBD7RtT-RAScvAv7DWmSsC2tdyq1Xw2I7w%3D)[, will you help us grow that network, so we can fight for a future where the media isn’t pushing propaganda for the left-wing establishment? Please, donate right now.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=81d9fef8dd8644e1ba2d0f425f357ec7&_e=eAkf1KmxI7ER9Lzxh9iM2Ed2sS075R6HTG4zfgHFKG7n6ttZskKSIqvZth-TIN_R1CIqW4p6QiTfwgbW1hJH5Yjzueuqd_4e7DsYFmHYpTTUfp6X1HBAelwIc963tHed5OUB1WdWI_2GTmWEjsqoRi1A0yJf6u6PRALgDyoNDFNYCMlHTj7BeOQV5Z8B5hzTd-_ONCH-h2cXI5Nyzifhbc-1uAK-GQp-kSYl3w-SK6mj784zy39Sr8mMUgE20R0z2Ivo7aMaO569AQRs3n_bzw0arItkLp6zqFIWIMgUv-I%3D)

Sincerely,
Roger Ream
President The Fund for American Studies

name: Kari Lake
subject: Enormous fine for speaking the truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:

| | |

---
# **[Kari Lake](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zog0sk57mkkgj4qabor40vg4oc28cdtrjplffin0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj6eor2c9h2bs)**

|
---
| | Dear Friend, I’m contacting you today because it’s so important that you help me stay in this fight.If you feel like everything you ever considered “normal” in America has been turned upside down, you’re not alone.I’m facing an enormous fine for speaking the truth. To me, and you, I know the millions of dollars it will cost to defend our rights and the future of our families is worth it.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.
---
_Not_ the Lefts Lawfare._Not_ power-drunk liberal prosecutors._Not_ litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.
---
I’ve already incurred _hundreds of thousands of dollars_ in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case.**[Will you help me by rushing an emergency “First Amendment Fund” contribution before midnight tonight?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6pqso1okm82juc21f4faaadcmbh94d5dmlb0280_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj6eor2c9h2bs)** American Media Council created the First Amendment Fund to help me and others threatened by lawfare.Every single dollar given to this **“First Amendment Fund”** will help me fight this fight without financially destroying my family.
---
[ **DONATE **](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgunbo24acg90s2uck5jsluu4leokgt0cnji1850_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctj6eor2c9h2bs)
---
Thank you for all of your support.Yours truly,
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake

|

| |
---
---
Kari Lake

But I’m still taking on this fight because I want you to live in a free and prosperous America. I will never give up. body:

We’re reflecting on the past cycle and taking a break this Thanksgiving to spend time with our loved ones. Through it all, we are:

name: Jenna Burns
subject: She’s prosecuting Trump AND my husband
body:
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward.
Dear Peter,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=de23e4fe84ad46b69d23c4c15ac36c4b&_e=_PbU60t5E-qSe5uDsjWndiDtaQbeYppL6Zypytoy0sQXTkNTLrwoltrSM_8f34iVUPudlwv0UyB_W9nhKu9AHcNoBS-dao8XHxeIFY_s-Rb_7DyxZHkWfw1RDb52nQFtJHpzWMMpoIr8DxyPt8cLuKygkw55Cs35apRl6aDIm46FL7ArKWNcOXXctu5d_LAyl9iaJ3POlI5TMuTF_0xr1hPmwsjbpK7S1cvA8MwDVKpzUyM7tyqq0s148PgxYbByE8C-QhiEEq-uKaA8liX1uGcufnewwV9PxTo9IEIL2cweCCkfSNOLmyU36ZZZ-QtDwcJJH0BEXHdUeTeTpGUMPfKKERBImxybkapvdcaxac02KiZRG0dTBvqwnOQiBPbahjFeVDSlYDyTjcsKpq6EVQ%3D%3D)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=de23e4fe84ad46b69d23c4c15ac36c4b&_e=_PbU60t5E-qSe5uDsjWndiDtaQbeYppL6Zypytoy0sQXTkNTLrwoltrSM_8f34iVUPudlwv0UyB_W9nhKu9AHcNoBS-dao8XHxeIFY_s-Rb_7DyxZHkWfw1RDb52nQFtJHpzWMMpoIr8DxyPt8cLuKygkw55Cs35apRl6aDIm46FL7ArKWNcOXXctu5d_LAyl9iaJ3POlI5TMuTF_0xr1hPmwsjbpK7S1cvA8MwDVKpzUyM7tyqq0s148PgxYbByblpVc6KlORfjCKsy8jp2vUNW9ZcqaVVFDoPvJNqVBjZSHjtfUsMbBRMFDBX0-T5mU8qTp39RcfSeODrCsPFBSyLDojl8DBOHqqcF-EGp3VFplBBoD2Gk0FXNbjv4YnW4gVCdVFyR9SMUE2rISP_d_g%3D%3D)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=de23e4fe84ad46b69d23c4c15ac36c4b&_e=_PbU60t5E-qSe5uDsjWndiDtaQbeYppL6Zypytoy0sQXTkNTLrwoltrSM_8f34iVUPudlwv0UyB_W9nhKu9AHcNoBS-dao8XHxeIFY_s-Rb_7DyxZHkWfw1RDb52nQFtJHpzWMMpoIr8DxyPt8cLuKygkw55Cs35apRl6aDIm46FL7ArKWNcOXXctu5d_LAyl9iaJ3POlI5TMuTF_0xr1hPmwsjbpK7S1cvA8MwDVKpzUyM7tyqq0s148PgxYbBy1g7B5SdbR_8QHRjtHc8pkfQbDKmbT4wSUKMKMaDf1LM8gqk2Ae245y-uS8eXp64cqHDQOmrZ1phsEsjT4XpliCOPhgaLJC2eGVXgjG90rQ3ahxijvjNXoOBZ31JcQGF0y7dRUCuD3X5LURw_gQLVjA%3D%3D)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=de23e4fe84ad46b69d23c4c15ac36c4b&_e=_PbU60t5E-qSe5uDsjWndiDtaQbeYppL6Zypytoy0sQXTkNTLrwoltrSM_8f34iVUPudlwv0UyB_W9nhKu9AHcNoBS-dao8XHxeIFY_s-Rb_7DyxZHkWfw1RDb52nQFtJHpzWMMpoIr8DxyPt8cLuKygkw55Cs35apRl6aDIm46FL7ArKWNcOXXctu5d_LAyl9iaJ3POlI5TMuTF_0xr1hPmwsjbpK7S1cvA8MwDVKpzUyM7tyqq0s148PgxYbByPWRgTzAfzE9Ctyh5h81carkO_jp3eVdzCQ0dHbyHLsfRda7niSQ0gAmSrDKE3ybybiCu0wZOUe1GGtbbKS0PP9iya2tWXOB-NNAX15YioX9wXavZPod1KGIewsq1N3HaS4pp_b_7alj3aiLLpok9LQ%3D%3D)**

James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=de23e4fe84ad46b69d23c4c15ac36c4b&_e=_PbU60t5E-qSe5uDsjWndiDtaQbeYppL6Zypytoy0sQXTkNTLrwoltrSM_8f34iVUPudlwv0UyB_W9nhKu9AHcNoBS-dao8XHxeIFY_s-Rb_7DyxZHkWfw1RDb52nQFtJHpzWMMpoIr8DxyPt8cLuKygkw55Cs35apRl6aDIm46FL7ArKWNcOXXctu5d_LAyl9iaJ3POlI5TMuTF_0xr1hPmwsjbpK7S1cvA8MwDVKpzUyM7tyqq0s148PgxYbByQR65y65HN9TgnIBABSRJrYljxRz8O3GvXQ1ZgzYkcbx_2ka2iRHFsAoGKI17xRsmqyb-zGWnrtRjIPbmwEdoiLJiQOhajh51LbWugHGvQPF0glSVkBCTTSQdC9k7rZVtR3ZNXcAY4Nkr1cwbbOh11g%3D%3D)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=de23e4fe84ad46b69d23c4c15ac36c4b&_e=_PbU60t5E-qSe5uDsjWndiDtaQbeYppL6Zypytoy0sQXTkNTLrwoltrSM_8f34iVUPudlwv0UyB_W9nhKu9AHcNoBS-dao8XHxeIFY_s-Rb_7DyxZHkWfw1RDb52nQFtJHpzWMMpoIr8DxyPt8cLuKygkw55Cs35apRl6aDIm46FL7ArKWNcOXXctu5d_LAyl9iaJ3POlI5TMuTF_0xr1hPmwsjbpK7S1cvA8MwDVKpzUyM7tyqq0s148PgxYbBySgbwWkyfBszcJ_q0zVMEO9hs1Cm-nK8NsDBQFnDYhfSDhmo0aWh3Iy29smIFGJKdz5sOksNbrtEqjq8WEwFCM6PhPF2jp0OJPexTzaLG0V5tTSzls4f1q2zJbYkJmctcXOcfnW4lbUmFuo7DDXkF1w%3D%3D)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=de23e4fe84ad46b69d23c4c15ac36c4b&_e=_PbU60t5E-qSe5uDsjWndiDtaQbeYppL6Zypytoy0sQXTkNTLrwoltrSM_8f34iVUPudlwv0UyB_W9nhKu9AHcNoBS-dao8XHxeIFY_s-Rb_7DyxZHkWfw1RDb52nQFtJHpzWMMpoIr8DxyPt8cLuKygkw55Cs35apRl6aDIm46FL7ArKWNcOXXctu5d_LAyl9iaJ3POlI5TMuTF_0xr1hPmwsjbpK7S1cvA8MwDVKpzUyM7tyqq0s148PgxYbByZDUNuoG-jV5zQ4M6hfaQv9rY7Z9IE-lmBsJbMNxKop43OwvmjATbUFm5-KQlWLx-PKdL9j2DARK2PJIl2Yrvg6KKRGRnkeotwyIA8GXzmssBU-7dJdceOtQj70HS-al9eIEPuA5xs_cG4IJSOsSjdg%3D%3D)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=de23e4fe84ad46b69d23c4c15ac36c4b&_e=_PbU60t5E-qSe5uDsjWndj6Rzd2CbN3vc8zuN1iUZ7oND0TsOBZ1IIKiCQFum28gvcz4HnXMQWYVbgGzFVcAvdQrR5ULWr9aRYD7DldVHB338_gcwux1wIdtYv4Rwa4_f-Sf-nD-42EpS_nSLoCSsuE2JaL5fjuI2XMlbLuzl3EftCsHg64ZiMz-Mb106hm6UkvRngDyDYjMR8y70hl0ng%3D%3D)

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down. When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class. My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe. But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago. But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo. James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband. It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him. By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense. My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case. And it still hasn't been enough. I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment. And we were at our lowest moment! Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband. You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible. And it's your that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 Click to unsubscribe

name: Hassan Martini, Executive Director of No Dem Left Behind
subject: Thank you, from No Dem Left Behind
body:
| | | | | | [ ](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vk78d-kb0cf5-kyd76rh8/)
---
| | | | Thank you, folks.
As we head into the holiday season, I wanted to take a moment to personally connect with you. I am incredibly grateful for the support you’ve shown to No Dem Left Behind and for the shared commitment we have to creating a better future. While the 2024 election didn’t go exactly as we hoped, I’m proud of the critical role NDLB has played in shaping the outcomes and positioning us for even greater impact in the years ahead.
It’s true that the national results were challenging. With Republicans taking control of the Presidency, Senate, and House, many of us are left reflecting on what went wrong. But despite these setbacks, I want to emphasize the victories we did achieve—and the momentum we’ve built. NDLB’s work over the past six months has directly contributed to some significant wins in both the Senate and the House, helping to secure progressive voices in crucial races.
These victories didn’t come easily, but they are a testament to the power of grassroots organizing and the coalition we’ve built together. What’s more, we’re not stopping here. The groundwork we’ve laid in 2024 has set us up for success with some big projects in 2025 and the 2026 midterms.
Our movement is growing stronger, and we are more committed than ever to building a Congress that truly represents working-class people—not corporate interests. We know the Democratic Party needs to do better for the people who have been left behind by decades of corporate influence, and we are dedicated to pushing for a change that prioritizes people over profits.
In the coming year, NDLB is ready to tackle bold new projects, building on the energy and coalition we’ve developed.
We have a chance to create real, lasting change, and with your continued support, we will make sure that the people’s voice is heard loud and clear in every corner of our country.
Thank you again for being part of this movement. We’ve made progress, and together, we’ll keep pushing forward.
I wish you and your loved ones a peaceful and joyful Thanksgiving.
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vk78d-kb0cf6-kyd76rh9/)
---
In solidarity, -Hassan Martini
---
| | | |
## **Join our continued fight**
---
This is the time where we need to build our coalition for the future. The fight needs to go on against MAGA and their extremist agenda. Be a part of our fight today -------------->

name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: Five reasons to chip in $5 today
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Team -
Today, we hope you’ll allow us to share five reasons why your $5 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC is so important.
1. **Our work to defend our progress on gun safety from Donald Trump and the MAGA-right is already well underway.** The results of this year’s elections were disappointing. But as Gabby always says, we must keep moving ahead. Now is not a time to give up. Now is a time to show up so we can defend all the progress we’ve made as a gun violence prevention movement.

2. **The gun lobby has already begun their campaign to get rid of the White House Office of Gun Violence Prevention.** This office is a first-of-its-kind federal government effort to coordinate with state and federal officials to stop violence, invest in community violence intervention programs, respond to shootings, and support survivors. We must work together to prevent this office from being dismantled.

3. **Gun violence is the NUMBER ONE cause of death for children and teens in America.** Each and every day, children are dying from preventable gun violence. We cannot rest until we change the status quo—our kids deserve so much better.

4. **The majority of Americans support stronger gun laws. (You’re one of them!)** All of us have a role to play in ensuring that our newly elected leaders listen to the American people and support legislation that will keep us safe from gun violence.

5. **We need a huge day of fundraising today before the Thanksgiving holiday tomorrow.** We understand that we asked a lot of you for support during this election season. But our work to end gun violence continues . We’re pacing behind on our November fundraising goals, and we need a surge of support before we break for the holiday tomorrow.

[**If you’re ready to make an incredible impact on our work and help us reach our November fundraising goals, will you please chip in $5 or more to GIFFORDS PAC?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov24.MBs8nS&refcode=em241127-1-30&t=1&akid=9513%2E3935704%2ELQj5l4)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $5](https://go.giffords.org/go/46177?c0=giffords-em-nov24.-bjOWq&t=2&akid=9513%2E3935704%2ELQj5l4)**
---
****
| **[DONATE MORE](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-nov24.ILqYYQ&refcode=em241127-1-30&t=3&akid=9513%2E3935704%2ELQj5l4)**
---
****
Thank you for being a part of the gun violence prevention movement, and we hope you have a safe and happy holiday!
\- The team at GIFFORDS PAC

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=9513%2E3935704%2ELQj5l4) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Kari Lake
subject: A Personal and Urgent Message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.| | |

| |

#
---
From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=fbb229760031414cbafa6df7f78407ba&_e=leLfeKtV7WhvmCFCPjGNQmm_pA0FY4jvo5f8Y974Ur9MxsLquBp9hQQIjY_1hcpnDMbsyz5tZRtb7O9k3Ew9qU4nKE05uB3D1s7ZOKuDT6yo9bYxGvP_ylPKM6oiNUNb9TGk-lNBljNk5HuCzfwC8_Ng7uWgSj7nGVTk7F5Ub9gHBUXGHQdP7FlEqC14wd6X3jjfjcBgWEhN2E0BZhYy2UWsMXG7C1Cqe9htFnTkYdCd4iHJ8IKZ_9y9MJlGS1zT-M3aoz1Hs_lUYwj2uFQJRfI9hp3G82J35eptEK7yvp3IcXzaVo0ctGfd2M-FPll7cyKvOlkGs7s-kMcZCtna2d0u686Ytwrqclrkpu6jiyBvg4_5YdWBpojx4gOgFXzi5n4CJnYtebHllUZBd8DF-lJ8sNggZQM-1ORv-OBXdHM%3D)**

| | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you **[Rush a “FIRST AMENDMENT FUND” Emergency contribution before midnight tonight.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=fbb229760031414cbafa6df7f78407ba&_e=leLfeKtV7WhvmCFCPjGNQmm_pA0FY4jvo5f8Y974Ur9MxsLquBp9hQQIjY_1hcpnDMbsyz5tZRtb7O9k3Ew9qU4nKE05uB3D1s7ZOKuDT6yo9bYxGvP_ylPKM6oiNUNb9TGk-lNBljNk5HuCzfwC8_Ng7uWgSj7nGVTk7F5Ub9gHBUXGHQdP7FlEqC14wd6X3jjfjcBgWEhN2E0BZhYy2UWsMXG7C1Cqe9htFnTkYdCd4iHJ8IKZ_9y9MJlGS1zTBg6uNPmsFsZormd6ZfxTj0XKM6QmjAF-NO5OkPknIr50hvdvQg4m9eqzkEhMgm3f2M-HuKDdzNnvLtpRqZa-dpkcCvLwTDztPrfUvK4T06xzeaod9O8GeyRhsJS2752h6T8J5qZr7ekX3fba72skC5olRF6JV0MZbx3nvxA6Zqk%3D)** When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. **And he fights on.** So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, **then they know _nothing_ about me.**And they know nothing about _you_ , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new**“First Amendment Fund”** to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. [**My friend, could you rush back a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me cover the court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsels, and so much more?**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=fbb229760031414cbafa6df7f78407ba&_e=leLfeKtV7WhvmCFCPjGNQmm_pA0FY4jvo5f8Y974Ur9MxsLquBp9hQQIjY_1hcpnDMbsyz5tZRtb7O9k3Ew9qU4nKE05uB3D1s7ZOKuDT6yo9bYxGvP_ylPKM6oiNUNb9TGk-lNBljNk5HuCzfwC8_Ng7uWgSj7nGVTk7F5Ub9gHBUXGHQdP7FlEqC14wd6X3jjfjcBgWEhN2E0BZhYy2UWsMXG7C1Cqe9htFnTkYdCd4iHJ8IKZ_9y9MJlGS1zTSNVOZpeSE-4MuOi8nzZ4z0jGVJhBmbFlVujh_F_pzBW0HdtTWv-B--_VaHuQ1RExVxrgjRMq_MNAdRvAWcnalnkIagZokVQiAp20EC9QTl5UroWxf8IaMeK7GnajnftC11T0riKZmrNOVJ84pUbLurhpKVuPu087dODHxjl8I44%3D) The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.
---
[ **DONATE **](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=fbb229760031414cbafa6df7f78407ba&_e=leLfeKtV7WhvmCFCPjGNQmm_pA0FY4jvo5f8Y974Ur9MxsLquBp9hQQIjY_1hcpnDMbsyz5tZRtb7O9k3Ew9qU4nKE05uB3D1s7ZOKuDT6yo9bYxGvP_ylPKM6oiNUNb9TGk-lNBljNk5HuCzfwC8_Ng7uWgSj7nGVTk7F5Ub9gHBUXGHQdP7FlEqC14wd6X3jjfjcBgWEhN2E0BZhYy2UWsMXG7C1Cqe9htFnTkYdCd4iHJ8IKZ_9y9MJlGS1zThM3wpLVnxL1YTbC-jGviCrYIcDnyjrXtfOBF9udppPFFp_PUofJShaNvRcbOS5PWQZq3xSc_QnS2UtHAEfGIdr1nYtJhRnMetVQnel0W6unx9skKuChUkGmi-3tshtQPMDurcWgPNQQlfwfgvFedXWGTEqrl3f-dYgljoNLFORc%3D)
---
Every dollar given to this **“First Amendment Fund”** will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly,
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake

With enough grassroots firepower, we will end this lawfare and take back our country. **[Please, rush your most generous, tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or more. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: What I’m thankful for
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2212%2E135344%2EgrNu9q)

Friend,
This year, Thanksgiving follows a few big weeks packed with significant events: Election Day and the rush of winning a statewide race; Senate orientation to learn about my new role; and wrapping up work in our Congressional office in DC – where we had to move out at the end of last week.
That means that I have a LOT to reflect on, and a long list of things to be grateful for this Thanksgiving.
In the spirit of the holiday, I thought I’d share just a few of them below. This year, I’m thankful for:
* More than 300,000 of you who chipped in to power this campaign, giving just a few dollars at a time. This was the most expensive Senate race in Michigan history, and we showed that you can win when a lot of people come together to give what they can.

* 50,000 Michiganders who volunteered to help my campaign -- and knocked on 2.2 million doors, sent 1.1 million texts, and made more than 5 million phone calls to voters.

* My campaign staff of more than 40 people, who organized more than 500 events across the state of Michigan – allowing me to meet voters in every corner of the state.

* The 715,000 residents of Michigan’s 7th district -- where it’s been the honor of a lifetime to represent them in Congress over three terms.

* And finally, all 10 million residents of Michigan -- because whether or not you voted for me, I am truly thankful for the opportunity to serve each and every one of you in the Senate next year.

I’ll be taking a few days with family this week to fully relax, recharge, and be grateful – and I hope you’re able to do the same.
Elissa

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=2212%2E135344%2EgrNu9q).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2212%2E135344%2EgrNu9q)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: Thank you 🍁
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
1,100 turkeys.
#
Thanks to your support, we've been able to spend the last week distributing 1,100 Thanksgiving turkeys — a record number for our team — to families across The Bronx and Queens.
Thanks to you all, hundreds of families and thousands of people will be able to eat a Thanksgiving meal this year that perhaps otherwise would have not.
Whether you chipped in via email, shared the message, or helped set up tables and distribute turkeys in person, the act of coming together to give one another a helping hand is something that leaves us all transformed.
Wishing you all a very Happy Thanksgiving 🍁 and sending all our home cooks out there good luck in their food prep tomorrow!
Yours in service,
Alexandria

clean_body: 1,100 turkeys. Thanks to your support, we've been able to spend the last week distributing 1,100 Thanksgiving turkeys — a record number for our team — to families across The Bronx and Queens. Thanks to you all, hundreds of families and thousands of people will be able to eat a Thanksgiving meal this year that perhaps otherwise would have not. Whether you chipped in via email, shared the message, or helped set up tables and distribute turkeys in person, the act of coming together to give one another a helping hand is something that leaves us all transformed. Wishing you all a very Happy Thanksgiving 🍁 and sending all our home cooks out there good luck in their food prep tomorrow! Yours in service, Alexandria | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

name: NHGOP Headquarters
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
body:

# Happy Thanksgiving!
---
| President George Washington’s Thanksgiving Proclamation from October 3, 1789 acknowledges the role of the Almighty in securing our new nation and recommends a day of public thanksgiving and prayer. For Thanksgiving 2024, we Republicans can give thanks for a new hope in America that was reborn on November 5th. An America where we can once again see a future better than today.
This is a great time for us all and Thanks are in order indeed. I hope you will reread the beginning of the First Thanksgiving Proclamation below. Thank you ALL for helping achieve victories in the state and for supporting President Trump. _“Whereas it is the duty of all Nations to acknowledge the providence of Almighty God, to obey his will, to be grateful for his benefits, and humbly to implore his protection and favor—and Whereas both Houses of Congress have by their Joint Committee requested me "to recommend to the People of the United States a day of public thanksgiving and prayer to be observ”ed by acknowledging with grateful hearts the many signal favors of Almighty God, especially by affording them an opportunity peaceably to establish a form of government for their safety and happiness._
_“Now therefore I do recommend and assign Thursday the 26th day of November next to be devoted by the People of these States to the service of that great and glorious Being, who is the beneficent Author of all the good that was, that is, or that will be—That we may then all unite in rendering unto him our sincere and humble thanks—for his kind care and protection of the People of this country previous to their becoming a Nation—for the signal and manifold mercies, and the favorable interpositions of his providence, which we experienced in the course and conclusion of the late war—for the great degree of tranquility, union, and plenty, which we have since enjoyed—for the peaceable and rational manner in which we have been enabled to establish constitutions of government for our safety and happiness, and particularly the national One now lately instituted, for the civil and religious liberty with which we are blessed, and the means we have of acquiring and diffusing useful knowledge; and in general for all the great and various favors which he hath been pleased to confer upon us.”_
**Inauguration 20 January 2025**
A separate email has been sent to those who expressed interest in attending Washington, DC events. If you’d like more information on inaugural activities in Washington D.C. please email [staff@nhrsc.com](mailto:staff@nhrsc.com?subject=&body=)
**Annual NHRSC Meeting 25 January 2025**
State Committee Members and limited guests will be invited to our Annual Meeting.Inter-Lakes High School, Meredith, NH
Please see the NHGOP web page ([nh.gop](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=ace05f09a8&e=f3aa6419cd)) for more information.
Live Free or Die,
---
| **Chris Ager****Chairman, NHGOP**[**chrisager@nhrsc.com**](mailto:chrisager@nhrsc.com)
---
|
---
| | | | | | |
---

body:
Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is ready to take a stand.

Senate Confirmation: A Chance to Set the Record Straight
[THE TRUTH IS ON OUR SIDE](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=confirmation_11_27_24_nd1r&n=5)
Dear Peter,
Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is ready to take a stand.
For decades, he’s fought tirelessly for the health and freedom of the American people—challenging corruption in our public health agencies, exposing the influence of Big Pharma and Big Ag, and standing firm against censorship and misinformation.
Now, the Senate confirmation hearings present a pivotal moment: **an opportunity to let the truth shine through.**
[**This isn’t just a chance for Kennedy to address years of mischaracterizations and lies—it’s an opportunity to show the American people the depth of corporate capture in our health institutions and why bold action is needed to restore integrity and transparency.**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=confirmation_11_27_24_nd1r&n=6)
_The Stakes Couldn’t Be Higher_
For years, the FDA, CDC, and other agencies have failed to prioritize the people they’re meant to protect. Instead, they’ve catered to corporate interests, allowing profits to take precedence over safety and accountability.
RFK Jr. has been unwavering in his commitment to exposing this corruption. His positions, often distorted by the media, are rooted in science, compassion, and a deep belief in the right of every American to make informed choices for their families.
**But fighting for the truth has come at a cost.**
When the Biden Administration refused Secret Service protection for Kennedy during his campaign—a protection every major presidential candidate is entitled to—he was forced to secure private security, taking on significant debt to ensure his safety and the safety of his team.
[**Your contribution today will help retire this debt so Bobby can focus entirely on this fight, without distractions.**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=confirmation_11_27_24_nd1r&n=7)
[Help Retire Kennedy Debt](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=confirmation_11_27_24_nd1r&n=8)
Together, we can close this chapter and move forward with hope and determination, knowing that we’re on the right side of history..
Team Kennedy
[Mahanow.org](https://www.mahanow.org/r?u=y_k5EP27yTOsxSw3tqBFMOXUy1MXBZnG7PhKqYOpRo0&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=confirmation_11_27_24_nd1r&n=9)
P.S. The Senate hearings will be a defining moment, not just for RFK Jr., but for the future of accountability in this country. Your support will help define this moment.
[**Donate now to retire the debt >>**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=confirmation_11_27_24_nd1r&n=10)

Team, Tina wants to hear from you: What’s on your mind? What issues are you and your family talking about around the dinner table? **[Take a few moments to fill out our priorities survey here>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97755632/514475961/588769273?refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20241127_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGRlMzcxZi1kYWFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vmQRUVqYmDWNudMEsqEvsMfqaj-Cu2pbZAnD5PcCI_U=&emci=bd5cb29d-d4ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=0dde371f-daac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=6227932)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97755637/514475964/588769273?refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20241127_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGRlMzcxZi1kYWFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vmQRUVqYmDWNudMEsqEvsMfqaj-Cu2pbZAnD5PcCI_U=&emci=bd5cb29d-d4ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=0dde371f-daac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=6227932)

After the election, our team is taking time to think about how we can defend our hard-fought rights and freedoms and continue to deliver for hard-working Minnesotans.
Tina will never quit the fight for what’s right, no matter the challenges we may face.
She wants to know what matters most to you in the coming months, **[which is why we’d appreciate you taking some time to fill out our post-election priorities survey. It should only take a minute or two, tops!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97755638/514475968/588769273?refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20241127_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGRlMzcxZi1kYWFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vmQRUVqYmDWNudMEsqEvsMfqaj-Cu2pbZAnD5PcCI_U=&emci=bd5cb29d-d4ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=0dde371f-daac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=6227932)**

What issues are you and your family talking about around the dinner table? | After the election, our team is taking time to think about how we can defend our hard-fought rights and freedoms and continue to deliver for hard-working Minnesotans. Tina will never quit the fight for what’s right, no matter the challenges we may face. She wants to know what matters most to you in the coming months, Thank you for sharing with Tina!
