name: Jenna Burns
subject: Imagine our shock
body:
Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.
Dear Fellow Patriot,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=aaa0b04c6381457e8e10fb2092b5dad0&_e=_G7GYEZr-nH8hcp8--Qvy3NxLamP7zI1PCV84mI3LCxY8f7_K6zwH9zMixH1rIGNNEF4R56_WqjCN6Y5SwUdVtwjPkt2BZ1oA9pBanA1Tf2YcSORPdRH7ZjHLFl-47BD2f8hdTnzBC_kuuvuB4PXfZuLrFZZE45_QKNKkfP4mhvmjPQrK9EeXed8sAKB0o7U4O2z8IUjX7KLaSXK-70mjx63bqc9gcep1XbxGcWIXLVYZisEPb--bnH9JlRjyoqnRhoSdgr5Fmpj1OuKd3xcZoDNy0iCBcwhr9bnNr5rckyZYju4Xfw-vLR3-ITWoUAoY8qSIQC2mFKQLHIMZTO0PhaydzGCcNI12LD84VFV4NL9dHtpHl1yZZ-q33W_Cbux)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=aaa0b04c6381457e8e10fb2092b5dad0&_e=_G7GYEZr-nH8hcp8--Qvy3NxLamP7zI1PCV84mI3LCxY8f7_K6zwH9zMixH1rIGNNEF4R56_WqjCN6Y5SwUdVtwjPkt2BZ1oA9pBanA1Tf2YcSORPdRH7ZjHLFl-47BD2f8hdTnzBC_kuuvuB4PXfZuLrFZZE45_QKNKkfP4mhvmjPQrK9EeXed8sAKB0o7U4O2z8IUjX7KLaSXK-70mjx63bqc9gcep1XbxGcWIXLXTNN3ASmMJTFg6VPFTd9gmiKcWELv0mq4kn9p30cGrl4nJMiXrMbV3t_7BjAjAUrUwoICaVKhugxvs6evqT59Sg_vjYn7oQFGVaAz4c2NIiIwBwGQCwIXkdg-WcfY435CwXACMESOyGdPTnoIkwtb0)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=aaa0b04c6381457e8e10fb2092b5dad0&_e=_G7GYEZr-nH8hcp8--Qvy3NxLamP7zI1PCV84mI3LCxY8f7_K6zwH9zMixH1rIGNNEF4R56_WqjCN6Y5SwUdVtwjPkt2BZ1oA9pBanA1Tf2YcSORPdRH7ZjHLFl-47BD2f8hdTnzBC_kuuvuB4PXfZuLrFZZE45_QKNKkfP4mhvmjPQrK9EeXed8sAKB0o7U4O2z8IUjX7KLaSXK-70mjx63bqc9gcep1XbxGcWIXLWhPjCqQgVDSvuh_qZpKRGlyEEXmqML8eL-lsPiXDVLRoyq-6LcLlVxp4FATzr6R7PHDsuqigdR28zUfbM65W_-EO-vWoNik9df2mUXXy7NrY65wonqvI8qXT84oPnVgc7-iWprPEAZuz3_Du6o5zUN)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=aaa0b04c6381457e8e10fb2092b5dad0&_e=_G7GYEZr-nH8hcp8--Qvy3NxLamP7zI1PCV84mI3LCxY8f7_K6zwH9zMixH1rIGNNEF4R56_WqjCN6Y5SwUdVtwjPkt2BZ1oA9pBanA1Tf2YcSORPdRH7ZjHLFl-47BD2f8hdTnzBC_kuuvuB4PXfZuLrFZZE45_QKNKkfP4mhvmjPQrK9EeXed8sAKB0o7U4O2z8IUjX7KLaSXK-70mjx63bqc9gcep1XbxGcWIXLWy8_m1Xvr6b-zlXJOM3vy52-U_SZLmPrThlA6KuofwTc3A21CixmnFG9O7E79O6t2MMi5KT-_RodHvEoDegmoGBkfP8LpMhgqWcurqQ5iN7Pnl6-VmBBCYWzFmNeduB5hQ5pXuumI8ArQqAZP0m2-n)**

James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=aaa0b04c6381457e8e10fb2092b5dad0&_e=_G7GYEZr-nH8hcp8--Qvy3NxLamP7zI1PCV84mI3LCxY8f7_K6zwH9zMixH1rIGNNEF4R56_WqjCN6Y5SwUdVtwjPkt2BZ1oA9pBanA1Tf2YcSORPdRH7ZjHLFl-47BD2f8hdTnzBC_kuuvuB4PXfZuLrFZZE45_QKNKkfP4mhvmjPQrK9EeXed8sAKB0o7U4O2z8IUjX7KLaSXK-70mjx63bqc9gcep1XbxGcWIXLXGR3WTh6NwwXXYragl6L3Vf_1K7Cjz_ERo52Wv8Ow0mfEpD1janbAsl3Zq7tljBiSITa1d5wCAn0k69rWLKOn2VXGeyQzk2GfL3309at3n58SRFXTG9tD5gbZ2nFKnfILO_b4cic0eQfZtULf_hjBU)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=aaa0b04c6381457e8e10fb2092b5dad0&_e=_G7GYEZr-nH8hcp8--Qvy3NxLamP7zI1PCV84mI3LCxY8f7_K6zwH9zMixH1rIGNNEF4R56_WqjCN6Y5SwUdVtwjPkt2BZ1oA9pBanA1Tf2YcSORPdRH7ZjHLFl-47BD2f8hdTnzBC_kuuvuB4PXfZuLrFZZE45_QKNKkfP4mhvmjPQrK9EeXed8sAKB0o7U4O2z8IUjX7KLaSXK-70mjx63bqc9gcep1XbxGcWIXLXQJ82VJF29boVC-vEx6rkHkti1rptiBy_3floVqa6eRUU6etqkcmNpEEfMjHfmjh9MJtd0-Vzk2vQeu656xUh56-t3SCGoCw2-9WOdLd-AtoE8o5oi09hBmwZJABsA9dQummhgQNULmAOcFJ-DO0NO)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=aaa0b04c6381457e8e10fb2092b5dad0&_e=_G7GYEZr-nH8hcp8--Qvy3NxLamP7zI1PCV84mI3LCxY8f7_K6zwH9zMixH1rIGNNEF4R56_WqjCN6Y5SwUdVtwjPkt2BZ1oA9pBanA1Tf2YcSORPdRH7ZjHLFl-47BD2f8hdTnzBC_kuuvuB4PXfZuLrFZZE45_QKNKkfP4mhvmjPQrK9EeXed8sAKB0o7U4O2z8IUjX7KLaSXK-70mjx63bqc9gcep1XbxGcWIXLWydi3wau0UkTDTSS11tQE3kRM5nZPyJUSTZHGrLJkhGGWol8ew6phOrjNMkChTyzIBkVBX9DkCp-nEQFeM4CWzDEi2vhslx4RZVzw48QOnD0BCNBdl9J4LbiiWavajn04Q9EJb3-HanJ35w9oXk5dZ)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=aaa0b04c6381457e8e10fb2092b5dad0&_e=_G7GYEZr-nH8hcp8--Qvy_CiedLENiwVI8FDmbzdUJZ6KU3Q9W4-0DtAqRFp747GRV42nNtdwQLB37rEk_KcC_jCYP-jg_sPTKm8CG0lNzvhFM22aCZL7lYXj1L7qKcFmmL_EbdG5-MydnhyK2ptMd-TDPpkuPCxfCX2SLTuut9Z-_jBC-6I6zcozbIyV7QdclIEci8oMFPwmHfoq3rotw%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Click [here](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=aaa0b04c6381457e8e10fb2092b5dad0&_t=PpqRBMsGXzEoq4_eKOkKwvDLsQ7IQblU2lvHS40KOcSh0pgkmQuis5PI7eQPA_4rZCsXfx_bKipqmRGrxmF55DOZb1do2CguuAM1QbDn2FpkgXtUaPiJrep8OmiyBpzo) to unsubscribe

name: Tim Walz
subject: Happy Thanksgiving, Peter.
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
As Gwen, Hope, Gus, and I prepare to celebrate Thanksgiving with family and friends, I want to extend my deepest gratitude to you for your support this year.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97756343/514478054/2014215487?refcode=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTQyZGFjNy1kYmFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tM3IjH1xOI0WnDN3UnESfwiYQ58SEx3eWghi-GmsFMg=)
---
Peter,
As Gwen, Hope, Gus, and I prepare to celebrate Thanksgiving with family and friends, I want to extend my deepest gratitude to you for your support this year.

I’m grateful,
Tim Walz

Friend, For this Native American Heritage Month, I joined my colleagues in Congress to honor the rich traditions, culture, and history of Indigenous people who have endured centuries of oppression with unwavering resilience. Their contributions to our communities are immeasurable, including Natives’ ongoing fight for justice and sovereignty. I’m committed to protecting Native rights, including supporting policies like the _Truth and Healing Commission on Indian Boarding School Policies Act_ , which my Native colleague **Rep. Sharice Davids** introduced. This legislation would establish a Federal Commission to investigate the histories and impacts of federal policies that forcibly removed Native children from their homes as part of cultural genocide and coercive assimilation. As Sharice explained:
> _“My grandparents are survivors of Indian boarding schools, but many other children never returned to their families or their communities. Those that did lost generations worth of cultural knowledge, stories, and traditions. Establishing a Truth and Healing Commission would bring survivors, experts, federal partners, and Tribal leaders to the table to fully investigate what happened to our relatives and work towards a brighter path for the next seven generations.”_
I’m proud to be among 80 co-sponsors of the bill, which has bipartisan support and could actually pass in this session of Congress before the end of the year. [**Will you sign on today to show your support for the**** _Truth and Healing Commission on Indian Boarding School Policies Act_****?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5SB8MEJSN3qsaNNDjMZuJabHL6OqCX5RMTlH_78dLTCMDpwZQqRlifiAmNIMs_s1sbPfUAtJ9LKCJP23eXYIn1GtBooeInTRC88FRH8PIWHWbM0qbsx3Vd1WYn67B6M5-A5V8B12jUwYgQTfsr5IcmWpJL7Xu5Q47-z4BB5p3dxJqt3g39R5BJbHPjBwe8nQOnfFgnvxcwpOxr8xkGNQdt8UnKAD8hUoE2zh6U0ZcPZzCKAUE9WL_ULvnO4hI0HeKNFfbPxuXovoQ3n6eRKTeDA7X8EWnE7DdO0w-p63tN3jbTOVrfCRaRf7UWdcL_UN69uWm2L2MIaZKFA1iKyyKarEofwbJ9ySNy4x51g9Qvk_EIWO0aChF784KYU2MRd7ufh22rVrO39782nWynCZAkbESFRZPcCr7Nm6twdH1u29WyN2ii6ztSpFweSyDZ-m0AuA3s8uSeIxiIqNHFTcnbwZ4fVEomsNGdTwdU6zkUbm-ZesKtfHkc9NWp5HEbVV6/4bt/_C6KhUvsRT2kOWqe4pPE3Q/h1/h001.b9cPujgg_bZeHkTTkV6YuimO6n8_CLz_uQ3I0H1W2ck) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5SB8MEJSN3qsaNNDjMZuJabHL6OqCX5RMTlH_78dLTCMDpwZQqRlifiAmNIMs_s1sbPfUAtJ9LKCJP23eXYIn1GtBooeInTRC88FRH8PIWHWnNVosWFCs4zm8NvjnT1VP0rCQAMMbChlfRFlgKd3NWh8_Rq4YzChWdyH7RRwzLOBg5ZEHeJ-nqCF32EPa86tPzQ0w6x5pqBt1lJsNr4DuqmKgY8NdjHLzFs3-U8UhbiHKBZyTiZ1ZYg9uJeKe2D21qD3AavXwDwbhrSEafCjH76Q52E53Z6WdvuW3vYa_ivSKtzg07osae9bU5lhEzaij8bhbyBpkHVfx8yYEr4K7HvxhhpgF2nyIN82IFntUm9B3WB3W6YaYtoBpHfyenVtnaY-qJkX6puykiDuwgTllIuFR6UzZE8SlxEbDMHn8T9m849mskiIWl2IfUpRKGcGUC45I8BRWANC0_CWmUE9LQqQ2PzGB-j-F3Z5FyO_Oq-sjTFPctEqGpNluluddk_IL/4bt/_C6KhUvsRT2kOWqe4pPE3Q/h2/h001.MiAyJF5ocVfBIFTIXdFD9TKVwN1dZvz2MPAf25Y3M4Q)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Navigate Revelation: Find Hope and Understanding
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWta4cXWON
If you take a step back and look at global events through the
lens of someone who isn't a Christian,

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWta4cXWON

Hello
Friend,
The Book
of Revelation can be one of the most challenging books of the
Bible to understand, but its message is critical for every
believer. That's why I've created Final Conquest: A
Verse-by-Verse Study of the Book of Revelation-a clear and
accessible guide that breaks down complex prophecies into
practical, easy-to-understand insights.

This
resource is designed exclusively for those who want to deepen
their understanding of the end times and live with greater
purpose in light of Christ's return. Whether you've studied
Revelation before or are approaching it for the first time, Final
Conquest offers clarity on what's to come and how to prepare your
heart for the future.
As the
Senior Pastor of First Baptist Dallas and Pathway to Victory,
I've spent years studying and teaching through Revelation,
ensuring that this book is both biblically sound and grounded in
trustworthy scholarship. You can be confident that Final Conquest
will provide a credible and reliable exploration of the final
book of the Bible.

For your
gift of any amount to Pathway to Victory, I'd be honored to send
you this exclusive resource. It's an invaluable tool that will
help you navigate the future with confidence and hope, all while
deepening your walk with Christ.

Request
your copy here:
https://secure.ptv.org/final-conquest-generous-gift-kit-1

Thank you
for joining us in sharing the truth of God's Word. Together, we
can help others live with clarity and purpose as we look forward
to Christ's return.

Sharing
the truth of God's Word,
Dr.
Robert Jeffress

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Empower your child with timeless biblical values
body:
Brand-new kid's book "The 10 Commandments for Kids"
Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return?
| | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1b158f9ef9704322a8f80d837dbb94bc&_e=Ga0HOuW9Nz7lX8ty5DnmJ4mn5Wu2JnP3U43MdXT8_0ACma56QoDdgekW6n7PbLY4BiS8yOTJbkVvdhfVzJn8lttZy7lZ40ZS9gZfmm3beP_pVOSisAJEEpfCpSBY7os-tLk4pWg4s8RNCze8YrlrF5SZI2UxkBgEVpveJIUA4vNGInv9PKrLxs6Ldra9JZ7wycpQvNUBCkYHg2doURZoqOxebk3QxS2V94wWMUuyTVJweHU5A9gsQO4UQo7j206k3GGO5yyYPZETMeipZf_uSzyqqshsaomGPYjY0vPCZju1NRB0SJxNNTEq_9ZylA_rxxeZIU5x563fqyisv1C9Am4xKk5W0TvLfpMQyXgD3S3Er8bIzT1_uZ6NcM05kA1F)
---
Hello Friend,

Despite court rulings in Louisiana and Oklahoma that make the teaching of the Bible and the 10 Commandments mandatory in public schools and universities, we still live in a time when the foundational teachings of the Ten Commandments are no longer emphasized in our public schools and daily lives. As a result, our children are growing up without these essential, God-honoring rules for living.

In this culture of moral confusion, the Ten Commandments provide clear, simple answers about what it means to live a righteous life. Teaching these commandments to children not only instills a sense of security and purpose but also fosters emotional resilience, intellectual acuity, and ethical integrity. The Ten Commandments uphold traditional values and celebrate the family unit as foundational to society, helping children navigate life's challenges with confidence and grace.
---
| | That's why I'm excited to introduce my brand new kids book, _The 10 Commandments for Kids_ book. This book offers kids ten Bible lessons about God's simple rules for living, with each chapter explaining one commandment, discussion questions, applications, and prayers to say together. It's a trustworthy resource for children to read on their own, during church services, or as part of vacation Bible school studies.
---
| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1b158f9ef9704322a8f80d837dbb94bc&_e=Ga0HOuW9Nz7lX8ty5DnmJ4mn5Wu2JnP3U43MdXT8_0ACma56QoDdgekW6n7PbLY4BiS8yOTJbkVvdhfVzJn8lttZy7lZ40ZS9gZfmm3beP_pVOSisAJEEpfCpSBY7os-tLk4pWg4s8RNCze8YrlrF5SZI2UxkBgEVpveJIUA4vNGInv9PKrLxs6Ldra9JZ7wycpQvNUBCkYHg2doURZoqOxebk3QxS2V94wWMUuyTVIPGkYf_blPKhoCTS83xImCqFduNU6Dbu-4-pTyUkUMHxy34Isg837FwUtys9f3FQBF2NdA0uXcTdwTHwrmtlPR1dh3QGGioZ0Ogt86_NUrvFsdyNQS2SO1va5BO7b_qB1nxLLzntLk0Xss6lKVmU2K)
---
| | Additionally, for the adults in your life, I've written,_The 10: How to Live and Love in a World That Has Lost Its Way_. This book will refresh your understanding and application of the Ten Commandments, showing how living by these principles can improve our personal lives, relationships, churches, and communities.

**I encourage you to point your children or grandchildren towards Jesus Christ.**

For a gift of any amount to support Pathway to Victory, I will send you both books: [https://secure.ptv.org/the-10-commandments-for-kids-generous-gift-1](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1b158f9ef9704322a8f80d837dbb94bc&_e=Ga0HOuW9Nz7lX8ty5DnmJ4mn5Wu2JnP3U43MdXT8_0ACma56QoDdgekW6n7PbLY4BiS8yOTJbkVvdhfVzJn8lttZy7lZ40ZS9gZfmm3beP_pVOSisAJEEpfCpSBY7os-tLk4pWg4s8RNCze8YrlrF5SZI2UxkBgEVpveJIUA4vNGInv9PKrLxs6Ldra9JZ7wycpQvNUBCkYHg2doURZoqOxebk3QxS2V94wWMUuyTVIu2fdekogAkJhvnrmcQcJpsWKt5Wp13Qm8qNhQEIaqM3P8HynBJ9WO221sH5g73URwldr4M2wu4kCIRasiSLk-slhqR1iexMfos8nQN6f8CRLv_8K9Y4uJ_oi-OX5ZGdD9-qrG8Zy09-RFL7TrxGys)

Your generosity enables _Pathway to Victory_ to share bold biblical truths with a broken world. Together, we will make a difference and bring people closer to Christ.

Thank you for standing with us and sharing the gospel of Jesus Christ.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word,

Dr. Robert Jeffress

PO Box 223609. Dallas, TX 75222
[
Unsubscribe](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=1b158f9ef9704322a8f80d837dbb94bc&_t=OPmtPticV1BCD2Ry36M8g8ykPe8vaOIDTWKoJQA1OBPQF-xNS7dLEX7cFTsU1OTBnl1TMq1GC90CYibWPbc_GRnqH1eVePUl-xzpnt1KgY0NtUR5QC9UJ8gGarPNokqb)

name: Shontel Brown
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97758098/514483690/-211760203?refcode=EM_C_241127thanks_N_SB_90DO_4_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDEyZWIwMi1kZmFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zUJsGIwEwZQCA_Um7faN4GL0p76AYRCu1PmmXbLuuno=) Hi Peter,

I wanted to reach out before Thanksgiving and express my gratitude for your ongoing support.

I am so grateful to have been re-elected to serve as Congresswoman of Ohio’s 11th District this month. It is an absolute honor to be in the position to continue fighting for the American people with you by my side. Our victory would not have been possible without the tireless work of my team, volunteers, and supporters, who have donated to support my campaign.

The next four years will be tough. But I know that together, we are up for the battle. We will continue to work to ensure that we move our nation forward, not back, and defend our democracy for generations to come.

I hope you are able to spend the next few days surrounded by your family and friends, enjoy good food, and relax. Over the next few weeks, we can prepare to build towards a nation that we want to see. But for now, I just wanted to say thank you for your support.

Together,

Shontel | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?
---

name: With Honor Action
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WITH HONOR ACTION, INC
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c17b7394dbbc/2-acts-and-a-vp-nominee-14050486?e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c17b7394dbbc/2-acts-and-a-vp-nominee-14050486?e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| | | |
---
| | | | Friends, Happy Thanksgiving from With Honor Action! There is a lot to be thankful for this year, but we are especially thankful for our veterans and current service members who have sacrificed so much in defense of this great nation. As millions of Americans prepare to gather around the table with friends and family, it is important to consider the inconceivable fact that nearly 325,000 active-duty service members are currently considered food insecure. To combat this, members of the bipartisan For Country Caucus have worked together on fixing this critical issue. For example, founding Co-Chair Rep. Don Bacon and founding Vice Chair Rep. Chrissy Houlahan led the bipartisan House Armed Services Committee’s [Military Quality of Life Panel](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=df0cd99e9b&e=33f53a5b1a). Thanks to their principled veteran leadership, the panel’s recommendations served as a basis for this year’s House version of the National Defense Authorization Act, including legislation to address [military food insecurity](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=d7ed537ad7&e=33f53a5b1a) and contributing factors such as [service member pay](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=8d0461bb64&e=33f53a5b1a) and [military spouse employment](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=355fc2b250&e=33f53a5b1a).

This is just one example of how the [For Country Caucus](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=4433d1f51f&e=33f53a5b1a) has been hard at work fighting polarization in Congress and getting real things done for the American people. Find out what some of these veterans are thankful for this year and how they are celebrating below.
---
| [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=a50d0b48b9&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| We hope you have a great Thanksgiving! To learn more about With Honor Action and our work to combat food insecurity in the military, check out our website [here](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=c52808fa43&e=33f53a5b1a).

and consider forwarding this to a friend who may be interested in learning -- and doing -- more for our country.

name: Chair Jaime Harrison (via Democrats.org)
subject: Happy Thanksgiving, Derek:
body:
I want to personally thank you for all of your hard work this year.
---
Derek, As Thanksgiving approaches, I wanted to personally thank you for all of your hard work this year and reflect on where we’ve been as we look forward. As we look back on a tough election cycle, I am grateful for our devoted public servants and the people who volunteer, campaign, and pour their hearts out every day to support our shared values of democracy, equality, and opportunity for all. That includes you, Derek. While the result of the presidential race was not what we fought so hard for, your commitment to this work ensured that the Democratic Party could invest in all 57 state and territory parties this year, hiring organizing staff across the country early and building state party infrastructure. Those investments helped Democrats win Senate races in battleground states like Michigan, Wisconsin, Nevada, and Arizona, send two Black women to the U.S. Senate, win critical down-ballot races in states like North Carolina, and more. You helped make that possible. Thank you. Soon, a new administration and Congress will be sworn in, and our focus will turn to defending the hard-won progress we’ve made. In moments like these, I’m reminded of a saying we have in South Carolina: “While I breathe, I hope.” The work we did together this year was a profound expression of hope. And it’s that same hope that _must_ carry us forward as we continue our fight for a more perfect union. Our work continues, Derek. But this week, I hope you have a chance to get some well-deserved rest and spend time with loved ones. And on behalf of the entire team at the Democratic Party, we wish you a happy Thanksgiving. Thank you for being a part of this team. Jaime Jaime Harrison
Chair
Democratic National Committee [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2024?refcode=em_20241127_2352_mi&refcode2=2352_22930333_M-T2VY&akid=2352%2E22930333%2EM-T2VY)

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

As we look back on a tough election cycle, I am grateful for our devoted public servants and the people who volunteer, campaign, and pour their hearts out every day to support our shared values of democracy, equality, and opportunity for all. That includes you, Derek. While the result of the presidential race was not what we fought so hard for, your commitment to this work ensured that the Democratic Party could invest in all 57 state and territory parties this year, hiring organizing staff across the country early and building state party infrastructure. Those investments helped Democrats win Senate races in battleground states like Michigan, Wisconsin, Nevada, and Arizona, send two Black women to the U.S. Senate, win critical down-ballot races in states like North Carolina, and more. You helped make that possible. Thank you. Soon, a new administration and Congress will be sworn in, and our focus will turn to defending the hard-won progress we’ve made. In moments like these, I’m reminded of a saying we have in South Carolina: “While I breathe, I hope.” The work we did together this year was a profound expression of hope. And it’s that same hope that must carry us forward as we continue our fight for a more perfect union. Our work continues, Derek. But this week, I hope you have a chance to get some well-deserved rest and spend time with loved ones. And on behalf of the entire team at the Democratic Party, we wish you a happy Thanksgiving. Thank you for being a part of this team. Jaime Jaime Harrison Chair Democratic National Committee If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

Dear Friend, Do you feel motivated by the Word of God every time you read your Bible?

How comfortable are you with reading Scripture? Does it energize you or overwhelm you?

[Take this 5-question quiz to see how well you study the Bible >>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=659f451f8a2a4c76aced2cf1f11587ab&_e=rnJU0eq1hz7-ENAhaeRKt5cZUoWO8ZsJiIWW0YM5hm0FvFnSQ5y8r6TLlh3g6mGwiBgmipxLgIsCHuQz5gzI52ggqPLIhc_W3pTiwWiSBX0KuhwKFUevwGeE8z2ef1U4pR7M1u8wbyM5gmrUZxgEcN084B5jAVGIbVlhhd4TtcN8yLpex35tCJu2XiqRmZf2DuNxJkpl6mrGspCkw8C-rcccKJSFCz8lIeoIfo0Lx2TCI6p3-P7WDcsAAP8Mv27HsznuyWXxbGuGbtoZF3bFmouXjphglIJCJR_vQMdI4EtFuB-i5rdyh9kR4nhlRYW58moNuDIYz9ul8Zj1IXHO9s7hJzNZQSBXGImVwgjE6gQ%3D)

Studying the Bible is hard and time-consuming. You may find it confusing, difficult, or dry. Please let me encourage you and offer you some guidance:

1\. God loves it when you read His Word.
**2\. The goal of studying the Bible is not information --it's transformation.**

No matter what is happening in your life, the Word responds to your deepest needs. It is alive and powerful.

Reading Scripture affects our minds and souls. We are transformed to be people who resist temptation and are resilient in crisis. Understanding the Word helps us be more like Christ and model that for others.

[Wondering how your approach to understanding the Bible can grow? This quiz will help guide you toward a more intentional, fulfilling Bible study experience.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=659f451f8a2a4c76aced2cf1f11587ab&_e=rnJU0eq1hz7-ENAhaeRKt5cZUoWO8ZsJiIWW0YM5hm0FvFnSQ5y8r6TLlh3g6mGwiBgmipxLgIsCHuQz5gzI52ggqPLIhc_W3pTiwWiSBX0KuhwKFUevwGeE8z2ef1U4pR7M1u8wbyM5gmrUZxgEcN084B5jAVGIbVlhhd4TtcN8yLpex35tCJu2XiqRmZf2DuNxJkpl6mrGspCkw8C-rRBsnk1--zrwQFYegRatzPgiYJFi4TxM_8cEy13y8zsu1Y3vLZwqzjSNZc7-_xAkpr8wwaW1vtjec0jn3d0tdrQD6nYySYoPB5HPifW72YNA5GByvi2wu8v7IW2gRjcsj0oBcOgfuoMpN4eWvEIPM30%3D)

clean_body: They LOVE us, fname, because WE are SAVING our students! | | | Trump KNOWS that Elon Musk is one of the most brilliant people on EARTH! ELON: “The value of money in local races is much higher than it is in national races.” Allow us to explain... As Elon said, the value of a donation to local races is MUCH higher than it is in national races! Elon didn’t just VALIDATE our strategy... He also exposed the GLARING AND DESTRUCTIVE reality in our school system today. Our schools are INFESTED with radical leftists from the ground up. Elon said it best: “Parents don’t realize the level of soviet indoctrination their children are receiving.” The radical left has known this for DECADES & leftist billionaires like George Soros have been using this advantage to, as Tucker Carlson put it: “REMAKE SOCIETY!” But for the first time ever, the 1776 Project PAC is leading the CONSERVATIVE COMEBACK at the local level! - We have the plan... And now we’re on track to launch the LARGEST Conservative school board campaign operation in the HISTORY of America! But we can’t do it without your help... We don’t rely on billionaires or mega-corporations... name: Del. Sam Rasoul
subject: Happy Thanksgiving, 2024 Drumstick Dash, VMT Deck the Rails, and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized By Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Email%20Logo.png] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Sam%20Headshot.png]
ACROSS THE COMMONWEALTH
VOTE TODAY! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Make%20A%20Plan%20To%20Vote.png]
You can vote for November's elections NOW! Vote at your Registrar's office during business hours. Saturday early voting is available October 28th and November 4th. Learn More [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
Find your local Registrar's office here: https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/VWCC.jpeg] 15 years of the Community College Access Program at VWCC
Learn More [https://www.wdbj7.com/2023/09/26/virginia-western-celebrates-15th-anniversary-ccap-program/] CCAP is a successful public/private partnership that pays the cost of tuition for three years at Virginia Western Community College if a qualified student does not have sufficient financial aid to pay tuition costs.
This program has helped over 4,200 students achieve higher education!
CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT
https://karenforvirginia.com/ [https://karenforvirginia.com/] Karen Jenkins for HB-89
Donate Here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/karenforvirginia] Karen Jenkins is a life-long resident of the City of Suffolk. Throughout her lifetime she has passionately advocated for others and currently serves on the Suffolk School Board with a proven track record and history of accomplishments. She is running for the House of Delegates for the 89th District to continue delivering results for the people of Virginia.
She is a champion for education, public safety and mental health. As your next Delegate for the 89th District, she will continue to fight and vote for meaningful policies and legislation to support the needs of the district. At the state level, she will be positioned to write and sponsor bills and laws to benefit the schools and communities in the 89th District and throughout the commonwealth.
LOCAL CANDIDATE EVENTS
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/lily%20canvass.png]
Canvass for Lily Franklin!
On Sundays, join Team Lily at the South County Library Parking Lot from 12 - 12:30 pm for a Roanoke canvassing event!
Bring your walking shoes, a charged cell phone, and water. When you arrive to their launch location you will receive a brief training and literature before being sent out to turf. Questions? Email Beth at egunter3@gmail.com [egunter3@gmail.com] or call 540-353-3645.
South County Library Parking Lot, 6303 Merriman Rd, Roanoke, VA 24018
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/sam%20and%20trish.jpg]
Canvass for Sam and Trish!
*this is a place holder until the new facebook event is created*
Join us Sunday to canvass for Sam and Trish! Meet our Field Coordinator, Dom, on September 3rd at the Williamson Road Library, 12:00pm.
Located at 3837 Williamson Rd, Roanoke, VA 24012.
IN THE COMMUNITY
https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story [https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story] https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424 [https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424]
Roanoke River Contamination Settlement Reached Roanoke Young Democrats Canvass Tailgate
Without current regulations, the water contamination caused by these companies could have been so much worse. Come out to support Roanoke Valley Democratic candidates!
Read More [https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story] The Roanoke Young Democrats will be enjoying pizza, coffee, donuts and more before canvassing to knock for Trish White-Boyd, Sam Rasoul, Lily Franklin, Samantha Newell, Jade Harris, & Nancy Horn. Door knocking will begin about 12:30 pm!
Read More [https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424]
Roanoke EnVision Center Kids Movie Night - Sept. 28 Fall Harvest Festival
The movie is free and there will be snacks and much more! Fall into wellness at the Harvest Festival!
Read More Celebrate the end of farm season with fun experiences for the whole family. Try new activities to support your well-being. Connect with others in a beautiful outdoor space. Free meals available with registration. This event is free and open to everyone!
Read More [https://web.cvent.com/event/19422342-be4f-417d-9fc3-6a6bf883e794/summary]
https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992 [https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992] https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/ [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game - Oct. 1 Henrietta Lacks Statue Unveiling - Oct. 4
Join us for the 6th Annual Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game, being held at the Home of the Salem Red Sox - Carilion Clinic Field. A dignified sculpture will commemorate the ongoing and long unrecognized contributions of Roanoke native Henrietta Lacks, who unknowingly provided the world with the HeLa cell, fueling decades of life-saving and life changing research.
Physicians, nurses and administrators will suit up for each hospital during the nine-inning contest. Proceeds will benefit the American Heart Association. Unveiling is October 4th at 11 am at Henrietta Lacks Plaza.
Admission is $5 at the gate, kids under 10 free. Gates open at 1pm and the game starts at 2pm. 410 3rd St SW, Roanoke, VA 24011
Read More [https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992] Read More [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RCDC.jpeg] Join the Roanoke City Democrats!
Roanoke City Democratic Committee meetings are now in-person and open to non-members. We meet the 3rd Thursday of each month. This month we are meeting at 6 pm at the Main Library (706 S Jefferson St, Roanoke, VA 24016). Sign up for meeting reminders and other information here [https://www.roanokedemocrats.com/subscribe] .
Join us for a social hour every first Thursday of the month at Leonore Restaurant, 128 Campbell St. SW, 5-7 pm.
Join Roanoke Young Dems! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RYD.png]
Meetings occur on the first Monday and third Sunday of every month in person and virtually. The goal of RYD is to help improve our community and to promote the names of Democratic candidates and policies.
Contact: YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com [YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com] to get involved!
Donate Today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/samrasoul]
Thank you for your support! If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out to me anytime.
My very best,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Screen%20Shot%202022-07-29%20at%203.44.06%20PM%20%281%29.png]
Del. Sam Rasoul
https://www.facebook.com/SamRasoulVA [https://www.facebook.com/SamRasoulVA] https://twitter.com/Sam_Rasoul [https://twitter.com/Sam_Rasoul] https://www.instagram.com/sam_rasoul/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sam_rasoul/?hl=en]
Paid for and Authorized By Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate
Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate
P.O. Box 13842
Roanoke, VA 24037
United States

name: Laura Gillen
subject: I’m grateful for you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
As we all head into our Thanksgiving festivities, I’m especially grateful for family, friends, and every grassroots supporter that made our victory in NY-04 possible.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97759881/514489107/-793159207?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTMwMzE2NS1lMWFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kyTMmeuGwvJUBugP9GuR48QnfdmjOR7viyI8VX9wzms=&emci=97f0385f-e1ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=2e303165-e1ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=7377580)
---
| Peter,

As we all head into our Thanksgiving festivities, I’m especially grateful for family, friends, and every grassroots supporter that made our victory in NY-04 possible.

This was one of the most competitive campaigns in the country – with so much at stake; but with the relentless hard work and support of all our teammates, we pulled off a victory and flipped this seat from red to blue! Please know how truly grateful I am for your support.

I wish you and yours a relaxing and happy Thanksgiving!

Many Thanks,

Laura Gillen
---

* * *

name: The Fight Starts Now [DOTL]
subject: Raskin says the DOJ will be a “Trump law firm”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
we’re worried, Peter

|
---
**After Matt Gaetz withdrew,** Trump tapped former Florida Attorney General Pam Bondi to lead the DOJ.

name: David Hogg
subject: A personal note
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
There's no downplaying it's been a hard year — both politically and personally.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20241127-1&t=1&akid=1477%2E587540%2EtFwnE9)
Peter,
There's no downplaying it's been a hard year — both politically and personally. Losing the presidency makes all we hope to achieve harder (but to be clear, NOT impossible). I also lost my dad, the best person I've ever known and the best father anyone could ask for.
So yeah...it's a little hard to face the holiday season ahead.
**If you're feeling the same way, here's something that's helping me: Harvey Milk's famous words that "You and you and you, you have to give people hope."**
Harvey had every reason not to hope. He'd lost multiple campaigns for local office in San Francisco. He was a gay man in a country where there were unrelenting political and physical attacks on LGBTQ+ people.
But despite his losses and the hate he faced, Harvey became the first openly gay elected official in California in 1977.
**If Harvey could find reasons to hope and fight and be thankful...then so can we. Here are a few of mine:**
* **Our Winning Local Candidates:** Molly Cook (TX-SD 15), Dante Pittman (NC-HD 24), Bryce Berry (GA-HD 56), Oscar De Los Santos (AZ-HD 11), Christine Cockley (OH-HD 6) — these 5 young progressives are going to be relentless fighters for their communities.
* **Sarah McBride (DE At-Large):** Sarah is on her way to the U.S. House of Representatives where she will be the first-ever openly transgender person to serve. Sarah's as tough as they come and determined to pass the same bills she did in the Delaware legislature like commonsense gun safety and paid sick leave.
* **You:** Yes, maybe that seems corny, but it's also true. None of these wins, none of what we're building for 2025 and 2026 and 2030 and 2050 are possible without YOU, Peter. **You receive these emails because you believed in the power of young progressive candidates and decided to do something about it. That matters — change rarely comes all at once. Instead, it is small actions adding up over time that bend the arc of the universe.**

However and wherever you are celebrating (or not) this Thanksgiving, know that you are in my heart. And I wouldn't ask for anyone else to be a part of this movement we're building.
In service,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20241127-1&t=2&refcode2=1477_587540_tFwnE9&akid=1477%2E587540%2EtFwnE9)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1477%2E587540%2EtFwnE9)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1477%2E587540%2EtFwnE9)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

subject: Trump Bibles and the Ten Commandments in schools?
body:
Parents deserve to know when their schools are being infiltrated by right-wing propaganda—and COURIER is here to expose it.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97760768/514491871/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmIzMDI3M2ItZTJhYy1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jxb3hhJ9a4WbvAS7UwcRqqtctC2zd4tE0vMas17M5F0=&emci=a730273b-e2ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=bb30273b-e2ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=14016711)
Peter **–**
The right isn’t stopping with dominating the media—they’re coming for the public schools, too.
Earlier this year, COURIER’s Arizona newsroom, _The Copper Courier_ , was the first to expose PragerU’s partnership with Arizona schools. Now, the same dangerous agenda is spreading to other states, infiltrating classrooms with right-wing propaganda and Christian nationalist teachings.
[**We’ll get into the details in a moment, but if you support COURIER’s effort to expose the right’s push into our local schools, can you chip in $25 now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97760769/514491872/-593472309?refcode=20241127-EM-PublicSchools&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmIzMDI3M2ItZTJhYy1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jxb3hhJ9a4WbvAS7UwcRqqtctC2zd4tE0vMas17M5F0=)
Parents deserve to know when their schools are being infiltrated by right-wing propaganda—and COURIER is here to expose it.
**Here’s what’s happening:**
* **In Texas,** the state school board approved a curriculum that teaches kids as young as four “the order of creation,” including that the world was made in six days. The Texas Freedom Network says it “verges on Christian proselytism.”
* **In Oklahoma,** the state superintendent announced plans to require public schools to “incorporate the Bible.” After Trump’s win, he proudly held up a “Trump Bible,” vowing to stand against the “woke mob.”
* **In Louisiana,** lawmakers passed a law requiring the Ten Commandments to be displayed in public schools.

While other newsrooms are shrinking or shifting rightward, COURIER’s teams are on the ground uncovering important local stories. Our 11 state-based newsrooms don’t just report the facts—they confront the disinformation spreading through battleground communities and empower voters with the truth.
We know the Christian right’s infiltration into our schools isn’t an isolated issue—it’s part of a long-term strategy to reshape our institutions and normalize extremism. We can stop this agenda by bringing trusted, pro-democracy news directly to vulnerable communities, but we can’t do it without your help.
[**Join us in the fight. Chip in $25 or whatever you can today to help COURIER expose the truth and defend our communities from far-right propaganda.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97760770/514491873/-593472309?refcode=20241127-EM-PublicSchools&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmIzMDI3M2ItZTJhYy1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jxb3hhJ9a4WbvAS7UwcRqqtctC2zd4tE0vMas17M5F0=)

---
| |
---
|
Team,
Tracy and I want to wish you and your loved ones a Happy Thanksgiving! As Americans, we certainly have much to be thankful for. We are blessed to live in a country where our rights come from God.
Please say a prayer for all our men and women in the military who are serving overseas and away from home this holiday season, defending freedom. I am thankful fellow Americans re-elected Donald J. Trump, and come January we will have a majority in the House and the Senate. While celebrating with family and friends, take time to think about what you are thankful for.
Thanks to your huge team effort, we received more votes by far than anyone in history for the 5th Congressional District and we received more votes than the top of the ticket in just about all 24 counties in the 5th. Also, Trump gained his largest percentage of new votes in Virginia from the 5th Congressional District.
Thank you for your prayers and your vote. We have much work to do. I am looking forward to getting sworn in on January 3rd and representing you as your Congressman for Virginia's 5th Congressional District.
---
| For God and Country,
---
|
---
State Senator John McGuire Congressman-Elect VA 05 Soli Deo Gloria

clean_body: McGuire achives huge VA05 Vote Record | | | | == | == | | | Team, Tracy and I want to wish you and your loved ones a Happy Thanksgiving! As Americans, we certainly have much to be thankful for. We are blessed to live in a country where our rights come from God. Please say a prayer for all our men and women in the military who are serving overseas and away from home this holiday season, defending freedom. I am thankful fellow Americans re-elected Donald J. Trump, and come January we will have a majority in the House and the Senate. While celebrating with family and friends, take time to think about what you are thankful for. Thanks to your huge team effort, we received more votes by far than anyone in history for the 5th Congressional District and we received more votes than the top of the ticket in just about all 24 counties in the 5th. Also, Trump gained his largest percentage of new votes in Virginia from the 5th Congressional District. Thank you for your prayers and your vote. We have much work to do. I am looking forward to getting sworn in on January 3rd and representing you as your Congressman for Virginia's 5th Congressional District. | For God and Country, | State Senator John McGuire Congressman-Elect VA 05 Soli Deo Gloria Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL == -Trump Endorsed -NRA Endorsed -Susan B. Anthony's List Endorsed -RJC Endorsed -Mark Levin Endorsed Pro-Life Pro-Gun Pro-Israel American Legion Member VFW (Life Member) NRA (Life Member) Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 (Life Member) America 1st The Spirit of Virginia == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA == == john@mcguireva.com www.mcguireva.com | | | | == | | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by McGuire for Virginia | | | | McGuire for Virginia | PO Box 242 | Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 US | | | | | | |

Clearly the past 5 months of talking about high utility bills going into an election had no impact on the election in Connecticut. Despite massive uproar by [68,000 angry utility customers](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ad21abac-4ccd-406a-91c8-2b4638b70962?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), publications, hearings by the Connecticut House Republicans and State Senators, none of this moved the needle.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..MfSc2-tKcPZqh8vqJpKWbYjsgi29EjJztVBbTDvVNf0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=152173726)
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=152173726&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyMTczNzI2LCJpYXQiOjE3MzI3Mjc1OTQsImV4cCI6MTczNTMxOTU5NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.0_y_qCp3B9ZDUJ6YLYF87ZsL8REQJjU2ov7loB6R_EQ)
Instead, Connecticut went more blue and democrats have super-majorities in the House and Senate. The demographics do not support a super-majority, but it happened. The Party Registration Statistics for CT**(according to the[Independent Voter Project](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/5a23cdd6-36d9-413f-b97e-eeda6eaf289a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg))** which relies on L2 data (_which is some of the best_) is as follows:
**Total Registered Voters: 2,317,657**
* Democrats: 837,193 (36.12%)
* Republicans: 470,471 (20.30%)
* Third Party/Other: 36,013 (1.55%)
* Unaffiliated: 973,980 (42.02%)
[Pledge your support](https://substack..MfSc2-tKcPZqh8vqJpKWbYjsgi29EjJztVBbTDvVNf0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=152173726)
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=152173726&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyMTczNzI2LCJpYXQiOjE3MzI3Mjc1OTQsImV4cCI6MTczNTMxOTU5NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.0_y_qCp3B9ZDUJ6YLYF87ZsL8REQJjU2ov7loB6R_EQ)

Connecticut is a state with more than 1 million Unaffiliated and Third Party voters (almost 44 percent). They outnumber either party. Where is their representation in the super-majority democrat run state?
As we have talked about, Connecticut went bluer and more to the left and homeowners and business owners are left further in the red while the state legislature from the top down pushes the broken green agenda ad nauseum.
There will continue to be real pocketbook issues until there is major change in this state. **It has been beyond disgusting to watch the bills keep going up.**
To add insult to injury, if you are on any social media or use a computer, it is impossible in the Eversource region to see absurd ads:
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/46910835-7ef7-403e-aa71-f4d13fe48380?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Look Closely for this advertisement to improve commercial properties - _**DO YOU SEE IT?**_
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/8af00977-21cf-4fef-a893-40cc7fa97bcb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Yeah - These Lovely Ads as we finally get into the thick of heating season is - "**Paid for by a charge on customer energy bills. " **
**Enough is Enough**
Yes - the rates are high and you are paying for the Eversource marketing and cheerleading squad to improve commercial businesses at the expense of the residential consumer. Last time we checked, companies are not voters. Also, shouldn't the utility companies that benefit by not having to supply as much electricity and/or make rapid upgrades due to power savings, be the ones to make the investment and amortize it? Not here in Connecticut - It is your job now John and Jane Q. Taxpayer thanks to shoddy legislation.
**Operation Utility Stupidity - The Green New Deal - Feeling a little Verklempt**
If you used to watch Saturday Night Live there was Coffee Talk, hosted by Linda Richman (Mike Myers) and issues would get Linda upset or "verklempt". Well we should all be as this Connecticut Green New Deal is neither Green, nor New, nor a Deal.
There is the issue of energy reliability and supply and the green new deal fantasy has not left the state. See a recent article showing the fight we have been talking about for months - Windmills versus reality. Step aside Don Quixote, Gov. Lamont is determined to build the windmills.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d27d6827-669d-4fcd-ac59-3c6db0e59369?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
We know offshore wind is not the answer, but it is Lamont's mission; he does not care whether these windmills will reduce costs. Even Eversource sold its investment in [Revolution Wind](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/c0ca22dd-8278-4c76-a6e4-8d5b22e1a016?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- the Offshore project off Rhode Island but they will remain as a construction manager.
The Public Benefits continues to benefit everyone but the public. Your Republican representatives in the Statehouse have been pushing to move these outrageous fees, subsidies, and now marketing expenses from your bills to the state budget and they also have proposed to separate- the Public Utilities Regulatory Authority (PURA) - from the Department of Energy and Environmental Protection (DEEP). **There are just not enough of them and the public is just not outraged enough.**
**What is the Solution?**
Nuclear and Natural Gas are the solutions for real reliable energy in the Constitution State. This push by Lamont to set Connecticut sails on wind power and off-shore wind is a major mistake. While this secures jobs for quite some time for some labor unions, we must look to meaningful long-term jobs in Connecticut.
**Manufacturing is the Solution and we are still below Pandemic levels of manufacturing employment.**
The 2024 Connecticut Manufacturing Report is produced by CBIA and affiliates CONNSTEP and ReadyCT highlights the power of manufacturing and what it means for Connecticut (See [Report](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7a6257f3-8e3b-442a-a870-50a60355de29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)).

One key takeaway (with a feature to come on manufacturing) are the multipliers found in this report:
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ce142ec7-bbdb-4794-a969-bd94c74418a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It is time to make major changes and it is time to take a meaningful stance and really fight back the utility companies.
Start writing your local representatives and your utility company.
**Thank you for your continued support. Please subscribe and spread the word.**
Dr. Michael Goldstein & Jonathan Goldstein
_The father-son team continues on_ so please spread the word and lets really rebuild CT together in a meaningful way.

clean_body: The public benefit is now used to pay for marketing their transformative policies | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more Goldstein For Congress - Please Subscribe and also visit us at www.goldsteinforcongress.com The public benefit is now used to pay for marketing their transformative policies | | and | Nov 27 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | Clearly the past 5 months of talking about high utility bills going into an election had no impact on the election in Connecticut. Despite massive uproar by , publications, hearings by the Connecticut House Republicans and State Senators, none of this moved the needle. Instead, Connecticut went more blue and democrats have super-majorities in the House and Senate. The demographics do not support a super-majority, but it happened. The Party Registration Statistics for CT(according to the) which relies on L2 data (which is some of the best) is as follows: Total Registered Voters: 2,317,657 Democrats: 837,193 (36.12%) Republicans: 470,471 (20.30%) Third Party/Other: 36,013 (1.55%) Unaffiliated: 973,980 (42.02%) Connecticut is a state with more than 1 million Unaffiliated and Third Party voters (almost 44 percent). They outnumber either party. Where is their representation in the super-majority democrat run state? As we have talked about, Connecticut went bluer and more to the left and homeowners and business owners are left further in the red while the state legislature from the top down pushes the broken green agenda ad nauseum. There will continue to be real pocketbook issues until there is major change in this state. It has been beyond disgusting to watch the bills keep going up. To add insult to injury, if you are on any social media or use a computer, it is impossible in the Eversource region to see absurd ads: | | ---|---|--- Look Closely for this advertisement to improve commercial properties - DO YOU SEE IT? | | ---|---|--- Yeah - These Lovely Ads as we finally get into the thick of heating season is - "Paid for by a charge on customer energy bills. " Enough is Enough Yes - the rates are high and you are paying for the Eversource marketing and cheerleading squad to improve commercial businesses at the expense of the residential consumer. Last time we checked, companies are not voters. Also, shouldn't the utility companies that benefit by not having to supply as much electricity and/or make rapid upgrades due to power savings, be the ones to make the investment and amortize it? Not here in Connecticut - It is your job now John and Jane Q. Taxpayer thanks to shoddy legislation. Operation Utility Stupidity - The Green New Deal - Feeling a little Verklempt If you used to watch Saturday Night Live there was Coffee Talk, hosted by Linda Richman (Mike Myers) and issues would get Linda upset or "verklempt". Well we should all be as this Connecticut Green New Deal is neither Green, nor New, nor a Deal. There is the issue of energy reliability and supply and the green new deal fantasy has not left the state. See a recent article showing the fight we have been talking about for months - Windmills versus reality. Step aside Don Quixote, Gov. Lamont is determined to build the windmills. | | ---|---|--- We know offshore wind is not the answer, but it is Lamont's mission; he does not care whether these windmills will reduce costs. Even Eversource sold its investment in \- the Offshore project off Rhode Island but they will remain as a construction manager. The Public Benefits continues to benefit everyone but the public. Your Republican representatives in the Statehouse have been pushing to move these outrageous fees, subsidies, and now marketing expenses from your bills to the state budget and they also have proposed to separate- the Public Utilities Regulatory Authority (PURA) - from the Department of Energy and Environmental Protection (DEEP). There are just not enough of them and the public is just not outraged enough. What is the Solution? Nuclear and Natural Gas are the solutions for real reliable energy in the Constitution State. This push by Lamont to set Connecticut sails on wind power and off-shore wind is a major mistake. While this secures jobs for quite some time for some labor unions, we must look to meaningful long-term jobs in Connecticut. Manufacturing is the Solution and we are still below Pandemic levels of manufacturing employment. The 2024 Connecticut Manufacturing Report is produced by CBIA and affiliates CONNSTEP and ReadyCT highlights the power of manufacturing and what it means for Connecticut (See ). One key takeaway (with a feature to come on manufacturing) are the multipliers found in this report: | | ---|---|--- It is time to make major changes and it is time to take a meaningful stance and really fight back the utility companies. Start writing your local representatives and your utility company. Thank you for your continued support. Please subscribe and spread the word.** Dr. Michael Goldstein & Jonathan Goldstein The father-son team continues on so please spread the word and lets really rebuild CT together in a meaningful way. | A guest post by| Consultant, Political Consultant, Campaign Manager, Construction Consultant and Corporate Attorney. # FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Peter In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

Dear Friend,
---
Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card, and your checking account.
---
Imagine all of your money being seized.
---
__That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me.__
---
I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH...
---
As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State — especially since my own law licenses have been __taken away__ from me!
---
But there’s one thing I want to make clear...
---
...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal Defense Trust.
---
_**That’s a LIE.**_
---
The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust, I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of course the media and the Democrats will never report that.
---
And I’ll say it again loud and clear. If you can’t afford to contribute, please don’t. End of story.
---
But, if you can, please know that your support could be the key to my freedom – and not just _my own_ freedom, but the freedom, justice, and rights of every U.S. citizen.
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund, because even after EVERYTHING the Left has done to me, I will _NEVER_ SURRENDER the fight for freedom and justice. **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=df263881731b4c618be5dcd87a38234d&_e=3VyQ8ud1Gtg-gmVJoB0sWY3PcQAxjBGq_yha6Q71GJbJKAzhViDaMTxKjNio0ttO_OWzSabpA9JCUrGqZJWGRyLEGnoPTzukUBUI3G2xx5yhLv8wBlD6eQH4yeYqGtv_SIuGars0K8Z-cC2Uxf_aonadYga06n7WaekwPm3uAbmV96jxjzEYe4Y5O3kLFUtbeTGO7S_eJoMsKnlMOSdFKgpkNHOui4dR_119nalPTx_YpI7kA3VRJ6Wt20izvd_4pA40fur-mHalhxW3xr4_TXRLLHBXnvyknmR5sXoHdVyZMf9p5elywFYxV_OtxK8sgRtcfWz9yjWjADU90t2GliSVgCBviaNGNeG_wR39PkSDQ0LkeczW4J28rAOZy5MLQSuoGMt9iH9ca3pRtkesEQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice. But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice. | Dear Friend, Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card, and your checking account. Imagine all of your money being seized. That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me. I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH... As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State — especially since my own law licenses have been taken away from me! But there’s one thing I want to make clear... ...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal Defense Trust. That’s a LIE. The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust, I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of course the media and the Democrats will never report that. And I’ll say it again loud and clear. If you can’t afford to contribute, please don’t. End of story. But, if you can, please know that your support could be the key to my freedom – and not just my own freedom, but the freedom, justice, and rights of every U.S. citizen. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Team JanePAC
subject: This might change how you see Thanksgiving dinner.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Climate change is reshaping holiday traditions.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97762001/514496389/1328794144?refcode=ea.7b89c406-e4ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ms=ea.7b89c406-e4ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdiODljNDA2LWU0YWMtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Kt7E9IyHGWG7MQBWYrb-VMrL5rkiO7blhxTFvqzeVZU=&emci=cf082e6e-42ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=7b89c406-e4ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=4823105)
---
Whether Thanksgiving is a time of gathering, reflection, or simply enjoying a good meal, it’s worth taking a moment to consider this: Climate change is quietly threatening the ingredients and traditions that bring so many of us together every year. Imagine a Thanksgiving without sweet potatoes, cranberry sauce, or even stuffing. Experts say that rising temperatures and extreme weather are already causing harvests of these staples to shrink, making them scarcer and more expensive. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97762002/514496390/2105508926?refcode=ea.7b89c406-e4ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ms=ea.7b89c406-e4ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdiODljNDA2LWU0YWMtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Kt7E9IyHGWG7MQBWYrb-VMrL5rkiO7blhxTFvqzeVZU=) We often hear about the catastrophic long-term impacts of the climate crisis – melting glaciers, rivers drying up, skyrocketing temperatures, and more. _And let us be clear: the consequences of inaction go far beyond Thanksgiving dinner._ But it’s also reshaping our traditions, making cultural touchstones like Thanksgiving harder to sustain. That’s the bad news. The good news? Together, we can change course, to protect our planet and treasured moments like Thanksgiving from the deadly impacts of the climate crisis. Thanks to supporters like you, we have the opportunity to build the grassroots power we need to fight back. Your dedication makes it possible to invest in climate solutions at every level — from local leaders fighting for resilient communities to bold national policies. That’s exactly what we do at the Jane Fonda Climate PAC. This Thanksgiving, as you gather around the table, think about the future we want for our families and traditions. Then, take action with us. Together, we can push for the changes that ensure Thanksgiving remains a celebration of abundance, not scarcity. | [**DONATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97762003/514496391/2105508926?refcode=ea.7b89c406-e4ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ms=ea.7b89c406-e4ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdiODljNDA2LWU0YWMtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Kt7E9IyHGWG7MQBWYrb-VMrL5rkiO7blhxTFvqzeVZU=)

George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by running to represent New York's 16th District in Congress. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. And he fights on. So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, then they know nothing about me.And they know nothing about you , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new“First Amendment Fund” to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. name: Jeff Merkley
subject: There’s still a lot to be thankful for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97762506/514498130/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmYxMzA0ZS1lNWFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SlpYEhyalG3tzzLzKy3A79AR5NswF1EUn3naoWJtk-k=&emci=6d3c2b6a-d7ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=06f1304e-e5ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=7731215)
---

| | Tomorrow is a time to get together with friends and family, and I wish you and your loved ones a Happy Thanksgiving. While things may seem overwhelming, I'm thinking about how much there is to be thankful for. I'm thankful we live in a country that is a democracy—not an autocracy. I'm thankful that we can worship as we choose, gather together as we please, and say what we want. And that we can criticize our highest officials without being detained, imprisoned, tortured, or disappeared. I'm thankful that, however much one disagrees with a government decision, there is always an election no more than two years away in which we can fight for a better path. I'm thankful that we kept the economy from crashing during COVID — there is no government program as powerful as a decent job. I'm thankful for your energy, enthusiasm, and sense of purpose. We'll need that for the fights ahead — and there will be many — that will determine the future of our democracy. I know the holidays can be difficult, and my heart goes out to those of you feeling the weight of today. However you spend Thanksgiving, I hope you are able to connect with the folks who mean the most to you. Onward! _Jeff_ [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97762507/514498131/-2122444374?refcode=2024-11-27-tgiving&recurring=&amount=11&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=06f1304e-e5ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmYxMzA0ZS1lNWFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SlpYEhyalG3tzzLzKy3A79AR5NswF1EUn3naoWJtk-k=) |
