name: Left Action
subject: Trump is bypassing FBI background checks for cabinet nominees. Tell Biden to order the background checks instead!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell President Biden to order FBI background checks of Trump nominees. If Trump won't do it, Biden should](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc0af1f92-7d08-4d2b-b1b4-a45ff4d8aa16/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T47db422b-5206-4dec-86ee-ae03f95a1ad4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Trump is putting the nation at risk by skipping FBI background checks for some of his cabinet nominees – including for critically important defense and national security positions. Worse yet, he’s doing this for nominees with disturbing ties to Russia and other adversaries. **If Trump won’t do it, then President Biden should instead while he is still president.** **[Add your name, and urge him to immediately order FBI checks of all Trump nominees. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tde6c9911-f727-4e01-a164-b0dec10b00c4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Our national security is at stake here – the American people deserve to know if these nominees have skeletons in their closets that threaten our nation. FBI background checks are the gold standard, and have been conducted on nominees for decades. President Biden [has the power](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4878b8c1-b4b2-4de4-a616-b81b2fc825f0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) to initiate those background checks – and he should definitely do so immediately. It will no doubt enrage Trump, but so does pretty much everything. [**Sign your name: Urge President Biden to order FBI background checks of Trump nominees >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3b51c924-2c44-4bb4-b748-93aca57287af/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb79a83de-04f4-4f40-bd57-e734ff7decf6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: Grateful for you, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Before many log off to spend Thanksgiving with family and friends, I
wanted to connect with you directly. I am deeply grateful for the support
that makes our work possible and for the shared commitment to building a
better future together even at a time when the path feels difficult.

The 2024 general election delivered tough results: Republicans now control
the Presidency, Senate, and House of Representatives. There have been a
lot of opinions and hot takes about why Democrats fared so poorly this
election cycle, with a lot of unfounded finger-pointing at movement groups
like Justice Democrats.

But here’s the truth: even if they can’t bring themselves to admit it, the
leadership of the Democratic Party has lost touch with working class
people while cozying up with corporations and super PACs, and it’s beyond
time we change that.

Justice Democrats was founded to build people power in our country by
finding and electing a bloc of working class leaders to Congress who
reject corporate PAC money and truly put people first.

We defied the odds again and again to elect former bartender Alexandria
Ocasio-Cortez, former school principal Jamaal Bowman, former nurse Cori
Bush, community organizer and former state elected official Summer Lee,
and the rest of our bloc — people with lived experience from working class
backgrounds with big, bold ideas to make life better for everyday people
and challenge the status quo.

Though we lost Jamaal and Cori to challengers recruited and funded by
AIPAC — who spent more money than EVER this cycle in the history of
federal primary elections — we are honoring their fight in Congress and
preparing for what must come next.

There is a vacuum of leadership at the federal level that can be filled by
billionaire-backed candidates or by working people. We are making sure
it’s with working people by finding the next generation of candidates to
run for Congress and challenge corporate Democrats in 2026.

We wouldn’t be here without you,
Peter, and we depend directly on grassroots
contributions from people like you to fuel the work ahead.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241127?refcode=em20241127-36189&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36189_1203867_bDt_m6&akid=36189%2E1203867%2EbDt_m6 ]Before we log off for a bit, I need to ask: will you pitch in any
amount before our November 30th fundraising deadline to fund our efforts
to transform the Democratic Party for the better?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241127?refcode=em20241127-36189&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36189_1203867_bDt_m6&akid=36189%2E1203867%2EbDt_m6 ]Contribute $5

I and every member of the Justice Democrats team are so incredibly
grateful for you. Together, we CAN drive big money out of politics and
elect representatives of the people to create lasting change in
Washington.

Have a healthy and happy holiday,

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, Before many log off to spend Thanksgiving with family and friends, I wanted to connect with you directly. I am deeply grateful for the support that makes our work possible and for the shared commitment to building a better future together even at a time when the path feels difficult. The 2024 general election delivered tough results: Republicans now control the Presidency, Senate, and House of Representatives. There have been a lot of opinions and hot takes about why Democrats fared so poorly this election cycle, with a lot of unfounded finger-pointing at movement groups like Justice Democrats. But here’s the truth: even if they can’t bring themselves to admit it, the leadership of the Democratic Party has lost touch with working class people while cozying up with corporations and super PACs, and it’s beyond time we change that. Justice Democrats was founded to build people power in our country by finding and electing a bloc of working class leaders to Congress who reject corporate PAC money and truly put people first. We defied the odds again and again to elect former bartender Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, former school principal Jamaal Bowman, former nurse Cori Bush, community organizer and former state elected official Summer Lee, and the rest of our bloc — people with lived experience from working class backgrounds with big, bold ideas to make life better for everyday people and challenge the status quo. Though we lost Jamaal and Cori to challengers recruited and funded by AIPAC — who spent more money than EVER this cycle in the history of federal primary elections — we are honoring their fight in Congress and preparing for what must come next. There is a vacuum of leadership at the federal level that can be filled by billionaire-backed candidates or by working people. We are making sure it’s with working people by finding the next generation of candidates to run for Congress and challenge corporate Democrats in 2026. We wouldn’t be here without you, Peter, and we depend directly on grassroots contributions from people like you to fuel the work ahead. [ ]Before we log off for a bit, I need to ask: will you pitch in any amount before our November 30th fundraising deadline to fund our efforts to transform the Democratic Party for the better? [ ]Contribute $5 I and every member of the Justice Democrats team are so incredibly grateful for you. Together, we CAN drive big money out of politics and elect representatives of the people to create lasting change in Washington. Have a healthy and happy holiday, Alexandra Rojas Executive Director Contribute to Justice Democrats:

# [#]
“Project 2025 is infiltrating the Trump administration already” — Vox

Peter: Republicans have been celebrating by admitting that Project 2025 has been their plan all along.

Let us remind you of the hate-filled, extremist agenda they’re pushing:

❌ Increase of Trump’s authority over every part of the federal government.
❌ Ban abortion nationwide and jail healthcare providers.
❌ Enable discrimination against LGBTQIA+ Americans.

We want to be clear: we think Project 2025 is the blueprint to strip us of our fundamental rights. But we need to know if our top supporters feel the same.

Peter, can you take our one-click poll and tell us if you oppose or support Project 2025? [https://secure.everyaction.com/PGhzq9EQ0k2R9rSQpELHJg2]

I’M NOT SURE » [https://secure.everyaction.com/PGhzq9EQ0k2R9rSQpELHJg2]

Here at TOP PAC, we’re working to defeat this MAGA extremism and build a Texas that works for ALL of us — regardless of race, income, immigration status, preferred language, or ZIP Code.

Thanks for taking our survey!

name: Roger Ream
subject: Correcting the MSM Mistake
body:
They did everything they could to push their woke progressive values throughout this year.
| [ ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f28b8b56852b4e9a97a41d12cd53280b&_e=wDoDRkZ93p8PXiVOWQtUEgaP7Q3YqBTDEOdH5dPHOdG634DCU7pxXq0kaRHuj309CO_AtZP2UvyjNOJBHCh3zlapYl9BGgMdZDsQGe5Q9xmwg6_72k6-swcqi3yaB1XdmDV8a8p3-md9DW0AjyyNRS_MXUJo-4jR316gKIw2X_V_wXWeGGpnLVOe9Y4Udt9SpxQAHfRfLq8B_MotLv3AseZRNtzmUd1FmVfuk3VKnV-ZHFtrZXEiJZa4XRt3UzmgkZ66bBw_G-qDR-NpoUS6OIyRh4DItzNuI_5-RfPTVgg%3D)
---
Fellow American, They did everything they could to push their woke progressive values throughout this year. When President Biden refused to step aside, the left-wing media dismissed concerns about his mental acuity. They said Biden was as sharp as a tack.

When assassins came for President Trump, they minimized the threats.

And when Kamala Harris flip-flopped on critical issues, the mainstream media covered for her. They let her skip interviews, ignore questions, and do whatever she wanted. Fellow American, if this great country is going to endure, we NEED an honest press. That’s why The Fund for American Studies (TFAS), is training, educating, and helping young conservative journalists pursue careers in the profession. We help these journalists learn how to make a difference with fellowships, internships, the Student Journalism Association, and so much more. This year showed how essential it is that we get more conservatives into the media. [**Will you help us do that by donating anything you can right now?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f28b8b56852b4e9a97a41d12cd53280b&_e=wDoDRkZ93p8PXiVOWQtUEgaP7Q3YqBTDEOdH5dPHOdG634DCU7pxXq0kaRHuj309CO_AtZP2UvyjNOJBHCh3zlapYl9BGgMdZDsQGe5Q9xmwg6_72k6-swcqi3yaB1XdmDV8a8p3-md9DW0AjyyNRS60L_8nkpeNImoMbuEEDEe8567jKFFK7rKMkweAirgjrqUOXaidNpwBmR08GLBST0MO61MfGtSpvzSQFblRMQIYksn8Mq0RRJfhspf9wGcXO7V2bHcI_8ftIhxOTD4MkfRonexfmx2p2_TlFDtzIYI%3D) For decades, we’ve helped young journalists succeed. Our fellowships and internships gave our alumni the foot in the door they need. And because of that, they’re now hosting shows and writing for some of the biggest publishers in the business. That means they’re working for The Wall Street Journal, FOX News, Reason, The Federalist, CNN, The Daily Caller, The Washington Post, and so much more.

But, Fellow American, we need to do more. That’s why we launched the Student Journalism Association last year. We’re empowering brave young student journalists to fight leftist lies and propaganda on their campuses. And we’ll help them kick star their careers, so that there will be more reporters with moral courage in the media across the country.

But, we need your help to do that. We’re supporting dozens of conservative student journalists on 21 college campuses. [Fellow American](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f28b8b56852b4e9a97a41d12cd53280b&_e=wDoDRkZ93p8PXiVOWQtUEpX08FQgGFqRhN8TtaudN5SIcq9IsZQg0X7mVxuOLZ-qwG5fhl3vN3CKZ17jDMSjlGkfA4ASS9iuFRn2FEOB9sruNgQMjuTe0rBLJvqUWP8QLYHX7POCjUwGI7_oz1ABH_TbSKQ8Xq5-BD142cQEijE4SWM_hIlJB3gLwGKGOsUofqQMJEGWNUs6l8ZwKJNwlCaPM2rJ-wGka3pHMRf6wYU%3D)[, will you help us grow that network, so we can fight for a future where the media isn’t pushing propaganda for the left-wing establishment? Please, donate right now.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f28b8b56852b4e9a97a41d12cd53280b&_e=wDoDRkZ93p8PXiVOWQtUEgaP7Q3YqBTDEOdH5dPHOdG634DCU7pxXq0kaRHuj309CO_AtZP2UvyjNOJBHCh3zlapYl9BGgMdZDsQGe5Q9xmwg6_72k6-swcqi3yaB1XdmDV8a8p3-md9DW0AjyyNRTbasM8N49pqFBjDFR1rAUw5glXTXIpxiahAiKsC8cVLJRASU8yHOdvfdrd633ajBEdsHgBiiwZXdxA8d-tAhdflJ6yTQO1Lkz6107Gz8S-VmrjUxqf_yPCxATCyI8nWKE-hZBbmWiz6okUMgVv8ZH0%3D)

Sincerely,
Roger Ream
President The Fund for American Studies

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97765780/514507585/-491556796?refcode=241127&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2IxNmYyZS1lYWFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X1Heg2M72rjoDgH4d_bmBQLKLYmi6qwsgn7T1sYx_vY=)

Team, As I look ahead to November 2025, there’s no doubt my race will be a close one — just like my races in 2018, 2020, and 2022. However, now I am running for an even bigger seat and to represent even more Virginians (well, all of them!). To win in this competitive race, people need to know who I am, how hard I am working for them, and why I’m running to be the next Governor of Virginia. Already, I’m hearing directly from voters on the issues that are most important to them – supporting our public schools, protecting our democracy, reducing gun violence, safeguarding voting rights and reproductive rights, and so much more. From Carroll County to Chesapeake to Charlottesville and everywhere in between – I can’t wait to meet everyone! Since I’m now running to represent the entire Commonwealth, not just the Seventh District, I have many new voters, community leaders, and organizations to meet, and I need your support to make sure our campaign has the resources necessary to reach every voter across our Commonwealth. clean_body: | = Team, As I look ahead to November 2025, there’s no doubt my race will be a close one — just like my races in 2018, 2020, and 2022. However, now I am running for an even bigger seat and to represent even more Virginians (well, all of them!). To win in this competitive race, people need to know who I am, how hard I am working for them, and why I’m running to be the next Governor of Virginia. Already, I’m hearing directly from voters on the issues that are most important to them – supporting our public schools, protecting our democracy, reducing gun violence, safeguarding voting rights and reproductive rights, and so much more. From Carroll County to Chesapeake to Charlottesville and everywhere in between – I can’t wait to meet everyone! Since I’m now running to represent the entire Commonwealth, not just the Seventh District, I have many new voters, community leaders, and organizations to meet, and I need your support to make sure our campaign has the resources necessary to reach every voter across our Commonwealth. = = Thank you, Abigail Spanberger = = [content goes here] Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States Paid for by Serve America PAC

name: Patti Reilly
subject: My police officer son is going to prison for doing his job
body:
Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder – murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.
Dear Peter,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f6d661720cd54f8aa51b1f7afdda47fc&_e=Kovjryv6nQCmdhdLdavKK0dqCYtQDWYWIU3VzGT8Ew_E1JgXTwRX8V8lN-vhli1z2MotVw4oYMosAZiElsNjjC0Z1WuccqH5qH4W7GgRgjcmVgiYMIk_PM2NZ0zXz05Lgik75EYvZcT7V82rCIbeIXwsOjDsO_JS6AyZ40QerTNRthpIRMVkB3MXDJ6swG6RK_FCRfzxy8784mInpqVvNKISIO8EIOX_fByvK_fclg1Y-8C4i_-o5ed7AantKipcruEkxtRQTEAtYTP8vo2wAaU_yz_BN1jffrTtMFaQrMrrimwpWD31lGOECIhXKR11gCv_2keOWRoZzbkr_tML5u7fBdOvo7vxxInR6qfkCkIv2tRnvgYtp1imhe2QOa0ZeaRGtYK3uQgOpizeEjd1Vg%3D%3D)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f6d661720cd54f8aa51b1f7afdda47fc&_e=Kovjryv6nQCmdhdLdavKK0dqCYtQDWYWIU3VzGT8Ew_E1JgXTwRX8V8lN-vhli1z2MotVw4oYMosAZiElsNjjC0Z1WuccqH5qH4W7GgRgjcmVgiYMIk_PM2NZ0zXz05Lgik75EYvZcT7V82rCIbeIXwsOjDsO_JS6AyZ40QerTNRthpIRMVkB3MXDJ6swG6RK_FCRfzxy8784mInpqVvNKISIO8EIOX_fByvK_fclg1Y-8C4i_-o5ed7AantKipcPJKjptJ7oHaIpoHcbZnBO7_IWEnjb2c9Lgxb7HyY5SEX17GdmMuHyaYMSq1RDr_ulThRbp1TKJLxc1AiWNi4u2ui4ExE-s5hwiI9FgdrMdPG7AuURdcHZKlKdIKLdYS-BZxb1JyMsH6JlKL-50yggw%3D%3D) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f6d661720cd54f8aa51b1f7afdda47fc&_e=Kovjryv6nQCmdhdLdavKK0dqCYtQDWYWIU3VzGT8Ew_E1JgXTwRX8V8lN-vhli1z2MotVw4oYMosAZiElsNjjC0Z1WuccqH5qH4W7GgRgjcmVgiYMIk_PM2NZ0zXz05Lgik75EYvZcT7V82rCIbeIXwsOjDsO_JS6AyZ40QerTNRthpIRMVkB3MXDJ6swG6RK_FCRfzxy8784mInpqVvNKISIO8EIOX_fByvK_fclg1Y-8C4i_-o5ed7AantKipcuL2hadFcur0aPgayIqaJIuEOZ3k6Sggs5VKQzoNqM8_qyU4sbXnsfib7l6QSrJLHU3HceW59RKCUgzyWFJJEo9SHdhMAaVRxcHXbZaH4jgrZvHWfJYPmaia0Tpyn4u-Wi3SdIbzYAPE-tTk5w2BBJQ%3D%3D)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f6d661720cd54f8aa51b1f7afdda47fc&_e=Kovjryv6nQCmdhdLdavKK0dqCYtQDWYWIU3VzGT8Ew_E1JgXTwRX8V8lN-vhli1z2MotVw4oYMosAZiElsNjjC0Z1WuccqH5qH4W7GgRgjcmVgiYMIk_PM2NZ0zXz05Lgik75EYvZcT7V82rCIbeIXwsOjDsO_JS6AyZ40QerTNRthpIRMVkB3MXDJ6swG6RK_FCRfzxy8784mInpqVvNKISIO8EIOX_fByvK_fclg1Y-8C4i_-o5ed7AantKipcvCmX2mB7fkNV5qwfNeZF2fefdLHXOhF9kpB7_foj9Y9swbBNKf-7bNZ9PP3odbda2Mr-JO4P6eE_qFP7BvDE7KyzU_8Bg9lT4VYaqlllaf1Q-vy547la2MDNIFK8ym8nKGIJuUWg8yb4w7-9KbVOOw%3D%3D) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f6d661720cd54f8aa51b1f7afdda47fc&_e=Kovjryv6nQCmdhdLdavKK0dqCYtQDWYWIU3VzGT8Ew_E1JgXTwRX8V8lN-vhli1z2MotVw4oYMosAZiElsNjjC0Z1WuccqH5qH4W7GgRgjcmVgiYMIk_PM2NZ0zXz05Lgik75EYvZcT7V82rCIbeIXwsOjDsO_JS6AyZ40QerTNRthpIRMVkB3MXDJ6swG6RK_FCRfzxy8784mInpqVvNKISIO8EIOX_fByvK_fclg1Y-8C4i_-o5ed7AantKipcjHeWMRVBgeCCaXVMVm8-Ummh5SpjLu2zemvRlFIndMcQyW175GM5nyujtJvXjDxDwUt32OwlXSUMLHXE6LKqcVwB25aALLbUmwQt3LjBUPxYN_ccb8m01s9Qk1MyJjX44RykbUEtLWXSMAJVZBwlqw%3D%3D)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f6d661720cd54f8aa51b1f7afdda47fc&_e=Kovjryv6nQCmdhdLdavKK0dqCYtQDWYWIU3VzGT8Ew_E1JgXTwRX8V8lN-vhli1z2MotVw4oYMosAZiElsNjjC0Z1WuccqH5qH4W7GgRgjcmVgiYMIk_PM2NZ0zXz05Lgik75EYvZcT7V82rCIbeIXwsOjDsO_JS6AyZ40QerTNRthpIRMVkB3MXDJ6swG6RK_FCRfzxy8784mInpqVvNKISIO8EIOX_fByvK_fclg1Y-8C4i_-o5ed7AantKipcsp1cWpiKil9v4Xvcw00JApyMZkQOj44uc8lEpe8tR9_OVPZztnV-P09TwnZ1j18jNHT0mv3OwBeOjqBhXX-tvwBUUFkmB4ro252kkPJtK414rO-7MoWl5oLu8WKBwnq75-RtswFhhgX3qssQjFbiWA%3D%3D) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f6d661720cd54f8aa51b1f7afdda47fc&_e=Kovjryv6nQCmdhdLdavKK-o3abPLV9tqKBdZlSGEUbz6ZSXNvMFnngG5uJH0Q_2bzDWkDekphwO1EuZfyALd0kQyd8047ym-J8_o3ZO2XHPJW2-lhmktZG_NP9dutFc-3fSfdurA2RupOqCjoXSWbpR1IDVSHxBEDx4RHluVw2VnlZLBQJZ9LaKj7a08cBQY8iUseh6ZGHWItpAWP18-dQ%3D%3D)

_**While you were MIA**_ , Pete Hegseth stood by Trump’s side & **DEFENDED** him as the **CORRUPT LEFT** attempted to put President Trumpin**JAIL**.

body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20241127-1136-foote&t=1001&akid=1136%2E342411%2EgNdSHw ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

We need to finish November fundraising strong if we’re going to be
prepared for Trump in January – and we can’t do that without you.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241127-movement.BLMlBm&refcode=em20241127-1136&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1136%2E342411%2EgNdSHw ]If that’s all you need to hear, please rush a donation
$3 today to help us reach our goal and keep pace with our
Squad’s plans.

We need to be prepared for Trump’s first 100 days in office, and that
means ensuring our Squad has the resources to fight for our values. With a
donation from grassroots supporters like you, we can:

* Meet our $27,000 goal by the end of this month!
* Have resources to grow our supporter base.
* Have the funds to recruit future Squad members.
* Have the resources to fight back against dangerous Trump initiatives.
* Have the platform to mobilize and organize at a moment's notice.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241127-movement.BLMlBm&refcode=em20241127-1136&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1136%2E342411%2EgNdSHw ]Please consider giving whatever you can afford today so we can make our
end-of-month goal in less than 3 days.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241127-movement.BLMlBm&refcode=em20241127-1136&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1136%2E342411%2EgNdSHw ]Donate ››

The mission for our Squad has always been clear: stand up for the
working-class, and protect progressive champions fighting in Congress
every day for a system that works for all of us, not just a wealthy few.

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1136%2E342411%2EgNdSHw

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Cori Bush for Congress, and Bowman for Congress.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Cori Bush for Congress, Politivist PAC, Jamaal Bowman for Congress, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Cori Bush for Congress, and Jamaal Bowman for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Educating the Next Generation
subject: Hardwired for the Bible
body:
You've got to see what Dr. Peterson said just the other day!

[View Email In Browser](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9vYN/?__vbtrk=MjYyMTAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYyMTAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "View Email In Browser")
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9vYO/?__vbtrk=MjYyMTAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYyMTAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "Video") Dear Fellow Concerned American: You don’t have to look far to see why so many young people today feel lost and adrift in this world of confusion. After all, they’re being taught moral relativism instead of the ones that helped make this nation great.
* You can be whatever gender you want.
* Right and wrong are relative, not concrete.
* Your race dictates your outcomes, not your accomplishments.

Dr. Jordan Peterson, the renowned psychologist and author, nailed the problem by explaining how humans are hardwired to seek purpose and identity through stories — narratives that orient us in the world, guide our choices, and help us navigate challenges. For generations, the Bible provided grounding and offered values as well as principles that shaped strong families, allowed communities to thrive, and helped us build a resilient nation. **But today, those stories are disappearing.** Instead of teaching our children the timeless truths of responsibility, forgiveness, and hope, schools often promote shallow narratives of self-interest and fleeting pleasure. The result? A generation untethered from meaning, struggling to find direction in life. We’ve already seen the devastation brought by DEI to our classrooms. We can’t let it continue! **[For just $25, $50, or whatever amount you can afford today, you can help us equip the next generation with the tools they need to lead lives of meaning, purpose, and responsibility.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9vYO/?__vbtrk=MjYyMTAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYyMTAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "For just $25, $50, or whatever amount you can afford today, you can help us equip the next generation with the tools they need to lead lives of meaning, purpose, and responsibility.")** The Center for Restoring Values believes there is a solution to this crisis – restoring the Biblical foundation back to the education of our children. **Dr. Peterson’s insights underscore the urgent need for our work.** His call for a return to enduring stories — like those of Adam and Eve, Abraham, and Moses — reminds us that these lessons are not outdated relics but vital tools for shaping responsible, compassionate, and purpose-driven citizens. **[Do your part to save the next generation before it’s lost to the Woke mind virus.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9vYO/?__vbtrk=MjYyMTAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYyMTAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "Do your part to save the next generation before it’s lost to the Woke mind virus.")** Together, we can counter the confusion and restore the values that have always been the bedrock of a strong society. Let’s show our children that life is about more than fleeting pleasures. Let’s give them the deeper story they need—the story of faith, courage, and service to others. **[Will you join us in this vital mission?](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9vYO/?__vbtrk=MjYyMTAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYyMTAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "Will you join us in this vital mission?")** Restoring Our Values, Rabbi David B. Siff, Ph.D.
Founder & Executive Director
---
The Center for Restoring Values is a project of Kol HaLev, a Florida nonprofit. A copy of the official registration and financial information may be obtained from the division of consumer services by calling toll-free within the state: 1-800-HELP-FLA (435-7352). Registration does not imply endorsement, approval, or recommendation by the state. Registration information at FDACS.gov
| [Unsubscribe](https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=262101&trkid=544733774&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---
215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

interests like AIPAC. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20594?t=1060&akid=7327%2E5885482%2Eg_tsAG ]Can you chip in today to help us fight corporate
money and transform the DNC?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20594?t=1061&akid=7327%2E5885482%2Eg_tsAG ][IMG]

The FIRST job of the incoming DNC chair must be to get dark money and
super PAC cash out of the nominating process.

The current Party leadership is happy to continue allowing tech
billionaires, banks, insurance CEOs, and AIPAC to donate massive amounts
to campaigns and massively influence the direction of the Party.

But Our Revolution and Bernie Sanders are fighting for a different path
forward, one that’s truly democratic and truly responsive to the people.
We need our movement behind us if we’re going to transform how this party
operates.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20445?t=1057?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241127nd&akid=7327%2E5885482%2Eg_tsAG ]Stand with Bernie and Our Revolution today with a donation to support our
team as they work to end the influence of the billionaire and corporate
class on the Democratic Party!

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20445?t=1042?express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20241127nd&akid=7327%2E5885482%2Eg_tsAG ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20445?t=1043?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241127nd&akid=7327%2E5885482%2Eg_tsAG ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20445?t=1045?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20241127nd&akid=7327%2E5885482%2Eg_tsAG ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20445?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20241127nd&akid=7327%2E5885482%2Eg_tsAG ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20445?t=1047?express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20241127nd&akid=7327%2E5885482%2Eg_tsAG ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20445?t=1048?&amount=9&refcode=email-20241127nd&akid=7327%2E5885482%2Eg_tsAG ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

The DNC has a choice: ban corporate, right-wing money from Democratic
primaries or allow billionaires, big corporations, and AIPAC choose the
winners. We know voters want change.

There’s a reason corporations and the ultra-rich donate massive sums to
both parties — they want to maintain the status quo of private health
insurance, tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy, low wages for workers,
supremacy of corporate power, subsidies for Big Oil, and on and on. It’s
on us to shake up the status quo.

We’re putting in the work with progressives across the country to mount
the pressure necessary to transform the way the DNC does business — and we
need your support to make this wholesale change a reality.

name: Former Republican Speaker Newt Gingrich
subject: Official Conservative Principles Project
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Please complete the Official NRSC Conservative Principles Project Document today.

Friend,

Please see the **[Official NRSC Conservative Principles Project](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/pcMUIGqMBDXyzYl9W4QpBg~~/AARclAA~~)** compiled in coordination with Mike Alm, who heads the NRSC's digital operations.

We wanted to put together this document to get at the heart of what the supporters who supported, funded, and elected this new Senate majority most want to see from our Republican trifecta Government.

A Republican trifecta in Washington, D.C., doesn't come around often, so we can't waste this critical opportunity to secure lasting victories for our shared values and conservative principles.

**[Please complete our Official NRSC Conservative Principles Project Document today to let us know what you find to be the most critical issues for President Trump and Senate Republicans to solve as soon as possible.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/pcMUIGqMBDXyzYl9W4QpBg~~/AARclAA~~)**

**[BEGIN SURVEY >>](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/pcMUIGqMBDXyzYl9W4QpBg~~/AARclAA~~)**

We can't let a handful of radical Democrats ruin our country for future generations. We are focused on maximizing this new majority and need your help to guide Senate Republicans to act on the most pressing issues facing our country.

**[Please complete your Official NRSC Conservative Principles Project Document TODAY.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/pcMUIGqMBDXyzYl9W4QpBg~~/AARclAA~~)**

Thank you,

[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/pcMUIGqMBDXyzYl9W4QpBg~~/AARclAA~~)
Newt Gingrich
Former Republican Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives

**[BEGIN NOW >>](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/pcMUIGqMBDXyzYl9W4QpBg~~/AARclAA~~)**

name: OLCV
subject: Our heartfelt thank you
body:
This time of year we want to give our thanks to you and for what you helped us accomplish this year! | | | Hi Peter, We’re in the season of gratitude, and in spirit of that we want to take the chance to extend our heartfelt thank you for being a part of our work. We know that we say this a lot, but that’s only because it’s true - none of our work is possible without _you_. From taking action on our issues, making a contribution, to being a volunteer and speaking to voters about our endorsed candidates, your support is what keeps OLCV going and doing the important work of fighting for our climate. We are oh so grateful to know that we can count on you! Thank you for joining us during this vital fight for our people, places, and environment. While we are all giving thanks and expressing gratitude ahead of the holidays, we’d also like to take a moment to address, acknowledge, and honor the Indigenous communities and land that we now call Oregon. Oregon was built on broken treaties, colonization, and stolen land. Federal and state policies, both past and present, have had lasting effects on Native Americans, putting them at a disadvantage for hundreds of years. It is our responsibility to re-educate ourselves and each other, push past recognition, and demand land repatriation and reparations to Sovereign Tribal Nations and Indigenous people across this state. May this holiday be a reminder to us all to support Indigenous communities and voices, acknowledge our history, and learn about our land ([explore the native land map here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97767922/514513650/-1482795588?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFkZjU1NmM4LWVmYWMtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZfyEHFCy4WQtc52MyxjMUPMo300bqWR9E9dvLTZmh5c=&emci=5e8367fd-4eac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=adf556c8-efac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230)). Once again, thank you for being involved and part of our work. All of us at OLCV wish you a happy and warm harvest holiday. With gratitude,
All of us at OLCV |

name: Rick Larsen
subject: Ahead of Thanksgiving:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
Whether through volunteering, lending a helping hand to a neighbor, or supporting a cause close to your heart – your actions can uplift our community and beyond.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97767926/514513656/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmY1NTZjOC1lZmFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kGrnHWyIJjW_i5N4AesMOyNCTYtM_gaqFxeM0fLOgr4=&emci=a33af6c0-53ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=b2f556c8-efac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=9494239)
---

| | As we gather to celebrate Thanksgiving, I want to take a moment to reflect on the immense gratitude I feel for each of you. **Your belief in our shared vision for the future of Northwest Washington has been a source of strength and inspiration throughout this campaign.** To everyone who cast their ballot this year: thank you for strengthening our democracy. To the tireless volunteers, campaign staff, and community leaders who made this journey possible: your dedication made a difference in the lives of so many. And to my spouse, Tiia, whose unwavering support has been my foundation: I couldn't do this work without you. Representing Washington's 2nd district is a privilege I hold close to my heart. Together, we have made strides, but there is more to do to protect reproductive freedom, tackle challenges like the opioid epidemic, and grow economic opportunities for our families and neighbors. This Thanksgiving, I encourage everyone to reflect on what we are thankful for and how we can give support to others in the year ahead. **As we look to 2025, the investments we make into our own communities will be absolutely crucial to upholding Northwest Washington values. ** Whether through volunteering, donating to an impactful charity, or simply lending a helping hand — your actions can uplift your neighborhood. Thank you for being a part of my journey this year and for all you do to make Northwest Washington a great place to live. **Wishing you and your loved ones a Thanksgiving filled with warmth, gratitude, and joy.** With heartfelt thanks, _Rick_ |
---|---|---

| | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen.
---

clean_body: Whether through volunteering, lending a helping hand to a neighbor, or supporting a cause close to your heart – your actions can uplift our community and beyond. | | | | As we gather to celebrate Thanksgiving, I want to take a moment to reflect on the immense gratitude I feel for each of you. Your belief in our shared vision for the future of Northwest Washington has been a source of strength and inspiration throughout this campaign. To everyone who cast their ballot this year: thank you for strengthening our democracy. To the tireless volunteers, campaign staff, and community leaders who made this journey possible: your dedication made a difference in the lives of so many. And to my spouse, Tiia, whose unwavering support has been my foundation: I couldn't do this work without you. Representing Washington's 2nd district is a privilege I hold close to my heart. Together, we have made strides, but there is more to do to protect reproductive freedom, tackle challenges like the opioid epidemic, and grow economic opportunities for our families and neighbors. This Thanksgiving, I encourage everyone to reflect on what we are thankful for and how we can give support to others in the year ahead. As we look to 2025, the investments we make into our own communities will be absolutely crucial to upholding Northwest Washington values. Whether through volunteering, donating to an impactful charity, or simply lending a helping hand — your actions can uplift your neighborhood. Thank you for being a part of my journey this year and for all you do to make Northwest Washington a great place to live. Wishing you and your loved ones a Thanksgiving filled with warmth, gratitude, and joy. With heartfelt thanks, Rick | ---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by . name: Dan Dillon, CEO Not the Bee
subject: Trump won. The media lied. And their credibility died – for good.
body:
The media lied about the state of the presidential race all the way up to election day.

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8414ca9aba55420fa275484f3ee1dcc9&_e=YbSNhiEK1HlyREIzjidQJdAhtE14VFS847jgqdAw_TvxaoQPjnm94qkYtHAJ4kx72gaPyp64w-GHJgwHZcWkmCJ4OOVr0QMDbu8snUfGqMntrg5vpjR2WDrab2sGszJ4y5NgfHNZtXN3U1cyxH23ivHwAoEGbDYgDpEDAw9St4GsRgrd2R44pfcKB6njDjG09dER2USD5pmIyA8MFX25RLaE2FICsiKUpHQjWIhfEGFL8Xi7eyEGvXtJzAYLSO-b8Dxbj3vGL0F9dkpEc59ypT431prBM5LAL1IZv3wVEio%3D)
---
Friend, The media lied about the state of the presidential race all the way up to election day. But they couldn't hide the truth as the avalanche of support for Donald Trump rolled in on November 5. **What if you could get the truth about what 's _really_ happening in America, unfiltered and with a side of humor?** [**You can - especially if you subscribe to ****_Not the Bee_****today as a premium member today.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8414ca9aba55420fa275484f3ee1dcc9&_e=YbSNhiEK1HlyREIzjidQJdAhtE14VFS847jgqdAw_TvxaoQPjnm94qkYtHAJ4kx72gaPyp64w-GHJgwHZcWkmCJ4OOVr0QMDbu8snUfGqMntrg5vpjR2WDrab2sGszJ4xWEwFD4Li0I9t0EvfwxIJHSVEanolWTQB22FW4IuGCFxYkjBZw3wG0Dp0-6RsCzZcE4Zo6-EpZqMET-qtag0fLec-53YggpnlEerXAjCFpdojrY1_999r3Cn8NQJ6UN-nnPzqMzrleBPrrDiUjs3vilyLtJG7P5vjeW3cwGr9K8%3D)****
---
[ Subscribe to _Not The Bee_ Today ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8414ca9aba55420fa275484f3ee1dcc9&_e=YbSNhiEK1HlyREIzjidQJdAhtE14VFS847jgqdAw_TvxaoQPjnm94qkYtHAJ4kx72gaPyp64w-GHJgwHZcWkmCJ4OOVr0QMDbu8snUfGqMntrg5vpjR2WDrab2sGszJ4jzyrhL5gsgWpORm4m3b5JtypzwEPVod7Nq5Dk82fGklncWNzPLFTi5Vv8UwbezapVBF5Bsfy725GPICN94uQR1OTtmKxRvORzXoeE-rKy-rWrhYTtKWf2z3Sdws_E5zpP_D0lxDhDrZjthveNSZ6NLAGnyz5iJ0EkixZGbAD9_o%3D)
---
Look, Friend. Trump won. The media lied. And then their credibility died - for good. **But**** _Not the Bee_****knew before November what was really happening. Just take a look at some of our pre-election headlines** :
---
_" Trump listened to our advice and released this brutal attack ad on Kamala Harris for her radicalism."_ _" Poll shows Trump's day at McDonald's was most popular with Gen Z."_ _" Trump just went to the Steelers game. Look at the crowd's reaction versus how the media reported it."_
---
The lamestream media distorted the state of the race the entire time. They can't be trusted - you and I both know that. _Which is why I hope you 'll subscribe to _Not the Bee _today._ [**We 're up against a massive, lie-filled media machine. When I ran for this seat in 2022, our race came down to just 564 votes. It was the second-closest race in the entire country. This year, I know that we can finish the job. Right now, our race is _**still too close to call**_ , and we know it’s going to come down to every last vote. clean_body: My name is Adam Gray and I’m the Democratic nominee in California’s 13th Congressional District. | | = Peter, My name is Adam Gray, and I’m the Democratic nominee in California’s 13th Congressional District. When I ran for this seat in 2022, our race came down to just 564 votes. It was the second-closest race in the entire country. This year, I know that we can finish the job. Right now, our race is still too close to call , and we know it’s going to come down to every last vote. = = I decided to run for Congress again because the San Joaquin Valley deserves leaders who work just as hard as we do. I got into this race to finally get results for this community, just like I did for 10 years in the California State Assembly. I’ve been part of close races before, and we knew this year’s race would be another one. As votes continue to be counted, I just want to say how thankful I am to have your support. Let’s finish the job. That means counting every single vote. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Thanks for your support and patience, Adam Gray *

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: Happy Thanksgiving, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina**
body:
| Hi Peter, It’s been a hard year and a tiring one. Things haven’t all gone our way, and we have some really big fights looming ahead of us. Even still, I’m feeling incredibly grateful at the moment. I’m thankful to be home with my family, spending time with the kids and looking forward to good food and good football tomorrow. And **I’m thankful to have seen the very best of North Carolina over these past few months.** I saw thousands and thousands of North Carolinians give their time, money, and energy to build a better future for us all. North Carolinians from every county and community pulling together to do the hard work that matters. North Carolinians willing to fight as hard for total strangers as they are for their own family. I’m really thankful to have been part of a team like that, and I’m thankful to you for being part of it, too. Thanks for everything you do, Peter, and have a happy Thanksgiving! — Wiley

---

Raleigh, NC 27602

name: EMILYs List
subject: We are thankful for you, Peter!
body:

name: Team Pramila
subject: Help us gear up for the next two years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We’re $8,000 away from hitting our November goal and every dollar counts.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241127-4549-footer&t=1&akid=4549%2E420207%2EwotitZ)
Peter,
With just a few days left in November, we’re laser-focused on hitting our goal of raising $25,000 from emails like this one before the month is over. **Right now, we’re $8,000 short.**
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241127?amount=3&refcode=em20241127-4549&refcode2=4549_420207_wotitZ&akid=4549%2E420207%2EwotitZ)**
Reaching this target isn’t just about November — it’s about building the foundation we need to keep fighting for working people over the next two years.
From protecting Medicare and Social Security, to pushing for Medicare for All, we know that Republicans and their billionaire backers are gearing up to block progress at every turn.
We can’t let them out-organize us. Meeting our grassroots fundraising goals now means we’ll be ready to face the challenges ahead and keep delivering results for the people who need it most.
[**Can you chip in today to help us close the $8,000 gap? Every dollar we raise is a step closer to a future that prioritizes people over profits.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241127?refcode=em20241127-4549&amount=3&refcode2=4549_420207_wotitZ&akid=4549%2E420207%2EwotitZ)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241127?amount=3&refcode=em20241127-4549&refcode2=4549_420207_wotitZ&akid=4549%2E420207%2EwotitZ)**
Together, we’ll keep fighting for the progressive values we believe in.
In solidarity,
Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20241127-4549-footer&t=2&refcode2=4549_420207_wotitZ&akid=4549%2E420207%2EwotitZ)**

body:
From my family to yours, Happy Thanksgiving.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97769882/514519540/-2051496126?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzhiMTcxZC1mNGFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GVGyg8lkXFyZqbTaIAAHSidcLU4PUwOFQ4N84JdPi5k=&emci=4a8b171d-f4ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=538b171d-f4ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=30237190)
---
| As we all dive into the Thanksgiving festivities, I’m especially grateful for my family, friends, staff, volunteers, and the incredible grassroots network we’ve built from the ground up together.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97769883/514519541/-2051496126?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzhiMTcxZC1mNGFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GVGyg8lkXFyZqbTaIAAHSidcLU4PUwOFQ4N84JdPi5k=&emci=4a8b171d-f4ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=538b171d-f4ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=30237190)
Thanksgiving is a time for family and traditions. Our family tradition is that everyone who eats at our table signs the tablecloth. You can only sign once – as evidenced by my 3-year-old signature towards the bottom – no matter how many Thanksgivings, Christmases, or Easters you spend with us. You can't sign again even when you become the Chief Embroiderer – my job for the past decade. So we carry on the tradition my grandmother began in the 1930s, despite gravy stains and names long lost to memory.

I hope you and your family also have much to be grateful for this Thanksgiving, and I hope you enjoy your family tradition as much as we enjoy ours.

From my family to yours, Happy Thanksgiving.

– Sarah

* * *

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Official J6 Pardon Petition
body:
I need your name on this!

| | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d325903510b94a3d9d9eec6f7d3c3861&_e=uviO_7tYksGSWu09l5AcMWfLzvMiPQ2IBva_-u1T9GTB0dv7LvhBvJN-zvAFTknn0D6Rn46RmfGHqawvYnREg21MefuH135ALbjO8IwbavT5B0W5fDQKOMZeNtjutJcwSE6pQVNl-aabm26HEVR0NK88V0PjCOuZP_4ZatR33QK3ft6xkEai1Cd1xWD7j7Y0bBuS9KSBT5_MLveutnux4HTgZ3X7kiP-OGqMcD4KlwoRXIEm8iQxu-OsZyMExHZ2DcfA2HBKZKawOOYLeHogog3PlUGCIizlJbPysEZAq2O58Al6nBmTjMe90f18gc7YSgc0c4wF74G-thtnFwabww%3D%3D)
---
Friend – President Trump just won the most decisive **landslide victory** this country has seen in **decades**. The people have spoken, and they want action—real action.
That’s why I’m pushing __**[the Official January 6th Pardon Petition](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d325903510b94a3d9d9eec6f7d3c3861&_e=uviO_7tYksGSWu09l5AcMWfLzvMiPQ2IBva_-u1T9GTB0dv7LvhBvJN-zvAFTknn0D6Rn46RmfGHqawvYnREg21MefuH135ALbjO8IwbavT5B0W5fDQKOMZeNtjutJcwSE6pQVNl-aabm26HEVR0NK88V0PjCOuZP_4ZatR33QK3ft6xkEai1Cd1xWD7j7Y0Xe75LRfWgi5Hn_BlqOJ7wMGNxklW9hy43abyUG7f4ajzBRnXCIuvVz92jLjfa1NvwWgxaq6aIXAWa0A7qcKxkUdIBzafXugib8xAoeLVannn7TPoCHHbiYxI0_sLGfhP8TIs1E3EAdIskkYsfdSdFw%3D%3D)**__ to the frontlines, demanding a full pardon for every patriotic American who stood up on that historic day—prosecuted by a corrupt DOJ hellbent on silencing us, and crushing the people it should be working for under the weight of a filthy, weaponized government.
[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d325903510b94a3d9d9eec6f7d3c3861&_e=uviO_7tYksGSWu09l5AcMWfLzvMiPQ2IBva_-u1T9GTB0dv7LvhBvJN-zvAFTknn0D6Rn46RmfGHqawvYnREg21MefuH135ALbjO8IwbavT5B0W5fDQKOMZeNtjutJcwSE6pQVNl-aabm26HEVR0NK88V0PjCOuZP_4ZatR33QK3ft6xkEai1Cd1xWD7j7Y0wX2SZq7gfhhP28kUldAINhtTKbTMJ2uiVlCyoWszfoSpvIDhWS0psNckmEuejAKeMptEQ2OnXUVjzeCzQFSKc1BoVKtv_T0vc88kJXVfNqw5tp5ScgaxBemUJcEWKNXdETCIeUQXzdQEfVHw_GVbfA%3D%3D)
On January 6th, 2021, thousands of patriotic Americans gathered at the United States Capitol – __a building they own__ – to _**peacefully, and patriotically**_ protest discrepancies in an Election...
Since then, they’ve had their rights and dignities stripped: _**and they deserve better.**_
This isn’t just a petition; it’s a rallying cry. Every true American who believes in freedom, faith, and a country worth fighting for needs to put their name on this.
Friend — Sign NOW and show the deep state we won’t back down. This is our moment to stand together and reclaim what’s ours.
Will you answer the call? _**_[Add your name now](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d325903510b94a3d9d9eec6f7d3c3861&_e=uviO_7tYksGSWu09l5AcMWfLzvMiPQ2IBva_-u1T9GTB0dv7LvhBvJN-zvAFTknn0D6Rn46RmfGHqawvYnREg21MefuH135ALbjO8IwbavT5B0W5fDQKOMZeNtjutJcwSE6pQVNl-aabm26HEVR0NK88V0PjCOuZP_4ZatR33QK3ft6xkEai1Cd1xWD7j7Y0iAjRGMgl9kTINHdD1nPPsDTz1ni-x1Za8SDTBBrXlVA12VHHq9rX1fgEHhD383Qb0fkNHs9pySWtt7DCRfno3QTwlVFSLPTTaT2nwLcvRgVYlzjPI4Bmoh2pNV8JUHNq8j1Gha-QFgPuWwolNlPscQ%3D%3D)_**_** _._**
[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d325903510b94a3d9d9eec6f7d3c3861&_e=uviO_7tYksGSWu09l5AcMWfLzvMiPQ2IBva_-u1T9GTB0dv7LvhBvJN-zvAFTknn0D6Rn46RmfGHqawvYnREg21MefuH135ALbjO8IwbavT5B0W5fDQKOMZeNtjutJcwSE6pQVNl-aabm26HEVR0NK88V0PjCOuZP_4ZatR33QK3ft6xkEai1Cd1xWD7j7Y0k9UPPdIWF76bPorBZ2alQh_wi_2gDhozC2bqVbcyXKQPHG-VpDs23PovGc2TZRh-BnPPv_AIT3dLTAs_DfHxytJwvdwRUIXO8Xjyj2cKiVxpSyGvQ9Nwckcnbaq1Niq-pmbc3UaBe_4cW3dqsqkx5g%3D%3D)
Thank you for joining us on this journey, and thank you for celebrating with us!
_Yours Sincerely,_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d325903510b94a3d9d9eec6f7d3c3861&_e=uviO_7tYksGSWu09l5AcMWfLzvMiPQ2IBva_-u1T9GTB0dv7LvhBvJN-zvAFTknn0D6Rn46RmfGHqawvYnREg21MefuH135ALbjO8IwbavT5B0W5fDQKOMZeNtjutJcwSE6pQVNl-aabm26HEVR0NK88V0PjCOuZP_4ZatR33QK3ft6xkEai1Cd1xWD7j7Y0VTSppsaaZRlkLWl0GEMQTwlyQnlw_REbLxWUohfmgE_9bLIwte1CdXfBjdl08SuR1AREEjFbg9zgj2d4P3MbRR-AyN3ptuGPxWtODClmOZH7XZwATYS8MuvK151dsgAWrFhLM02GwhbZrRlxVJ-6WA%3D%3D)

name: Sarah McBride
subject: I’m filled with gratitude
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I wanted to take a quiet moment away to say thank you.
#
As we approach Thanksgiving, I wanted to take a quiet moment away to say thank you.
The past two weeks of orientation on Capitol Hill have been quite the adventure – from getting lost in the underground tunnels to picking lucky number 13 in the office lottery. But what's touched me most deeply has been seeing the potential for genuine connection and collaboration, even in these divided times.
I've been reflecting on how we all share a common hope: that together, we can meet the challenges our communities face. That's why I'm especially grateful for neighbors like you who believe in the power of bringing people together to make government work better for everyone.
Your support – whether through a kind message, a conversation at a community event, or a contribution to our campaign – reminds me that when we focus on our shared values rather than our differences, we can accomplish extraordinary things.
As I celebrate this Thanksgiving with my family, I'm filled with gratitude for this opportunity to serve and for supporters like you who make this work possible.
Wishing you and your loved ones a wonderful Thanksgiving,
Sarah McBride
Congresswoman-elect
P.S. If you're celebrating this week, I hope you're surrounded by good company and good food!
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20241127&t=1&refcode2=1583_21716_UUaHnS&akid=1583%2E21716%2EUUaHnS)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1583%2E21716%2EUUaHnS)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1583%2E21716%2EUUaHnS)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1583%2E21716%2EUUaHnS)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

Hi team,
Tomorrow is a special day. Not only are we celebrating Thanksgiving, but it is also Michael’s birthday!
Michael’s top priority is building a future where every American family and child can succeed. From working to permanently expand the Child Tax Credit to protecting our public lands for future generations to creating good-paying jobs in rural America – Michael has been and will be there for all Coloradans.
Today, we know Michael is feeling extra thankful for your support in this work.
Will you help us celebrate Michael’s birthday by taking a moment to sign his birthday card? [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_112824_thanksgivingbirthday_act]

name: Keith
subject: I'm grateful for you, Peter
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

As I take into account all of the things I’m grateful for this Thanksgiving, I want you to know that this grassroots movement is among them.

Whether you joined us for door knocks and phone banks, made a donation, or focused on movement-building work in your community, you helped us keep Minnesota blue in a tough election this year.

There’s no question about it: We will face even more challenges in 2025 and beyond. But I know our decades-strong movement will be ready to meet the moment, no matter what comes our way.

It’s an honor to fight by your side as we work to make sure everyone can afford their lives and live with dignity, safety, and respect.

Happy Thanksgiving to you and your loved ones.

With gratitude,

Keith Ellison

You can now use your 2024 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Please take advantage of your PCR and make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION so Keith can continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241127ke?refcode=body&amount=25]

Prepared and paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
Keith Ellison for Attorney General
PO Box 17224
Minneapolis, MN 55417
United States

name: DLCC Membership Team
subject: Here’s where you come in:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc
body:
Before you take a well-deserved break this winter, will you secure your commitment to state Democrats by chipping in $10 to become a 2025 DLCC Member today? | | |
---
| |
---|---
Some compare the weeks before Election Day to the “fourth quarter” of an important, must-win championship. **But here at the DLCC, our fight to elect state Dems is far from over.** _In fact, we are already gearing up for the next steps in our power-building strategy through 2025 and beyond._ With nearly a dozen special elections on the horizon, we are working to build our strongest membership team in DLCC history, one new member at a time. Each new member helps drive our movement forward. **[Activate my 2025 Membership](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqskafkX0PKr0_LE7jSFyDsC7HO837Ejb9W9HaRZxuaM3OXzxw3dOUArE5aZ6WYZ9dgB2NqWda99N2kIkuwsTOkr_Luh38owLdDceylfA-ewQOApLQQrh-TqZGnVARqXpCKvnJeBAgGH65Y129rcyXVzD4P4JSiFwQOsAIwL3T3dIoyYgvVeLK33ONqtiRT_UyFEjXoZvrXVrpYVJ3EQM8tIdPVT3y8TG5_Az-q3JIzEE-nc-nOETUMQwI539agEFiox1YO_3rbxmiYjamU1-Z8zMU18itF9UfO92Edk-A3YLaFY2VnOCM8VH8H6H-1e-sqwHhN5I3uJ0pQiKCx-A_phnrHbxSm5GB3Ia40j1Zmrc9jHexyyNwFOJaFxuBD0ikk3lCPjrZ-Sztp61uTPQzCJ/4bt/Me3rLcstQzOREYFYanMrQQ/h0/h001.Mh_k3o6RFvnOXnbe5O8I_J-kBEkzpeK2-_-3Z0fSQUo)** **Here’s where you come in:** These last few weeks of 2024 are like the final seconds of halftime. But once the whistle blows and 2025 arrives, we have to be ready to hit the ground running because our future is at stake. By joining our membership team today, you’ll help our party head into special elections and 2025 races in the best position possible. **Republicans are already working to enact their extreme Project 2025, and with their new federal trifecta, state legislative races are one of our only opportunities for Democrats to block their extreme agenda and build progressive power nationwide.** [Activating your 2025 membership today is the most impactful way to support state Democrats in upcoming races. clean_body: Before you take a well-deserved break this winter, will you secure your commitment to state Democrats by chipping in $10 to become a 2025 DLCC Member today? | | | | | ---|--- Some compare the weeks before Election Day to the “fourth quarter” of an important, must-win championship. But here at the DLCC, our fight to elect state Dems is far from over. In fact, we are already gearing up for the next steps in our power-building strategy through 2025 and beyond. With nearly a dozen special elections on the horizon, we are working to build our strongest membership team in DLCC history, one new member at a time. Each new member helps drive our movement forward. Here’s where you come in: These last few weeks of 2024 are like the final seconds of halftime. But once the whistle blows and 2025 arrives, we have to be ready to hit the ground running because our future is at stake. By joining our membership team today, you’ll help our party head into special elections and 2025 races in the best position possible. Republicans are already working to enact their extreme Project 2025, and with their new federal trifecta, state legislative races are one of our only opportunities for Democrats to block their extreme agenda and build progressive power nationwide. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | We had some critical down-ballot victories this fall, and we need everyone on this team to be ready to keep up the good fight in 2025, the game isn’t over yet. Let’s do this, DLCC Membership Team The information provided above is associated with the following email address: dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you have donated in the past with a different email, by check, or to another organization or party committee, that will not be reflected here. I won’t lie to you, team: This election was _rough_. **But we don’t have time to feel sorry for ourselves.**
Anyone who says progress is impossible is dead wrong. And anyone who thinks young voters are going to lick our wounds and feel sorry for ourselves has another thing coming.
In the next few weeks, NextGen will be galvanizing young voters nationwide and urging them to __**resist**__ the MAGA agenda.
[I’m ready to keep fighting for my future. If you’re not ready to give up on progress, will you chip in $5 right now to help us keep moving forward?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97770220/514520634/-1583500658?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2MzODE5Yy1mNmFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3LtnxdwyIiqvr5FAx-c5vzD2xg_AJA38q5mfSILSqYM=&emci=d7fee442-ccaa-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=c3c3819c-f6ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=6787172)

We’ve been promised since we were children that _every_ voice matters, that _everyone_ has a fair say, that _every_ vote counts, and that _no one_ is above the law.
That promise is in jeopardy.
But I can promise you one thing: **My generation WILL NOT fail to defend and enhance our democracy.**
Our voice matters now more than ever. This is OUR chance to make a difference.
[So please, if you’re able, invest anything you can in the youth vote today to help us win this fight for our future once and for all.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97770222/514520636/-1583500658?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2MzODE5Yy1mNmFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3LtnxdwyIiqvr5FAx-c5vzD2xg_AJA38q5mfSILSqYM=&emci=d7fee442-ccaa-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=c3c3819c-f6ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=6787172)

clean_body: | I won’t lie to you, team: This election was rough. But we don’t have time to feel sorry for ourselves. Anyone who says progress is impossible is dead wrong. And anyone who thinks young voters are going to lick our wounds and feel sorry for ourselves has another thing coming. In the next few weeks, NextGen will be galvanizing young voters nationwide and urging them to resist the MAGA agenda. | We’ve been promised since we were children that every voice matters, that everyone has a fair say, that every vote counts, and that no one is above the law. That promise is in jeopardy. But I can promise you one thing: My generation WILL NOT fail to defend and enhance our democracy. Our voice matters now more than ever. This is OUR chance to make a difference. | | | | | | Together, M. Campus Organizer NextGen PAC | Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; ; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | = |

Friend,

body:
| | | **This is _HUGE!_** Trump is **OFFICIALLY FREE!** He’s winning on every front. Last week the court in New York permanently delayed his sentencing. But it doesn’t end there. Jack Smith also dismissed all charges against him. This is the biggest **VICTORY** we’ve had in a long time. Now Trump will be able to get the job done without lawfare hanging over his head. And I’m going to make sure he **MAKES AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!** My name is Ryan Mackenzie. I’m a state representative, smart conservative, proud father, and Trump-endorsed republican. I just won a hard-fought race to get rid of Pennsylvania's most liberal Congresswoman. In just a few months I’ll be on my way to represent you in Washington. And I want to make you a promise: **I WILL NEVER STOP FIGHTING FOR YOU!** No matter what the Left throws at us, you will always be my #1 priority. But now it’s time to put all of our hard work into action. **JOIN ME AND TRUMP TODAY AND PLEDGE YOUR SUPPORT ON DAY 1!**

name: State Representative Ryan Chamberlin
subject: Newsletter from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin
body:
Newsletter from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/repryanchamberlin/newsletter-from-rep-ryan-chamberlin-12716504?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| | **NEWSLETTER FROM REP. RYAN CHAMBERLIN**
---
| Friends and Neighbors,

As we celebrate Thanksgiving this week, I hope you travel safely and enjoy spending time with loved ones. I want to express my heartfelt gratitude to the district for re-electing me to serve in Tallahassee. It is an honor to represent you in the Florida House for another 2 years! I’m also incredibly thankful for my beautiful wife and supportive kids, who have faithfully stood by me throughout this journey. I would not be here without them!

Let’s remember to give thanks for the freedoms that we have in this country. We are truly blessed! Also, remember that our freedom and safety come with a price, and we have our veterans, active military, and first responders to thank. We should never take their selflessness and sacrifice for granted.

Happy Thanksgiving!
---
| | **Hotel Owners Conference Hosted by the Asian American Hotel Owners Association**
---
|
---
---
| I had the pleasure of attending and speaking at the Hotel Owners Conference hosted by the Asian American Hotel Owners Association. It was great to network with hotel owners and companies within the industry.
---
| | **Non-Profit Excellence Academy Graduation & Give4Marion Check Presentation**
---
|
---
| It was an honor to join newly-elected Senator Stan McClain for the Non-Profit Excellence Academy Graduation and Give4Marion Check Presentation. The 28 graduates of the academy and 133 Give4Marion participants collaboratively helped raise over $3 million during 33 hours of giving on September 17th and 18th.
---
| | **Family Monument Unveiling at the Ocala-Marion County Veterans Memorial Park**
---
|
---
| I had the wonderful opportunity to attend the unveiling of the new Family Monument at the Ocala-Marion County Veterans Memorial Park. This monument honors the sacrifices made by military spouses and families while their loved ones serve our country away from home or are lost in times of war. This monument was made possible thanks to a generous donation from Cone Distributing.
---
| | **Organization Session in Tallahassee**
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| Last week, I was in Tallahassee for the 2024 Organization Session to watch as the newly elected freshman class took their oath of office. This was my first swearing-in as an incumbent member. I look forward to serving Florida during the 2024-2026 legislative term!
---
| | **Meeting with Heart of Florida Health Center & CEO Matt Clay**
---
|
---
---
| It was great to join Senator Stan McClain to meet with the Heart of Florida Health Center and CEO Matt Clay. I was excited to see the work they are doing to expand access to healthcare in our community. They offer an array of services, including family medicine, optometry, dentistry, maternity care, and a pharmacy. Their affordable prices have truly helped to serve residents both with and without insurance. I look forward to seeing them expand to service more of our community and continue to do great work.
---
| | **Meeting with DJJ Secretary Eric Hall & Arnette House Chief Executive Director Cheri Pettitt**
---
|
---
---
| It was wonderful to meet with DJJ Secretary Eric Hall and Arnette House Chief Executive Director Cheri Pettitt. I had the opportunity to hear about the great things the Arnette House does for the SINS/FINS program. Following the meeting, we toured the facility and learned more about their important work. I look forward to championing the issues important to this incredible organization in the upcoming legislative session.
---
| | **Need Assistance?**
---
| I’m in the process of moving offices, so our phone is currently down. If you need assistance or need to get in touch with my office, please send an email to me at [Ryan.Chamberlin@myfloridahouse.gov](mailto:Ryan.Chamberlin@myfloridahouse.gov).
---
|
---
| | Have a wonderful Thanksgiving!

Best regards,

**Ryan Chamberlin**
******State Representative**
**District 24**
---
| | _Copyright © 2024 Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative, All rights reserved._

Paid by Ryan Chamberlin, Republican, for State Representative

**Our mailing address is:**
Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative
526 E Park Ave
Tallahassee, FL 32301-2568

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=c76e64828f) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&t=b&e=d1c1b9864f&c=c76e64828f).

name: IDCCA
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/county_party_split?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_211124_FR_County-Party&amount=15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/county_party_split?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_211124_FR_County-Party&amount=15]

Happy Thanksgiving, team!

This has been a long year full of unexpected twists and turns, but we want to take this opportunity to let you know how grateful we are to be standing with you.

Together we got a lot done this year, and were able to accomplish so many of our goals because we had folks like you behind us. We’re thankful for you, for our supporters and staff, for all of our 102 County Chairs throughout Illinois, and for the whole community we’ve been able to create.

Have a wonderful Thanksgiving, and enjoy your time with family and loved ones.

Best,
IDCCA

clean_body: [] Happy Thanksgiving, team! This has been a long year full of unexpected twists and turns, but we want to take this opportunity to let you know how grateful we are to be standing with you. Together we got a lot done this year, and were able to accomplish so many of our goals because we had folks like you behind us. We’re thankful for you, for our supporters and staff, for all of our 102 County Chairs throughout Illinois, and for the whole community we’ve been able to create. Have a wonderful Thanksgiving, and enjoy your time with family and loved ones. Best, IDCCA GET TEXT UPDATES FROM THE IDCCA! name: April McClain Delaney
subject: Grateful for you!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY APRIL MCCLAIN DELANEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
I hope your Thanksgiving, like mine, is filled with loved ones, good food, and endless gratitude.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97771150/514523810/-743377158?refcode=BLU_EM_AMDC_2024-11-27_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzUyOGVjNjMtZmFhYy1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oD2bKwDzQT0lkxv3Qy2heonnzTlyUbtOnEkPEC3GWKs=)

| Peter,

Tomorrow, like many of you, I’ll be busy prepping for Thanksgiving dinner, so I wanted to make sure I reached out beforehand to say– _thank you._

I’m grateful for the encouragement I received on the ground in the weeks leading up to Election Day and in the weeks after. As I prepare to take on my role as your next representative, I feel energized and ready to get to work.

I’m also grateful to my family. I could not have gotten here without them.

I hope your Thanksgiving, like mine, is filled with loved ones, good food, and endless gratitude.

With deep appreciation,

April
---

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Will you join me in supporting Meals on Wheels before Thanksgiving?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Meals on Wheels operates in virtually every community in America to address senior hunger and isolation.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4535%2E35263%2EybMUFf)
Hi Peter, Before you log off to spend time with loved ones for Thanksgiving, I’m hoping you can help me make a difference in the lives of those struggling to put food on the table this holiday season. Meals on Wheels operates in virtually every community in America to address senior hunger and isolation. Year after year, this team has stepped up to help provide food to the most vulnerable in our country. I’m hoping this team can come together again and help provide Thanksgiving meals for folks who need it most this season. **[So, if you’re able, will you consider joining me in supporting Meals on Wheels with a charitable donation of any amount before Thanksgiving?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-meals.62OpwI&refcode=AU_STB_FR_CHA_GEN_AC_20241127_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4535%2E35263%2EybMUFf)** | | [DONATE](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-meals.62OpwI&refcode=AU_STB_FR_CHA_GEN_AC_20241127_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4535%2E35263%2EybMUFf)
---
Thanks for everything, Peter. I hope you have a safe and healthy Thanksgiving holiday.
— Tammy

body:
With monthly contributors, we can make sure that our campaign can pace our investments and that we hit every goal from now until Election Day.
