| Peter,

As a mom, Congresswoman, and now a candidate for Governor, I’m always on the go, which is why I make sure to plan ahead. My team and I are already working hard to prepare for the race next year, organizing everything from our budget and voter outreach to events and more. However, one of the most important steps we can take to plan effectively is knowing how much we’ll need to spend between now and Election Day, November 4, 2025.

That’s where you come in: **a monthly recurring contribution is one of the most impactful ways you can support our campaign.** With monthly contributors, we can make sure that our campaign can pace our investments and that we hit every goal from now until Election Day.

Grassroots support is critical to our success, and people like you are the fuel that will drive this campaign towards November 2025.

[_**Even $1 or $5 makes a huge difference in our efforts, so today, I’m asking: Will you join us as a monthly recurring donor to sustain our campaign now through November 4, 2025?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97771982/514525997/-1898250644?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-11-27_1&amount=5&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmNkNzJmODYtZmNhYy1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HV96_BWCujf3R9PthwPzeKUbOiwrMGsfvzssv2Nvtjs=)

We know what this political stunt really is: _a blatant attempt from the extreme MAGA right to distract from their chaotic caucus, Donald Trump’s unqualified nominees, and their dangerous Project 2025 agenda. Full stop._
They aren’t concerned about the affordability crisis families face with child care, groceries, medical bills, paying rent, or buying a house. They did, however, find time to target a trans Member of Congress and deny new moms in Congress maternity leave.
**Meanwhile, Sarah is focused on what an _overwhelming_ majority of voters in Delaware elected her to do:** build bridges and find solutions to bring down costs and give all Americans a fair shot at success.
That’s how Sarah led the successful effort to pass paid medical and family leave, raise the minimum wage, and expand health care access as State Senator in Delaware. And that’s exactly the results-driven approach she’s bringing to Washington — and she won’t let extremists slow down her efforts.

But that didn’t stop the MAGA GOP from announcing an anti-trans bathroom ban at the Capitol in an effort to distract from the real issues facing this country. = | = We know what this political stunt really is: a blatant attempt from the extreme MAGA right to distract from their chaotic caucus, Donald Trump’s unqualified nominees, and their dangerous Project 2025 agenda. Full stop. They aren’t concerned about the affordability crisis families face with child care, groceries, medical bills, paying rent, or buying a house. They did, however, find time to target a trans Member of Congress and deny new moms in Congress maternity leave. Meanwhile, Sarah is focused on what an overwhelming majority of voters in Delaware elected her to do: build bridges and find solutions to bring down costs and give all Americans a fair shot at success. That’s how Sarah led the successful effort to pass paid medical and family leave, raise the minimum wage, and expand health care access as State Senator in Delaware. name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 11/27/2024 🦃
body:
The irony of Colorado obtaining gray wolves from British Columbia
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
This Thanksgiving, we at Rocky Mountain Voice are filled with gratitude for you—our dedicated readers and supporters. Your engagement, curiosity, and commitment to staying informed inspire us every day to bring you stories that matter most to our community and beyond.
As we gather with loved ones, let’s celebrate the values that unite us: faith, family, and freedom. From all of us at RMV, thank you for being part of our journey. Wishing you a joyful, warm, and meaningful Thanksgiving! In our last newsletter until after the holiday:
**Here in Colorado...** Articles today highlight the irony of Colorado [importing gray wolves from Canada](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), [a recount in Colorado's House District 16](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), and the challenge the Food Bank of the Rockies is facing with meeting the [highest food insecurity level in a decade](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Meanwhile, Colorado’s ability to build and fix the highways that are key to transporting goods and people could [take a $110 million hit](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in the next fiscal year under budget-balancing proposals being offered by Gov. Jared Polis.
**In National News...** [Tom Homan responds to Denver mayor](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.): ‘He’s willing to go to jail, I’m willing to put him in jail’. Elon Musk also teases a [potential acquisition of MSNBC](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), stirring excitement across social media.
**Commentary Spotlight...** Rocky Mountain Voice delves into the [potential energy revival](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) led by Chris Wright and Doug Burgum, emphasizing the importance of practical leadership in restoring America's energy independence. Another piece calls for empowering local communities in [managing public lands](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), advocating for a balanced approach that respects both economic and environmental needs.
This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, November 27, 2024.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[The irony of Colorado obtaining gray wolves from British Columbia](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY LINDY BROWNING, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
While Colorado wildlife managers have been trying to figure out where to get the next crop of 10 to 15 wolves to import into Colorado, British Columbia, Canada, has been trying to cull their population of wolves because of the predation of caribou that led to the endangerment of the herds.
After the Confederated Tribes of the Colville Reservation in Washington rescinded their offer to send gray wolves to Colorado in late 2024, state wildlife officials were left scrambling to figure out where to procure the voter-mandated wolves for the repopulation efforts in Colorado.
As a result of the Colville Tribe withdrawal, Colorado has, ironically, reached out to secure a deal with British Columbia to take some of their unwanted wolf population and bring them to Colorado.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Recount ordered in Colorado House District 16, expected soon in District 19](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado Secretary of State Jena Griswold has ordered recounts in two critical races, with Republicans Rebecca Keltie and Dan Woog holding razor-thin leads. These races are essential to maintaining the Republican success in preventing a Democratic supermajority in the state house.
* In House District 16, Rebecca Keltie leads by just six votes, triggering an automatic recount under Colorado law, which mandates recounts for margins below 0.5%. The process must be completed by December 6.
* Similarly, Dan Woog leads by only 121 votes in District 19, with a recount expected in early December. Both results are pivotal for the GOP's strategic balance in the Colorado legislature.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Food Bank of the Rockies facing challenge of meeting highest food insecurity level in a decade](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* The Food Bank of the Rockies reports the highest levels of food insecurity in a decade, with one in nine Coloradans facing hunger and rural areas hit particularly hard. The organization has ramped up efforts, including delivering fresh produce and expanding volunteer programs, to meet the growing demand.
* Communities like Nucla face unique struggles due to economic downturns and inflation, with food banks stepping in to provide vital support. Initiatives like fresh produce deliveries and tailored food programs are helping bridge the gap for families in need.
* The Food Bank of the Rockies and its partners, such as the West End Family Link Center, are working tirelessly to address food scarcity. From large-scale distributions to local fundraising and volunteering, every effort is making a significant impact.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Tom Homan responds to Denver mayor: ‘He’s willing to go to jail, I’m willing to put him in jail’](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [FOX NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Denver Mayor Mike Johnston has publicly declared his readiness to face jail time in protest of Trump administration deportation plans, sparking a heated response from Tom Homan, the incoming border czar, who warns of legal consequences for harboring illegal immigrants.
* Johnston has likened the situation to a "Tiananmen Square moment" and pledged support for limited deportations of individuals convicted of serious crimes, but his stance has drawn criticism from federal officials emphasizing public safety and legal compliance.
* Homan has reiterated the administration's focus on national security and public safety, asserting that Denver's refusal to cooperate with federal policies will not deter enforcement efforts.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Proposed state budget could cut $110 million from already pothole-laden highways](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE SUM & SUBSTANCE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Governor Polis's budget proposal includes $110 million in cuts to highway funding, with $65 million as a permanent reduction and $49 million as short-term reallocations, impacting safety and maintenance programs.
* The Colorado Department of Transportation warns that these cuts will delay new projects and halve funding for safety hazard mitigation, leading to further deterioration of state highways.
* Transportation advocates and legislators express frustration, arguing the proposed cuts could exacerbate existing road conditions and prioritize transit projects over critical highway repairs.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Elon threatens to buy MSNBC and the internet cheers](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [MIG REPORTS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Elon Musk has sparked online excitement by joking about purchasing MSNBC amidst reports of Comcast planning to sell the network due to poor ratings, highlighting legacy media’s decline in influence.
* The idea of Musk acquiring MSNBC has fueled conversations around free speech, media credibility, and the shift towards alternative platforms as public trust in mainstream media erodes.
* Americans are responding to media consolidation with mixed emotions, viewing figures like Musk as both disruptors of the establishment and symbols of the broader cultural realignment in modern media.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Daniel: Let local communities lead on public lands](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY BOBBIE DANIEL, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_Public lands are woven into the fabric of Colorado’s identity, serving as living symbols of our shared heritage, natural beauty and deep connection to the land._ _
__Nowhere is this more evident than in Western Colorado, where public lands foster a profound respect for nature and a commitment to stewardship. To ensure these lands thrive for future generations, we must adopt outcome-based policies prioritizing access, sustainability and thoughtful management — balancing conservation with economic vitality._ _
__Unfortunately, this balance is increasingly threatened by political instability and federal overreach. Mesa County, where 73% of the land is federally managed, provides a telling example of the challenges at hand._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Sloan: Could Doug Burgum and Chris Wright lead an American energy revival?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY KELLY SLOAN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_There is much consternation in different corners about President-elect Donald Trump’s cabinet picks; indeed, some of it is not entirely unwarranted. Much of it, on the other hand, is on the order of polemical hysteria, an outcropping of the left’s general caterwauling about how America under a second Trump presidency will take on the appearance of a Hieronymus Bosch painting._
_The Senate may have its work cut out in sorting through the noise generated around some of the appointments, but two that ought to give them no pause in the least are the President-elect’s picks for Interior and Energy: North Dakota Governor Doug Burgum, and Liberty Energy CEO Chris Wright respectively._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️**
**[Canada, Mexico to face 25% tariffs, China 10% until borders are secure, drug importation stops, Trump says](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY BRIAN PORTER | NATIONAL | NOVEMBER 25** _President-elect Donald Trump has put Canada and Mexico on notice — close their borders with the United States or face the penalty of tariffs on all imports into the United States._
**[Schumann: Colorado Springs has ‘a hometown Jussie Smollett situation’. A look at a mayor’s alleged deception](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN | COMMENTARY | NOVEMBER 25** _Colorado Springs is dealing with “a hometown Jussie Smollett situation.”_ _That’s how Todd Watkins, vice chair of the El Paso County Republican Party, described the hate crime hoax involving Mayor Yemi Mobolade. Watkins, a former U.S. Customs and Border Protection official and U.S. Army analyst, says political violence in El Paso County has risen during the last nine years._
__
[**’Kalam: Denver Mayor Mike Johnston’s insurrection rhetoric**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[****](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**BY AHNAF KALAM | COMMENTARY |****NOVEMBER 25** _In the wake of the recent electoral landslide — a decisive repudiation of unchecked illegal immigration and the catastrophic security failures at America’s borders — one might have expected local leaders to reconsider their stances on sanctuary city policies._

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [brian@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🦃 DID YOU KNOW?** The first Thanksgiving was a**three-day harvest festival in 1621** that celebrated the Wampanoag people and the Pilgrims. It wasn't observed as a national holiday until 1863. Americans eat about **46 million turkeys and 50 million pumpkin pies** on Thanksgiving. The tradition of **pardoning a turkey at the White House** began in 1989 with George H.W. Bush
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY**
“Gratitude can transform common days into Thanksgivings, turn routine jobs into joy, and change ordinary opportunities into blessings.”
|

Peter, when the Supreme Court ruled that Donald Trump (or any President for that matter) had unlimited authority and immunity, it threatened to unravel our democracy and rule of law in our country...

**We won’t sugarcoat this, Peter – we only have until January 3rd to take action to reverse course and make sure NO ONE, much less someone like Donald Trump, is above the law.**

Which is why it is CRITICAL that Congress take action to pass the No Kings Act to undo the Supreme Court’s disastrous ruling that would give the President unlimited authority and be free from accountability or consequences. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: A verse-by-verse explanation of Revelation
body:
A hope-filled study of the book of Revelation
Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return?
| | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=21d49a120c074dd2ae15a50b9b6cbdd0&_e=IH53BcQ_GHkphpUwERZ5C9DZp0HLSrbclyhLQ0uskoDB4ltCCZOWRt1VMerzpuvu5299J5qf4izWbZxdqrIQHjEScrdYVmpAXlNDoTVNxK44RrbSLhTC5zBjm22TKk_3P3sepDv2HKcmPklKYlDmUsIdABPbWhV-RjNwN3-1jjbJyvpFSAeOcHrgxssX7aJ45A-AJTeST_z5EX_9uOIXwAzF143nepAzTdTG4yhSSjnO283LUpPwLHur2yfmm7qYkbUwz6RJdfRdF1-krSCfchxaK5obCbUPA6d4as16YJhXxSeGA4rp3tgB2pXPALjn_5eGZxEWvCX2hFecwe1U0tGfwhP4_ZMtsvHAD99Z9kUN0rskmYb_LkZr75f_AwMa_HVfNJMDrSC6UBlNMvMt6w%3D%3D)
---
Hello Friend, Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return? _When we all get to Heaven, what a day of rejoicing that will be!_ _When we all see Jesus, we’ll sing and shout the victory!_ The words of this old hymn say it perfectly ... Christ’s return is going to be glorious! **But between now and then, how should we live**? What does God’s Word say about end times? As the world grows increasingly sinful ... **what should our response be?**
---
| | When I have those kinds of questions, I turn to the book of Revelation, which I’ve found helps provide answers and strength in these dark days. And today, I’m pleased to offer you my verse-by-verse study of the book of Revelation entitled _Final Conquest._ Final Conquest is my first commentary on the book of Revelation. It’s all about the return of Jesus Christ, the most hope-filled event in human history. This book will help you face the future with confidence! God doesn’t want you to live in fear. Final Conquest will unpack God’s plan as never before — you’ll be encouraged!
---
| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=21d49a120c074dd2ae15a50b9b6cbdd0&_e=IH53BcQ_GHkphpUwERZ5C9DZp0HLSrbclyhLQ0uskoDB4ltCCZOWRt1VMerzpuvu5299J5qf4izWbZxdqrIQHjEScrdYVmpAXlNDoTVNxK44RrbSLhTC5zBjm22TKk_3P3sepDv2HKcmPklKYlDmUsIdABPbWhV-RjNwN3-1jjbJyvpFSAeOcHrgxssX7aJ45A-AJTeST_z5EX_9uOIXwAzF143nepAzTdTG4yhSSjm-6CVySF8TK6qkIjb7SxR9Irp2gQ_MUK_91ZUnrSRw8pbNUVQYY6YoTSZB89cQg1h51brKdKtt7aHXG0IAZZY3JSiqW50desK83UzmXP7L2FwmEZeMarUWTJXIP6TcjzA-l2gBCM6lWb9pY8W9sTrmvB_mwhpvoaRAVRU5aS7dXQ%3D%3D)
---
| | With your generous donation to _Pathway to Victory_ \-- to help keep our ministry strong, for you and your family, and for listeners and viewers across the country--I will send you a copy of _Final Conquest_ for free! You can make your most generous donation here: [https://secure.ptv.org/final-conquest-generous-gift-kit-1](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=21d49a120c074dd2ae15a50b9b6cbdd0&_e=IH53BcQ_GHkphpUwERZ5C9DZp0HLSrbclyhLQ0uskoDB4ltCCZOWRt1VMerzpuvu5299J5qf4izWbZxdqrIQHjEScrdYVmpAXlNDoTVNxK44RrbSLhTC5zBjm22TKk_3P3sepDv2HKcmPklKYlDmUsIdABPbWhV-RjNwN3-1jjbJyvpFSAeOcHrgxssX7aJ45A-AJTeST_z5EX_9uOIXwAzF143nepAzTdTG4yhSSjlrB5NaJ7UWZvXatAdfvS2zybXELz8_L1R-c8N5a4CfsVXlXgFyarqTIoSmzCVDXkr766HofNY53qaGDyiMGsz-IOYJPOCSYpdCIedIPtvrV974YuA5QAcf427DmQZdY4Jp8A-4zm13sA8ZfW0Ej8j-odisXB8N0ogs1mlFRDI9RQ%3D%3D) One day soon the darkness will pass...and our long-awaited King of kings and Lord of lords will return and make His final conquest. | Peter,

Donald Trump's impending return to Washington is already creating chaos. The first major test of his second presidency will be getting his extreme and unqualified cabinet nominees confirmed in the Senate.

_**Here’s what we’re up against:**_ **Robert F. Kennedy Jr. for Health and Human Service Secretary** – a known anti-vaxxer and conspiracy theorist.

**Tulsi Gabbard for Director of National Intelligence** – who has shown a pattern of siding with Russia and other authoritarian regimes around the world.

**Pete Hegseth for Defense Secretary** – a FOX News host who has been accused of sexual assault. Trump has made his extreme vision for America clear, and he's pressuring Senate leaders to allow recess appointments – _a tactic used to bypass checks and balances in the Senate so he can install his most extreme and unqualified nominees for top cabinet positions._

Fight for Progress is working to uplift progressive voices and build Democratic power so we can hold Donald Trump and his MAGA allies accountable, and your support helps fuel our fight. body:
| | |
---
| | Hi Friend , Welcome to the latest New Pennsylvania Project newsletter! Today, we feel grateful for you, supporters of expanding the electorate.We wish you and your families a Happy Thanksgiving.#WhenWeVoteWeWin
---
|
---
---
| |
# Elections have consequences
---
In 2025, PA will have critical, high-profile judicial races on the ballot. We must work to ensure that all eligible Pennsylvanians register to vote and have the information they need to make their voices heard. We have already seen attacks on voting rights and mis and disinformation following the 2024 November elections. These attacks will only continue as we head into the critical local, municipal, and judicial elections happening in Pennsylvania in 2025. We must be prepared to go on the offensive and defend voting rights by pushing for a PA Voting Rights Act.
---
|
---
| |
# UPCOMING EVENTS

---
| |
---
|
# Why Courts Matter 101
---
Want to ensure your rights and freedoms? Our state and federal courts matter. Learn more about them. Join us for a **virtual town hall** onThursday, December 19, 2024 6:30pm-8:00pm on Zoom

clean_body: | | | | | Hi Friend , Welcome to the latest New Pennsylvania Project newsletter! Today, we feel grateful for you, supporters of expanding the electorate.We wish you and your families a Happy Thanksgiving.#WhenWeVoteWeWin | | | Elections have consequences In 2025, PA will have critical, high-profile judicial races on the ballot. We must work to ensure that all eligible Pennsylvanians register to vote and have the information they need to make their voices heard. We have already seen attacks on voting rights and mis and disinformation following the 2024 November elections. These attacks will only continue as we head into the critical local, municipal, and judicial elections happening in Pennsylvania in 2025. We must be prepared to go on the offensive and defend voting rights by pushing for a PA Voting Rights Act. | | | UPCOMING EVENTS | | | Why Courts Matter 101 Want to ensure your rights and freedoms? Our state and federal courts matter. Learn more about them. Join us for a virtual town hall onThursday, December 19, 2024 6:30pm-8:00pm on Zoom | | | NPP IN THE NEWS In an article titled WESA, Ashley Lopez wrote: "Kadida Kenner, founding CEO of the New Pennsylvania Project, said the election result has prompted some organizers to take a step back — even if it's just for a little bit." | Election Law Blog also made a summary of top suits mentioning our organization. | RECENT EVENTS | | NPP's founding CEO, Kadida Kenner, at one of State Senator Vincent Hughes’ (See Me-Imagine YOU!) Career Days. | | | This experience is designed to empower 6th-8th grade students by exposing them to potential careers and jobs through professionals that look like them. | | SOCIAL OF THE WEEK | | | | | #COURTSMATTER | | “Pennsylvania’s highest court has directed three counties not to include undated or misdated mail ballots in their November election results. Such ballots have been the subject of years of litigation in various courts, and became an issue again after Bucks, Montgomery, and Philadelphia counties moved to count them for the Nov. 5 election.” “On Thursday, a New York trial court judge struck down the state’s 2022 Voting Rights Act (NYVRA), which was created to make up for deficiencies in federal law following Congress’s 2021 failure to pass the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Act... Citing the 2023 U.S. Supreme Court ruling that determined race-based affirmative action in college admissions was unconstitutional, Vazquez-Doles wrote that the NYVRA similarly “provides enhanced rights” to protected classes, in violation of the Constitution. ” “Ohio Attorney General David Yost (R) approved the petition summary of the Ohio Voters Bill of Rights, a proposed pro-voting constitutional amendment that would greatly expand ballot access in the Buckeye State.” | NEWS YOU CAN USE “Republican challenger Dave McCormick defeated incumbent Democrat Bob Casey by just over 15,000 votes in a Senate race that saw more than 65,000 provisional ballots cast. Those provisionals were closely scrutinized for the first time, and although they did not change the outcome, the Casey team argues there should be changes in how they are handled.” “ In an election year that saw big wins for Republicans in Pennsylvania, the state House stayed under Democratic control — by one seat. The party’s ability to hold onto its majority during a red wave is partly explained by newer district boundaries approved in early 2022 and partly by the idiosyncratic ways voters behave.” “Investigations by five Pennsylvania counties into the submission of suspicious voter registration forms haven’t resulted in any charges yet, and three of the counties aren’t releasing details about the progress of their inquiries...There is no evidence in any of the counties that the forms under scrutiny resulted in any ineligible voters casting a ballot. Officials emphasized that the suspicious applications were not processed.” | | | Do you know who originally inhabited the land you now occupy? The map above shows the original borders of the Indigenous people's land before colonization. The stars indicate the location our eight offices. | | | While shopping around for the holidays, consider supporting New Pennsylvania Project's organizing efforts in 2025. The results of the 2024 General Election underscored the importance of year-round and consistent voter engagement. A donation helps us to build long-term power within the communities we center – historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth. Donate here | | Last day to register to vote: Monday, May 5, 2025 Primary Election: Tuesday, May 20, 2025 Last day to register to vote for the General Election: Monday, October 20, 2025 Last day to request mail-in ballot: Tuesday, October 28, 2025 General Election: Tuesday, November 4, 2025 | Important Links: Voter Hotlines: Voter Protection Hotline: 1-866-OUR-VOTEDOS PA Voter Hotline: 1-877-VOTESPA Spanish/English Hotline: 1-866-VE-Y-VOTAAsian Languages Hotline: 1-888-API-VOTE Arabic/English Hotline: 1-844-YALLA-US | | Our Contact Information New Pennsylvania Project P.O. Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 4126996771 | | | | | ---|---|---

name: Truth to Power
subject: Katie wants to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
To continue building a democracy that truly serves us, we need to make sure we are on the right track.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39331%2E3422442%2Er9Emxm)
Derek,
Together, Team Truth to Power is working to elect leaders who put people over profits. To continue building a democracy that truly serves us, we need to make sure we are on the right track.
**Katie wants to hear from you.** We have a super **quick 3 question survey** that will only take a few minutes of your time. Your feedback will help us align our priorities with the most important part of this movement: _you_.
**[Please take a moment to complete our survey today. We promise Katie will see the results—she’s eager to hear from you!](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/ttp-survey-em-20241127/?refcode=em20241127-39331&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&akid=39331%2E3422442%2Er9Emxm)**
[Take the survey ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/ttp-survey-em-20241127/?refcode=em20241127-39331&akid=39331%2E3422442%2Er9Emxm)
We know November has been a whirlwind, and with the stress of the election still at the top of our minds, it can feel like there's just too much to handle.
With Thanksgiving tomorrow and Christmas around the corner, now is the time to treasure memories with family. Katie herself is preparing for the holidays, but she’s also thinking about the challenges ahead, especially with Trump's inauguration in January and what that means for Californians.
This season is a time to think about family, _so please tell us what you need from us, with your loved ones in mind_.
**[Take the survey and share your thoughts with us.](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/ttp-survey-em-20241127/?refcode=em20241127-39331&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&akid=39331%2E3422442%2Er9Emxm)**
Thank you,
Truth to Power

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20241127-39331&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39331_3422442_r9Emxm&akid=39331%2E3422442%2Er9Emxm)**
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39331%2E3422442%2Er9Emxm).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: Care in Action
subject: Messages of gratitude for you 💐
body:
Thank you for sharing your story, and caring for your community.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97773148/514530164/664783965?ms=112724_thankyoushare&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmZhMThhNi0wMmFkLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o2zYvaIt5t-NhAunnDO5ngZMmym0DWjo9FpnvuZFias=&emci=bc78d875-59ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=fbfa18a6-02ad-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=864787)
Hi Peter,
Thank you so much for adding your message of gratitude to our collection.
We hope that reading these messages will fill you with thanks for the caregivers in your community, and inspire you to reach out personally and express your gratitude. **Caregivers, these messages are for you!**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97773149/514530165/-652034714?ms=112724_thankyoushare&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmZhMThhNi0wMmFkLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o2zYvaIt5t-NhAunnDO5ngZMmym0DWjo9FpnvuZFias=&emci=bc78d875-59ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=fbfa18a6-02ad-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=864787)
Today, we’re thinking about all of our Care in Action community members who are caring for loved ones over the holiday weekend, or are working to take care of someone else.
****Your work is invaluable, essential, and makes holiday memories possible.****
Have a restful holiday!

clean_body: Thank you for sharing your story, and caring for your community. Hi Peter, Thank you so much for adding your message of gratitude to our collection. We hope that reading these messages will fill you with thanks for the caregivers in your community, and inspire you to reach out personally and express your gratitude. Caregivers, these messages are for you! Today, we’re thinking about all of our Care in Action community members who are caring for loved ones over the holiday weekend, or are working to take care of someone else. **Your work is invaluable, essential, and makes holiday memories possible.** Have a restful holiday! Care in Action

| | Thank you for everything you’ve done to defend the freedom to vote. Thank you for believing in what we can achieve together. Thank you for fighting for a future where everyone has access to education, health care, and housing. This election cycle has been a long one, but through it all, you have remained steadfast in your commitment to ensure free and fair elections right alongside the Fair Fight team — and we’re incredibly grateful. We've seen firsthand how collective action from this team can fuel the change we want to see in our communities, and we’ll need to stay dedicated to our work in the face of new challenges. Our work to protect and expand the freedom to vote is more important now than ever. From all of us here, wishing you a safe, healthy, and joyous holiday season. # [#] CHECK IT OUT: We just launched our first digital ad!

https://secure.ngpvan.com/4KWAPJfg1k-ZFgBUYrxAaQ2?amount= [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4KWAPJfg1k-ZFgBUYrxAaQ2?amount=]Josh has spent his career standing up for Jersey commuters, middle-class families, and taxpayers. He’s running to be our “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs” Governor – focusing on lowering taxes and costs, expanding job opportunities, solving problems, and defending Jersey Values.

Now, we’re making sure every Jersey voter knows that Josh is fighting for them.

This ad will be crucial in gaining support in the early stages of our campaign, but we need your help to make sure every voter sees it. Watch the new ad, share it with your friends and family, and contribute $ today so we can share Josh’s message across Jersey! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4KWAPJfg1k-ZFgBUYrxAaQ2?amount=]

– Team Gottheimer
Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. name: Stand Up [FFR]
subject: “We can’t let the fear paralyze us”
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
we’re counting on your action
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22577%2E4449941%2EPN3iT-)
---
**We needed this reminder!** With all the news of Trump’s appointees, it’s easy to fall victim to fear and let it stop us from taking action.

But we can’t let that happen – _that’s exactly what Trump is counting on!_

_He’s already threatened to jail members of the January 6th Committee like Jamie Raskin, so we can’t roll over and let that happen!_ [**So we’re taking action, and starting by standing with Jamie Raskin against Trump’s upcoming attacks »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-with-raskin-24-new/?source=FFR_20241127_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=7&akid=22577%2E4449941%2EPN3iT-) | [25,000 SIGNATURE GOAL: ADD YOUR NAME TO STAND WITH JAMIE RASKIN AND FIGHT BACK AGAINST DONALD TRUMP »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-with-raskin-24-new/?source=FFR_20241127_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=8&akid=22577%2E4449941%2EPN3iT-)

fightforreform.org Thank you for supporting Fight For Reform, a State Level Project of End Citizens United. The Supreme Court’s 2010 Citizens United v. FEC decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections. **Fight For Reform is standing up to Big Money by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.**

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26912?t=2&akid=22577%2E4449941%2EPN3iT-). **Or, to help us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26913?t=3&akid=22577%2E4449941%2EPN3iT-).**

name: Jill Stein
subject: Let's go!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
body:
| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_beginning&n=1)
---
Peter, As we power up for the next phase of this movement, I want to send you my deepest heartfelt gratitude. For you are a paragon of courage, the unstoppable force we need for an America and a world that works for all of us! **Together we have changed history, and our work has only begun.** Despite the extraordinary effort to silence, smear and intimidate us, you stood strong to challenge genocide, endless war, oligarchy, inequality, climate collapse, rising fascism, nuclear armageddon and more. **You forced solutions into the election dialogue that would otherwise have been ignored** \- from a weapons embargo to end Israel’s genocide, to ending endless war, a $25 dollar minimum wage, rent control, Medicare for All, a real Green New Deal, reparations, land back, an end to mass incarceration and police violence, and ending the migration crisis by ending predatory US policies driving mass migration in the first place - from endless war and neo-colonialism to the war on drugs and more. It is a tribute to you that we emerge with the third highest vote count in the race, some 770,000 votes and counting. In fact, **among people-powered parties, we have the highest vote count of all,** making us the leading political alternative \- as we continue building collaboration across like-minded parties and movements. We also helped maintain Green ballot access in 17 states across the country, no small feat given the extraordinary effort to deny our ballot access. We did all of this despite the most extreme propaganda and political repression I’ve seen in my lifetime: the DNC “war room” to smear and censor us; their “army of lawyers” to kick us off the ballot; their job postings to solicit spies and infiltrators; and for the first time ever, a billion-dollar campaign had to buy smear ads against a grassroots candidate. Every time their attack dogs pounced – like AOC, DNC chair Jaime Harrison, Thom Hartmann, Angela Rye, Mark Ruffalo and more – they were deservedly ridiculed on social media. Don’t be discouraged by a vote count more distorted than ever by billionaire money, ballot access obstruction, censorship, disinformation, and fear-mongering.**In ways that count the most, we emerge stronger than ever - in our resolve to keep building and in the breadth and depth of new partnerships** with the Muslim American, Arab American, student, radical labor, immigrant and Black Liberation movements. More than one in three eligible voters stayed home, rejecting both parties that have thrown them under the bus. These voters are largely young, low income and people of color. This is why Democrats worked so hard to disappear our campaign, fearing the potential for disenfranchised voters to discover a campaign fighting for them. Unaware of a people-powered option, millions of working people stayed home or swung to Trump. But Trump’s agenda of deportations and tariffs will cause massive economic chaos and inflation, while tax giveaways for the rich and obscene military expenditures will squander resources needed for health care, housing and climate survival. All of this will leave Americans more desperate than ever for a politics for working people. It’s only a matter of time and concerted outreach for us to reach voters hungry for what we’re offering. **Our campaign was never just about a single election - it has always been about building a lasting movement for change**. **That work continues, and I invite you to join us in taking the next steps.** Getting active with the Green Party is an important way for us to stay connected and keep up the momentum. You can connect with your [state party](https://jillsteinforpresident.nationbuilder.com/r?u=tnCv4JfsA24JYqaqIJinbeal-S1euKS8oV907DDY9neQ9ZKJYF4sK-lXKp2UNw5i&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_beginning&n=2), sign up for the national [Green Party newsletter](https://jillsteinforpresident.nationbuilder.com/r?u=tnCv4JfsA24JYqaqIJinbVvXc9f0PBLkkdpFl7AzDvc&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_beginning&n=3), and join a [caucus](https://jillsteinforpresident.nationbuilder.com/r?u=tnCv4JfsA24JYqaqIJinba32YQ4MALAqqGAlyoEWqVE&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_beginning&n=4) through the embedded links. Through your state party, you can be appointed to a national working committee (including Ballot Access, Campaign Coordination, Diversity, Eco-Action, Fundraising, IT, Media, Outreach, Peace Action, Platform and more). Stay tuned for a labor committee and Muslim caucus currently being formed. **I hope you’ll get involved today so we can keep organizing together - and stay tuned for more to come on next steps!** This is not the end - it’s a new beginning. I’ll be in touch through ongoing social media, occasional emails, and a biweekly livestream beginning in the new year. As we face unprecedented crises threatening our rights, our lives, and life on Earth itself, by standing together, we can transform our world into one that truly works for all of us. Thank you for being part of this incredible journey. Your passion, commitment, and belief in this movement inspire me every day. Let’s keep the momentum going and build a future rooted in justice, sustainability, and peace. Finally, **I want to share****a[short video](https://jillsteinforpresident.nationbuilder.com/r?u=5KRjyNdFqTjg6bT5b005ZXzTMgmg_QXrq2vfr8fx2B_Tf5HgSzX9VH-0WlEj07-1&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_beginning&n=5)** **that captures the spirit of this campaign and what many of us believe lies ahead.** Huge thanks to our amazing team member, Mar Kamal ([@grinvites](https://jillsteinforpresident.nationbuilder.com/r?u=RJ3f0iceFrE9eH0E0hYe8QmUvPQ6feP-g87lx7ox4ikuPAQaB9PywiVV2CuoPok3&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_beginning&n=6) on Instagram) for this inspiration.
---
| [](https://jillsteinforpresident.nationbuilder.com/r?u=5KRjyNdFqTjg6bT5b005ZXzTMgmg_QXrq2vfr8fx2B_Tf5HgSzX9VH-0WlEj07-1&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_beginning&n=7 "WATCH NOW") [WATCH NOW](https://jillsteinforpresident.nationbuilder.com/r?u=5KRjyNdFqTjg6bT5b005ZXzTMgmg_QXrq2vfr8fx2B_Tf5HgSzX9VH-0WlEj07-1&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_beginning&n=7)
---
[ ](https://jillsteinforpresident.nationbuilder.com/r?u=5KRjyNdFqTjg6bT5b005ZXzTMgmg_QXrq2vfr8fx2B_Tf5HgSzX9VH-0WlEj07-1&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_beginning&n=8)
---
I hope to see you in the adventure that awaits! In gratitude, Jill Stein
---

name: Thank You Jack Smith! (via VPP)
subject: Your signature [not recorded]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Hurry before he steps down!!
| We’re running out of time to thank Special Counsel Jack Smith for his incredible work and defend him from Donald Trump’s wrath!

**When we reviewed our signature list this morning, we were STUNNED to see your name still MISSING!**

_As a top local Democrat, we don’t want you to miss this opportunity._ **You only have until MIDNIGHT:** [**Sign the letter to thank Jack Smith before he STEPS DOWN! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85208?t=6&akid=18106%2E878179%2E_RLSmB) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85208?t=7&akid=18106%2E878179%2E_RLSmB)
---
Don’t delay,

_The Voter Protection Project_
**-BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE-**
**🚨 URGENT 🚨
Trump Has Sights Set on Prosecuting Political Rivals — Including Jack Smith **
Friend, despite Jack Smith announcing he’s stepping down, Donald Trump is STILL out for revenge.
**He’s not only plotting to DESTROY all evidence against him, but PROSECUTE Jack Smith!**
[**We need 99 more Democrats in your area to sign our letter thanking Jack Smith for his work and standing with him against these vile attacks! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85208?t=8&akid=18106%2E878179%2E_RLSmB)
[Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85208?t=9&akid=18106%2E878179%2E_RLSmB)
---
To: Special Counsel Jack Smith
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: I stand with you. **Dear Special Counsel Jack Smith,**

**_I am FURIOUS that Trump is seeking to prosecute you!_**

Trump is running scared because he KNOWS you’re about to drop hundreds of pages of evidence detailing his treasonous crimes.

He’s even promising to be a _“dictator on day one,”_ hell-bent on avenging anyone who has held him accountable.

I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats across the country stand with you.

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of your amazing work over the years to bring Donald Trump to justice! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremism »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85208?t=10&akid=18106%2E878179%2E_RLSmB) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85208?t=11&akid=18106%2E878179%2E_RLSmB)
---
__X A grateful Democrat__
_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18106%2E878179%2E_RLSmB). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18106%2E878179%2E_RLSmB).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18106%2E878179%2E_RLSmB) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=18106%2E878179%2E_RLSmB). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18106%2E878179%2E_RLSmB)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=18106%2E878179%2E_RLSmB)

name: Annie & Renee
subject: A new way to put kids first
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THEIR FUTURE FUND
body:
| | | If you'd like to unsubscribe,[click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-gP0Xd1LL-Lub7Gk22PHy9v_zDMKsOhIsGaYsSQAIlT46RJ1cLFi0RbsWsZWZVQtXmgyDsn337uID04JUXAsI6orsUbi_w-ZL2hmMGJwRhHBuSYhkHdOJIfycTO2ziykm00WYy1J0J0J3mLJBesqG89ZmTYg43pbeVXlgucmQBhBpUditLjybDJz9rg5wtSv1ful52pdjZIak0f9yxU9YqGX7Fw4ysptodGmdXXfcECk3h6gqC-OYvsg-lEkMbOSNHe0-Do43SkzhSnqUUAQGx5tLTbofFFau4BkFnOEG63O0GAK2jDMXWZINneD0tGF3fTjkOb6M2iuyZYNHqH-Ad1KksRJBFPT9DOtw7YSoi5b07igTfY5DTRqXU0gvsLwKKc5CKBPWrjqFdFOj4mnEm/4bt/YganEPRWRjGAJXa714Aa4A/h0/h001.ecAqnaFXOwpwh8y5A0WhVsywoN8GFTWHBVdiSwLky-U) | |
---
After a tough Election Day, we’re reflecting on what we’ve built together — and looking toward what’s next. In fact, just a few weeks ago, I asked all of you how you thought this work should move forward. I heard from so many of you, and I appreciate all of the thoughts you shared!

We started this movement because kids don’t have lobbyists or lawyers fighting for them in Washington. With what we know will be a tough road ahead under the incoming administration, we’re expanding that mission beyond elections with the launch of **[Their Future Fund](theirfutureourvotefund.org?source=EM_NBI_TFP_20241127_FR_TFFLaunch_0_3MO_AnnieRenee_NA_NA_TFFLaunch&link_id=2&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&email_referrer=email_2544131&email_subject=a-new-way-to-put-kids-first)** — _a new nonprofit dedicated to education, advocacy, and real solutions for America’s kids._

Here’s a sneak peek into what Their Future Fund will do:
👉 **Break down policies** so everyone understands how they impact children’s health, safety, and education.
👉 **Empower families and caregivers** to get involved in shaping the policies that affect their lives.
👉 **Raise awareness** about critical issues like the climate crisis, gun violence, and child poverty.
👉 **Advocate for action** by connecting communities with lawmakers to push for real change.

The work to support our nation's children doesn’t end at the ballot box. We’re thrilled to expand our outreach. **[Will you rush a tax-deductible $5 donation now to help us get our newest launch off the ground? We’re aiming to raise an initial $25,000 by the end of Giving Tuesday next week.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv9DdHOUAa5ZQEC8e9YmrM8Hn1T_1xNXuL5wQR1dhQ38rQa_tX1Fdz0Yf1x-XrxDSc4DQ12TV-dJ_Z6hq8ol_g976GDH5hZ6uXt9qCKTkYjsWIuK9vXkzcsW93Q5oQVATI--uTaXqls5s1Ssb8iBh-CAi-WHAQqXPum10HSaeRUZSugSIuLH3DwyasU2nz2V5xfkOBux6k_aBN_QpQHuQsjaS4qPDqj6hN_e9D8RP5NtlqbPtir-ut2YBNDho3Q-w-nP0jJzk8QS1mf3ieyLKn5yXiEVI6EMn74Q7UW5ciQ9FEv6pVophG93wpUYFxklrbYOsCGr3ioH9nGL919HYAVFIUFqXmJUqSISpbG4V6XRA/4bt/YganEPRWRjGAJXa714Aa4A/h1/h001.vwJTh5kjc2BdjkxESY74A7bWjh0AVyRaO5QqWkGdl7U)** | | [SUPPORT OUR LAUNCH](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv9DdHOUAa5ZQEC8e9YmrM8Hn1T_1xNXuL5wQR1dhQ38rQa_tX1Fdz0Yf1x-XrxDSc4DQ12TV-dJ_Z6hq8ol_g976GDH5hZ6uXt9qCKTkYjsWIuK9vXkzcsW93Q5oQVATLygCaORnISiZekyLLOpyUM6RGZVMmxNpnSvre2ovXNPNXA_BlFBnRnK9pwz6zedxIzKs0Vdbkth2wxiIR05d6o4PNg1jz82psWn2EeLJEWrBammCY8c2XEB1ESs-JdTH4FOsD3DNq7sT0mBeqtf_IKTxuNKUyZpsaRYXkiNrzE-v9vCMIQ2CSGOQW1nmn3mtUDMI7h1SYSXvRBoWPcd1a0EWk-RP1vHt8vZ_1fk7eqBw/4bt/YganEPRWRjGAJXa714Aa4A/h2/h001.V2dKStl2cpcwuYrqAy9pOpagg9bg1vxt2eYRgO0MJp0)

clean_body: | | | If you'd like to unsubscribe, | | After a tough Election Day, we’re reflecting on what we’ve built together — and looking toward what’s next. In fact, just a few weeks ago, I asked all of you how you thought this work should move forward. I heard from so many of you, and I appreciate all of the thoughts you shared! We started this movement because kids don’t have lobbyists or lawyers fighting for them in Washington. With what we know will be a tough road ahead under the incoming administration, we’re expanding that mission beyond elections with the launch of theirfutureourvotefund.org?source=EMNBITFP20241127FRTFFLaunch03MOAnnieReneeNANATFFLaunch&linkid=2&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&emailreferrer=email2544131&emailsubject=a-new-way-to-put-kids-first — a new nonprofit dedicated to education, advocacy, and real solutions for America’s kids. Here’s a sneak peek into what Their Future Fund will do: 👉 Break down policies so everyone understands how they impact children’s health, safety, and education. 👉 Empower families and caregivers to get involved in shaping the policies that affect their lives. 👉 Raise awareness about critical issues like the climate crisis, gun violence, and child poverty. 👉 Advocate for action by connecting communities with lawmakers to push for real change. The work to support our nation's children doesn’t end at the ballot box. We’re thrilled to expand our outreach. | | It’s time we prepare for the road ahead — together. Thank you for being with us every step of the way. Until the kids are alright, Annie & Renee Co-Founders, Their Future Fund * | | | | PAID FOR BY THEIR FUTURE FUND. Contributions are tax-deductible. ## Happy Thanksgiving!
Enjoy your time with your family, if you're looking for some family viewing, check out my documentary inside Trump rallies, if you need a podcast for cooking time catch up on The Sean Spicer Show and we will be dropping new episodes everyday this week. The Morning Meeting and Substack will be back on Monday.
[Watch "The Front Row Joes"](https://substack.com/redirect/28d6f375-5b60-427c-be63-26cf8fc60139?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Download "The Sean Spicer Show"](https://substack.com/redirect/259b2b0e-19cf-4d58-8b97-7a4e8c0182ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Thanks Joe Biden
Months after taking office in 2020 Joe Biden made a historic decision to fire every member of the service academies. At the time, I was in the final months of my tenure as a member of the Board of Visitors to the US Naval Academy.
Unlike other appointments the President makes, the ones to the service academies are in statute passed by Congress and signed into law by the president. Like other members of the service academies, I was sworn into office for a term of service.
These appointmemts are dfferent from presidential commissions that serve at the plreasue or the president. I had previsouly been appointed by President Trump to serve as a Commissioner on the White House Fellows program. When the Biden administration asked for my resignation after President Biden took office, I tendered it. A president has a right to appoint people he wants to serve on presidential commissions and boards. This was different - and historic...

body:
Will you stand up for America First or let the Deep State win?
| | | | The Swamp _**SMELLS BLOOD.**_
First, the Democrats and their RINO cronies took down Matt Gaetz. Now, they’re gunning for Pam Bondi, President Trump’s newest nominee for Attorney General.
Why? Because Pam Bondi is a fighter. She’s a fearless Trump loyalist who will _**PURGE**_ the corruption at the DOJ and bring accountability to the Deep State.
But let’s be blunt: _**WE FAILED PRESIDENT TRUMP LAST TIME.**_
When the Swamp came for Trump’s first nominee, the America First movement didn’t step up. The Democrats and RINOs walked away with a victory, and the DOJ stayed a weaponized disaster.
This time, failure is _**NOT**_ an option.
Pam Bondi’s confirmation will decide whether Trump’s vision for his next term moves forward—or if the Deep State runs the table AGAIN. The Swamp is betting we’ll sit this one out.
_**Prove them wrong.**_

name: Steve Simon
subject: Reflecting on What I'm Grateful For
disclaimer_text: paid for by Simon for Secretary of State Committee
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97775450/514538435/-1787004069?refcode=header&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGE4MGQzMzUtMGZhZC1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sbZpp91rKWNpBaDT0nWvNxFsoseTsjeuONPk1Og7Lwg=) | As we head into Thanksgiving, I want to take a moment to share how grateful I am for all of your support. This year, during an intense election, I’ve seen incredible acts of dedication to democracy and to the truth across our state. From election workers ensuring every vote is counted, to voters who stand in line to make their voices heard, to supporters like you who defend the truth and protect our democracy every day—I am truly inspired. **I’m grateful for the trust Minnesotans place in me to safeguard our elections.** I don’t take this responsibility lightly. Ensuring free, fair, and secure elections isn’t just my job—it’s my passion. And it’s made possible because of the people who believe in this work. At a time when democracy faces challenges from disinformation, threats to election workers, and growing polarization, I remain optimistic. That optimism comes from the strength of our communities, the unwavering commitment to truth, and the shared belief that our democracy is worth protecting. Does democracy sometimes seem a bit dented? Sure. But never defeated. So today, I want to say thank you. I truly appreciate your belief in the power of every vote and every voice. From my family to yours, I wish you a joyful and peaceful Thanksgiving. Let’s continue to stand together for a stronger, more vibrant democracy. With gratitude, Steve Simon | | [DONATE NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97775451/514538436/-1787004069?amount=25&refcode=ss_em_fr_90DO_241127&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGE4MGQzMzUtMGZhZC1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sbZpp91rKWNpBaDT0nWvNxFsoseTsjeuONPk1Og7Lwg=)

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Humbly asking you to chip in $3 before Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
These next few years aren’t going to be easy, but there is a ton of work to do to hold the line against the worst that is set to come out of this next Trump administration. I aim to be a part of that work.
#

Team, it's Mark Kelly.
I’ll keep this brief, because I know there are turkeys to thaw and pies to bake.
It seems like the election was just yesterday. I know. But even now, we’re working to rebuild and shift our efforts for the challenges ahead.
These next few years aren’t going to be easy, but there is a ton of work to do to hold the line against the worst that is set to come out of this next Trump administration. I aim to be a part of that work. And I could really use your help.
So, if you’re ready to square up and get back in the game, I’m humbly asking for your support.
[**Please. If you can afford it, could you chip in $3 and help us get ready for the fights ahead? It’d mean a lot to have you with me.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-nov24.pA2hgt&refcode=em241127-1-120&t=1&akid=5928%2E6688874%2EEUZQop)

name: Bob Casey
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Pennsylvania Senate Victory Fund 2024
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4888%2E552475%2Erbk_-2)
Thank you, Peter.
Thank you for your unwavering support and commitment that you have given me and our team throughout our 2024 campaign.
I’m proud of the campaign we built together. I ran for re-election to fight for Pennsylvania families: To lower costs so people can get ahead and take care of their families, and to look out for our seniors, veterans, children, and people with disabilities. Our campaign reflected those values, and we carried that message across our Commonwealth.
This campaign was also about a fight for your rights — for women’s rights, workers’ rights, and voting rights. The work we did together in the days following Election Day ensured that every Pennsylvanians’ vote counted in an election decided by 0.2%.
Together we built a campaign that was about Pennsylvania and for Pennsylvanians. One that was powered by thousands of volunteers, grassroots donors, and supporters across our Commonwealth and the country.
As we turn to the holiday season, I want to thank everyone who helped power that work. I will always be grateful to have had you as part of our team.
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=4888%2E552475%2Erbk_-2)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=4888%2E552475%2Erbk_-2)

Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY Pennsylvania Senate Victory Fund 2024

body:
Our first major deadline since election day is here, Peter. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97775779/514539659/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGQ3ZTc2Ny0xM2FkLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4afCN4-r0uGfLlBlZUeEnWpx4dXDknk0jlDpFjIR8w8=&emci=45c14955-38a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=20d7e767-13ad-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=15820338)

Peter,

The election may be over, **but our work has only just begun.**

With a new administration preparing to assume control of the White House, and the GOP set to control the Senate and the House of Representatives in 2025, we know there will be challenges ahead – _and we need to be ready to meet them._

This is our very first end-of-month deadline since the election, and it’s more important than ever before that we prove that this grassroots team is still fired up and ready to fight for better healthcare that families can actually afford, good-paying jobs that strengthen our economy, and investments in infrastructure and education.

If we want to hold leaders accountable, push for bold solutions, and defend the progress we’ve made, we need to start strong,**and we need to start NOW.** That means ensuring we have the resources needed to show our movement is strong and here to stay – no matter who’s in charge on Capitol Hill. [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d70a1ec25ebc41c7b9bdaa4490a7a278&_e=KxEW--7OOvXcrZgLiFv_8VmWQknjNF4UX7subD7uSHQykNL8SQ3hZE8t5PhRsmg-IobCAhNqpqHZWzqiW1CukuJqJ-poL193tWBzdQ6_4l-zi-NVMCxPsxROzzJHCNyr9vRKteQpLnIbQIXfnCo9qgwNiRRDlmqcFDZKZ4x6Bfbvtv1gzSlEyHXWLEBhkLmoWw-QH8l-ZWI-Foif9bMyPLLdE2ereC-xOgCnOT_CMRft9ITpYCpqklX1jU_E66NCBO4rPj_4UFm7RCwV5jCwUy00fp581FVugRAWi16QFa5GYLxK30wwEXjNVhGSVhOvzs3ucA8sSUPYIvww5mxrp_Zp-xx07h24EFQZ_g2iPYr1ljmYAkOzj2byad-I6cfnUR9cAirgOSJkpM9ocTqMyg%3D%3D)
| |
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d70a1ec25ebc41c7b9bdaa4490a7a278&_e=KxEW--7OOvXcrZgLiFv_8VmWQknjNF4UX7subD7uSHQykNL8SQ3hZE8t5PhRsmg-IobCAhNqpqHZWzqiW1CukuJqJ-poL193tWBzdQ6_4l-zi-NVMCxPsxROzzJHCNyr9vRKteQpLnIbQIXfnCo9qgwNiRRDlmqcFDZKZ4x6Bfbvtv1gzSlEyHXWLEBhkLmoWw-QH8l-ZWI-Foif9bMyPLLdE2ereC-xOgCnOT_CMRft9ITpYCpqklX1jU_E66NCqBM8Cgnm_U8IfivH_h0NWRv8phGDg51DzEvwalRqxRaQPeAwLtlpJbcy8ex4SWT8yXWu09wQ6vkuQAjrc0cumcUn-umSTDnOU-UmvR_kMhI9mwSp3lBLMtjnrTIYrV5OOSKpE_G1IzTgyxjFQ16gTw%3D%3D) Dear Friend,

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d70a1ec25ebc41c7b9bdaa4490a7a278&_e=KxEW--7OOvXcrZgLiFv_8VmWQknjNF4UX7subD7uSHQykNL8SQ3hZE8t5PhRsmg-IobCAhNqpqHZWzqiW1CukuJqJ-poL193tWBzdQ6_4l-zi-NVMCxPsxROzzJHCNyr9vRKteQpLnIbQIXfnCo9qgwNiRRDlmqcFDZKZ4x6Bfbvtv1gzSlEyHXWLEBhkLmoWw-QH8l-ZWI-Foif9bMyPLLdE2ereC-xOgCnOT_CMRft9ITpYCpqklX1jU_E66NCk-7YXm_1aJPf1hrJ0c7msLAqV1KyoEGPwL7J9Awc_fQ5K09tgHD6j09zmupFjt2ef40Rv5xwxj8wYbAWVzuwIH-uU31TmKk5FTLpPyEh43F84gO-HtXSD8QYGT8ceTazU1myyIDNHSgLPcgXnR5zbg%3D%3D)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

name: Ryan Mackenzie
subject: Thankful To Get To Work For You!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mackenzie For Congress]()
body:
| | | | |
---
|
---
| | | | | **Happy Thanksgiving**
Dear Friend,
I hope that you and everyone on #TeamMackenzie has a happy and safe Thanksgiving tomorrow. Like all of us across the 7th District, I am taking a moment to count the blessings in my life: a loving and supportive wife, our new baby son, family and friends like you who stood by my side in our run for Congress this year, and the support of so many voters who want to make American stronger by focusing on real issues that help real people.
Since the election, my schedule has been jam-packed with new member orientation, getting our new district offices setup, and meeting with different groups across the 7th District, including some that have been ignored for too long.
As we embark on this new journey, I am especially thankful for all of the well wishes and support as we prepare to bring people-first representation back to Congress for the Greater Lehigh Valley.
---
| Finally, I am thankful for all the volunteers and supporters who helped me win the battle to deliver real change for the people of the Greater Lehigh Valley. Yesterday, #TeamMackenzie hosted a Victory party for our supporters and volunteers.
---
| Have a Happy Thanksgiving and hope to see you soon!
---
|
---

name: Matt, DOGEcast Updates
subject: Elon and Vivek are starting a podcast
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
They'll be reporting DIRECTLY to America about DOGE updates.
|
---

Peter,

**BREAKING: ELON MUSK AND VIVEK RAMASWAMY ARE STARTING DOGECAST, A PODCAST TO REPORT DIRECTLY TO THE AMERICAN PEOPLE ABOUT CUTTING GOVERNMENT WASTE!**
[**Will you be subscribing to their podcast?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=4d38a0d6ef134b53bac90051e87ea208&_e=kpRrnZMfHilzq3oscoD5oNmK7v3Zga_rgNzFRm3pyhFKtRA0z2t5FNyf8EGyBcwfTrFafOaeJHeKNJ3KmCCnYufQUFzSl7USLsUqP2jpyA3thoOrEiIfs4MVzXXdV_2NJy3Ij0pDQcpZXlQ2tehoF6CDt4xGwJLu_NWneEOvFoOjB1_p2WMWl5lzlml6hRLKh6j0o_oBBLDQSq1Yibc6rHvz54qgL2C3Jgy4FxExUzxcWZhyiAdPmTAvr5cdx2Rs-Bv6BPCJvW8nRPxLi67s_MWJOIdL-GjlUUu8IB0txtQKsnRlCGRWUQ04Gfs_fnZ1m55zQzFSwLqxAnj9RKuneA%3D%3D)

Elon and Vivek are crowdsourcing Americans to determine where to start when they officially take on their roles as the heads of the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).

**YOU HAVE BEEN SELECTED TO SHARE YOUR INPUT!**

We need to know:

\- Will you listen to the DOGEcast podcast?

\- AND MORE!

name: Qasim Rashid, Esq.
subject: Rebuking The Washington Post For Whitewashing Genocide
body:
The Post's Editorial Board has done a disservice to journalism, to human rights, and to international law. Read on as I dismantle each of their propaganda claims--with receipts.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..rKbViha-DbpeGuMCGY3setLgRe8wIGR8C9MZ7UfnRcA?) for more

[](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucWFzaW1yYXNoaWQuY29tL3AvcmVidWtpbmctdGhlLXdhc2hpbmd0b24tcG9zdC1mb3I_.lkU3XUK9FSwSqjgNBvPWPCnn4vc6zzKLRdZ10kOcnn8?)
